       COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_avec_erreur
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le total des dépenses de fonctionnement (champ D001) par commune pour l'année 2023 et le budget principal ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_D001 DESC;

question_fr: Quelle part des dépenses d'investissement (DF011) représente‑t‑elle le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) par commune en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 communes les plus investies ?
sql:
WITH expenses AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_dep,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ROUND(100.0 * invest / total_dep, 2) AS pct_investissement
FROM expenses
WHERE total_dep > 0
ORDER BY pct_investissement DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs extraits par document pour chaque masque en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH per_doc AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.mask,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_champs
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
)
SELECT mask,
       ROUND(AVG(nb_champs), 2) AS moyenne_champs
FROM per_doc
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY moyenne_champs DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la médiane du nombre de pages des documents qui comportent un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
WITH warned AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         nb_pages,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY document_year ORDER BY nb_pages) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY document_year) AS cnt
  FROM documents
  WHERE warning_message <> ''
)
SELECT document_year,
       AVG(nb_pages) AS median_pages
FROM (
  SELECT document_year, nb_pages
  FROM warned
  WHERE rn IN ((cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2)
)
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts sont extraits par commune pour le budget principal en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_champs_distincts
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio (en %) des documents contenant au moins une erreur d'extraction par rapport à ceux contenant un avertissement, selon le format en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH err AS (
  SELECT d.format, d.document_id
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.format, d.document_id
),
warn AS (
  SELECT d.format, d.document_id
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.message_warning IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY d.format, d.document_id
)
SELECT e.format,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT e.document_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT w.document_id), 0), 2) AS pct_erreur_sur_avertissement
FROM err e
LEFT JOIN warn w ON e.format = w.format
GROUP BY e.format;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quelle est la variance du champ D001 entre 2023 et 2024, et quelles communes dépassent une variance de 1 000 000 ?
sql:
WITH valeurs AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
)
SELECT city_name,
       (AVG(val * val) - AVG(val) * AVG(val)) AS variance
FROM valeurs
GROUP BY city_name
HAVING variance > 1000000
ORDER BY variance DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur part de dépenses d'investissement (DF011) augmenter de plus de 15 % du total des dépenses entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH exp AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_dep,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pct AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         document_year,
         CASE WHEN total_dep > 0 THEN invest / total_dep ELSE 0 END AS part_invest
  FROM exp
)
SELECT p2024.city_name,
       ROUND((p2024.part_invest - p2023.part_invest) * 100, 2) AS hausse_pct
FROM pct p2024
JOIN pct p2023 ON p2024.city_name = p2023.city_name
WHERE p2024.document_year = '2024'
  AND p2023.document_year = '2023'
  AND (p2024.part_invest - p2023.part_invest) > 0.15
ORDER BY hausse_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est la moyenne pondérée du champ D001 par commune (pondération = nombre de pages) pour le budget principal en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 meilleures ?
sql:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS d001,
         d.nb_pages
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
)
SELECT city_name,
       ROUND(SUM(d001 * nb_pages) / SUM(nb_pages), 2) AS moyenne_ponderee_d001
FROM data
GROUP BY city_name
ORDER BY moyenne_ponderee_d001 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le montant moyen du champ D001 par page pour chaque masque (budget principal, 2024) ?
sql:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS d001,
         d.nb_pages
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
)
SELECT mask,
       ROUND(SUM(d001) / SUM(nb_pages), 4) AS d001_par_page
FROM data
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY d001_par_page DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec les dépenses de fonctionnement les plus élevées en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS total_expense
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
ORDER BY total_expense DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec les plus faibles dépenses de fonctionnement en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS total_expense
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
ORDER BY total_expense ASC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes voient les dépenses d'investissement (DF011) représenter plus de 30 % des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(df.value AS REAL) AS invest,
       CAST(do.value AS REAL) AS expense,
       (CAST(df.value AS REAL) / CAST(do.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 AS pct_invest
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results df ON d.document_id = df.document_id AND df.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
JOIN extraction_results do ON d.document_id = do.document_id AND do.safir_field_id = 'D001'
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND CAST(df.value AS REAL) > 0
  AND CAST(do.value AS REAL) > 0
  AND (CAST(df.value AS REAL) / CAST(do.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 > 30
ORDER BY pct_invest DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont la part de la famille de dépenses D002 supérieure à 30 % du total des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(d2.value AS REAL) AS d002,
       CAST(d1.value AS REAL) AS d001,
       (CAST(d2.value AS REAL) / CAST(d1.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 AS pct_d002
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d.document_id = d2.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d.document_id = d1.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND CAST(d1.value AS REAL) > 0
  AND (CAST(d2.value AS REAL) / CAST(d1.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 > 30
ORDER BY pct_d002 DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le montant moyen des dépenses de fonctionnement par page pour chaque commune en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       (CAST(r.value AS REAL) / d.nb_pages) AS expense_per_page
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND d.nb_pages > 0
ORDER BY expense_per_page DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un champ « Année » extrait qui ne correspond pas à l’année du document ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       d.document_year,
       r.value AS extracted_year
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Année'
  AND r.value <> d.document_year

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes qui ont généré le plus d’erreurs d’extraction (message_error) en 2023 ?

       COUNT(*) AS error_count
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND r.message_error IS NOT NULL
  AND r.message_error <> ''
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY error_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus grande moyenne de pages par document pour le budget annexes (BA) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY avg_pages DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent le ratio le plus élevé d'investissement (DF011) par rapport au total des dépenses (D001 + D002) pour le budget annexes (BA) en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(df.value AS REAL) AS invest,
       (CAST(df.value AS REAL) / (CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL))) * 100.0 AS pct_invest_total
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results df ON d.document_id = df.document_id AND df.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d.document_id = d1.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d.document_id = d2.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
  AND (CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL)) > 0
ORDER BY pct_invest_total DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une proportion de documents avec erreurs supérieure à 30 % du total des documents pour le budget principal (BP) en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT city_name,
       (CAST(error_docs AS REAL) / total_docs) * 100.0 AS error_pct
FROM (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
           SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_docs
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
      AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
) sub
WHERE error_pct > 30
ORDER BY error_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus grand nombre de retours techniques (is_technical_error = 1) sur les résultats d'extraction en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       COUNT(rf.feedback_id) AS tech_error_count
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
JOIN resultfeedbacks rf ON r.result_id = rf.result_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND rf.is_technical_error = 1
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY tech_error_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont le plus grand nombre d'exécutions d'extraction (runs) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       COUNT(er.run_id) AS run_count
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY run_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des dépenses de fonctionnement (champ D001) par année pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep_fonctionnement
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents validés (état SUCCESS) chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents sont présents chaque année selon le type de masque ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       d.mask,
       COUNT(*) AS doc_count
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year, d.mask
ORDER BY d.document_year, d.mask;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 pour la commune BAGNOLET VILLE - VILLE (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.city_name = 'BAGNOLET VILLE - VILLE'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT (s2024.total_dep - s2023.total_dep) / NULLIF(s2023.total_dep,0) * 100.0 AS growth_percent,
       s2023.total_dep AS total_2023,
       s2024.total_dep AS total_2024
FROM sums s2023
JOIN sums s2024 ON s2023.document_year = '2023' AND s2024.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur ratio investissement (DF011 / D001) augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS fonction
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
), calc AS (
  SELECT r2024.city_name,
         (r2024.invest / NULLIF(r2024.fonction,0)) - (r2023.invest / NULLIF(r2023.fonction,0)) AS ratio_diff
  FROM ratios r2023
  JOIN ratios r2024 ON r2023.city_name = r2024.city_name
    AND r2023.document_year = '2023' AND r2024.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT city_name,
       ratio_diff * 100.0 AS increase_percent
FROM calc
WHERE ratio_diff > 0.20
ORDER BY increase_percent DESC;

question_fr: Dans quelles années le champ extrait « Année » ne correspond pas à l'année du document, et combien de documents sont concernés ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS mismatched_docs
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'Année'
  AND e.value <> d.document_year
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes présentant la plus forte hausse absolue des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal), avec le pourcentage d’évolution ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
), diff AS (
  SELECT y2024.city_name,
         y2024.total_dep - y2023.total_dep AS abs_increase,
         (y2024.total_dep - y2023.total_dep) / NULLIF(y2023.total_dep,0) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
  FROM yearly y2023
  JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2023.city_name = y2024.city_name
    AND y2023.document_year = '2023' AND y2024.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT city_name, abs_increase, pct_increase
FROM diff
ORDER BY abs_increase DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quelles années ont enregistré une baisse du total des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) par rapport à l’année précédente, et de quel pourcentage ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year
)
SELECT t_current.mask,
       t_current.document_year,
       (t_prev.total_dep - t_current.total_dep) / NULLIF(t_prev.total_dep,0) * 100.0 AS decline_percent
FROM totals t_current
JOIN totals t_prev
  ON t_current.mask = t_prev.mask
  AND t_current.document_year = CAST(t_prev.document_year AS INTEGER) + 1
WHERE t_current.total_dep < t_prev.total_dep
ORDER BY t_current.mask, t_current.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une variance du total des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) supérieure à 1 000 000 € entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT s2024.city_name,
       ((s2024.total_dep - s2023.total_dep) * (s2024.total_dep - s2023.total_dep)) AS variance_squared
FROM sums s2023
JOIN sums s2024 ON s2023.city_name = s2024.city_name
  AND s2023.document_year = '2023' AND s2024.document_year = '2024'
WHERE ((s2024.total_dep - s2023.total_dep) * (s2024.total_dep - s2023.total_dep)) > 1000000
ORDER BY variance_squared DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur total dépenses (D001 + D002) dépasser de plus de 10 % le total de l’année précédente en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE e.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT s2024.city_name,
       s2023.total_dep AS total_2023,
       s2024.total_dep AS total_2024,
       (s2024.total_dep - s2023.total_dep) / NULLIF(s2023.total_dep,0) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM totals s2023
JOIN totals s2024 ON s2023.city_name = s2024.city_name
  AND s2023.document_year = '2023' AND s2024.document_year = '2024'
WHERE (s2024.total_dep - s2023.total_dep) / NULLIF(s2023.total_dep,0) * 100.0 > 10
ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des investissements (champ DF011) par année pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       SUM(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS total_invest
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen d’investissement (DF011 / D001) par année pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH doc_ratios AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS fonction
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE e.safir_field_id IN ('DF011','D001')
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year,
       AVG(invest / NULLIF(fonction,0)) AS avg_invest_ratio
FROM doc_ratios
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont une part supérieure à 30 % des dépenses de la famille D002 dans le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS d001,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS d002
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND e.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       d002 / NULLIF((d001 + d002),0) * 100.0 AS d002_share_percent
FROM totals
WHERE d002 / NULLIF((d001 + d002),0) * 100.0 > 30
ORDER BY d002_share_percent DESC;

question_fr: Comment évoluent les dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) moyennes par document selon le masque d’une année à l’autre ?
sql:
WITH avg_per_doc AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.mask,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS dep
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.mask, d.document_year
), yearly AS (
  SELECT mask,
         document_year,
         AVG(dep) AS avg_dep
  FROM avg_per_doc
  GROUP BY mask, document_year
)
SELECT y_curr.mask,
       y_curr.document_year,
       (y_curr.avg_dep - y_prev.avg_dep) / NULLIF(y_prev.avg_dep,0) * 100.0 AS change_percent
FROM yearly y_curr
JOIN yearly y_prev
  ON y_curr.mask = y_prev.mask
  AND y_curr.document_year = CAST(y_prev.document_year AS INTEGER) + 1
ORDER BY y_curr.mask, y_curr.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents contiennent un message d’erreur non vide chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS docs_with_error
FROM documents d
WHERE TRIM(d.error_message) <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents qui affichent au moins un avertissement (warning_message non vide) chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_warning,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS warning_percent
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont une dépense de fonctionnement (D001) moyenne par page supérieure à la moyenne nationale en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH commune_stats AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_dep,
         SUM(d.nb_pages) AS total_pages
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND e.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
), national AS (
  SELECT AVG(total_dep / NULLIF(total_pages,0)) AS avg_dep_per_page
  FROM commune_stats
)
SELECT cs.city_name,
       (cs.total_dep / NULLIF(cs.total_pages,0)) AS dep_per_page,
       n.avg_dep_per_page
FROM commune_stats cs, national n
WHERE (cs.total_dep / NULLIF(cs.total_pages,0)) > n.avg_dep_per_page
ORDER BY dep_per_page DESC;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR différents sont extraits en moyenne par document chaque année ?
sql:
WITH fields_per_doc AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT e.safir_field_id) AS field_count
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id
)
SELECT d.document_year,
       AVG(f.field_count) AS avg_fields_per_doc
FROM fields_per_doc f
JOIN documents d ON f.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le temps moyen d’extraction (différence entre start_time et created_at du résultat) par année, et quelles années montrent une hausse de plus de 20 % par rapport à l’année précédente ?
sql:
WITH run_durations AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         (julianday(e.created_at) - julianday(r.start_time)) * 24 * 60.0 AS minutes
  FROM extraction_runs r
  JOIN extraction_results e ON r.run_id = e.run_id
  JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id
), yearly_avg AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         AVG(minutes) AS avg_minutes
  FROM run_durations
  GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT y_curr.document_year,
       y_curr.avg_minutes,
       (y_curr.avg_minutes - y_prev.avg_minutes) / NULLIF(y_prev.avg_minutes,0) * 100.0 AS increase_percent
FROM yearly_avg y_curr
JOIN yearly_avg y_prev
  ON y_curr.document_year = CAST(y_prev.document_year AS INTEGER) + 1
WHERE (y_curr.avg_minutes - y_prev.avg_minutes) / NULLIF(y_prev.avg_minutes,0) * 100.0 > 20
ORDER BY increase_percent DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents par type de budget (BP/BA) chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       d.budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS doc_count
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.document_year, d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux d’erreur parmi les documents chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT document_year AS annee,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_erreur
FROM documents
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY annee;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents affiche un avertissement selon le type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT budget_type,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_avertissement
FROM documents
GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Combien d’exécutions d’extraction sont réalisées dans chaque état ?
sql:
SELECT s.code AS etat_run,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_runs
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY s.code
ORDER BY nb_runs DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de documents PARTIAL par rapport aux documents SUCCESS pour chaque type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'PARTIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS ratio_partial_sur_success
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de résultats d’extraction par document dont l’état est ERROR ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(cnt) AS avg_resultats_par_doc
FROM (
    SELECT d.document_id,
           COUNT(er.result_id) AS cnt
    FROM documents d
    JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
    GROUP BY d.document_id
);

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents chaque année comporte un avertissement contenant le mot « tableau » ?
sql:
SELECT document_year AS annee,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN warning_message LIKE '%tableau%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_warning_tableau
FROM documents
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le temps moyen, en minutes, entre le démarrage d’une exécution d’extraction et la création du premier résultat, par année, et quelles années dépassent 2 minutes ?
sql:
WITH run_durations AS (
  SELECT er.run_id,
         substr(d.document_year,1,4) AS annee,
         (julianday(MIN(er.created_at)) - julianday(r.start_time)) * 24 * 60 AS diff_minutes
  FROM extraction_runs r
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.run_id = r.run_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  GROUP BY er.run_id
)
SELECT annee,
       ROUND(AVG(diff_minutes), 2) AS avg_minutes
FROM run_durations
GROUP BY annee
HAVING AVG(diff_minutes) > 2
ORDER BY annee;

question_fr: Quel masque et quelle année présentent le taux le plus élevé de documents dont l’avertissement mentionne le mot « section » ?
sql:
WITH warning_counts AS (
  SELECT mask,
         document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN warning_message LIKE '%section%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_warning_section,
         COUNT(*) AS total_docs
  FROM documents
  GROUP BY mask, document_year
)
SELECT mask,
       document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * nb_warning_section * 1.0 / total_docs, 2) AS ratio_pct
FROM warning_counts
ORDER BY ratio_pct DESC
LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de règles de validation associées à chaque jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(v.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation_rules FROM validation_rules v JOIN rulesets r ON v.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts sont couverts par les règles d'extraction pour chaque masque ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS nb_fields FROM field_rules GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio entre les règles de validation et les règles d'extraction pour chaque jeu de règles ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction_rules,
       COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation_rules,
       (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id),0)) AS validation_to_extraction_ratio
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN validation_rules v ON v.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id;

question_fr: Combien de règles de validation sont définies pour chaque masque ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_validation_rules FROM validation_rules GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quels jeux de règles affichent une densité de contrôle supérieure à 30 % (ratio validation / extraction) ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction_rules,
       COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation_rules,
       (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id),0)) * 100.0 AS validation_pct
FROM rulesets r
JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
JOIN validation_rules v ON v.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
HAVING validation_pct > 30.0;

question_fr: Combien de règles d'extraction ciblent la famille d'indicateurs « D » (début du champ SAFIR) pour chaque masque ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_d_rules FROM field_rules WHERE safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents possède au moins une règle d'extraction pour son masque ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       COUNT(*) AS total_documents,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fr.mask IS NOT NULL THEN d.document_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct_with_rules
FROM documents d
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT mask FROM field_rules) fr ON d.mask = fr.mask
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Pour quels masques la moyenne de règles d'extraction par document dépasse‑t‑elle 5 ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS avg_rules_per_document
FROM documents d
JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.mask = d.mask
GROUP BY d.mask
HAVING (COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id)) > 5;

question_fr: Combien de règles de validation mentionnent le champ SAFIR « D001 » pour chaque masque ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_validation_rules_for_D001 FROM validation_rules WHERE safir_field_id_list LIKE '%D001%' GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Pour chaque jeu de règles, quels masques couvre‑t‑il et combien de règles d'extraction comporte‑t‑il au total ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT fr.mask) AS masks_covered,
       COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS total_extraction_rules
FROM rulesets r
JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quelle proportion des règles de validation est de type « ALERTE » ?
sql:
SELECT mask,
       COUNT(*) AS total_validation_rules,
       SUM(CASE WHEN level_of_problem = 'ALERTE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct_alertes
FROM validation_rules
GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quels masques affichent une faible densité de contrôle, définie comme moins de 0,5 règle de validation par règle d'extraction ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       COUNT(v.validation_rule_id) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id),0) AS validation_per_extraction
FROM documents d
JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.mask = d.mask
LEFT JOIN validation_rules v ON v.ruleset_id = fr.ruleset_id
GROUP BY d.mask
HAVING validation_per_extraction < 0.5;

question_fr: Pour quels jeux de règles les règles d'extraction n'ont aucune règle de validation correspondante ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction_rules_without_validation
FROM rulesets r
JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN validation_rules v ON v.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE v.validation_rule_id IS NULL
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id;

question_fr: Quel sont les trois jeux de règles présentant l'indice de densité de contrôle le plus élevé (indice = (2 × validation + extraction) / nombre de champs SAFIR distincts) ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation_rules,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction_rules,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fr.safir_field_id) AS nb_safir_fields,
       ((COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) * 2) + COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id)) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.safir_field_id),0) AS control_density_index
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN validation_rules v ON v.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY control_density_index DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quel jeu de règles possède la plus forte densité de contrôle (ratio validation / extraction) et quelles masques couvre‑t‑il ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation_rules,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction_rules,
       (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT v.validation_rule_id) AS REAL) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id),0)) AS control_density,
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT fr.mask) AS masks_covered
FROM rulesets r
JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN validation_rules v ON v.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY control_density DESC
LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Quelle part de l'investissement (DF011) représente le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) pour chaque commune en 2024 (budget annexes – BA) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
       NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS investment_share
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY investment_share DESC;

question_fr: Comment les dépenses totales (D001 + D002) se comparent‑elles entre le budget principal (BP) et le budget annexes (BA) pour chaque commune en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       d.budget_type,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_expenses
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type IN ('BP','BA')
GROUP BY d.city_name, d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.city_name, d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes présentant le plus grand montant d'investissement (DF011) en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investment
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_investment DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents du budget annexes (BA) en 2023 ?
Quel est le taux de croissance (en %) des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 pour chaque commune (budget principal – BP) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT y2024.city_name,
       (y2024.total_D001 - y2023.total_D001) / NULLIF(y2023.total_D001,0) * 100.0 AS growth_percent
FROM yearly y2023
JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2023.city_name = y2024.city_name
WHERE y2023.document_year = '2023' AND y2024.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une part supérieure à 30 % des dépenses D002 dans le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) en 2024 (budget principal – BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
       NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS d002_share
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING d002_share > 0.30
ORDER BY d002_share DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen d'investissement (DF011 / total dépenses) pour chaque type de budget (BP vs BA) en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH per_commune AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.budget_type,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS ratio
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type IN ('BP','BA')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.budget_type
)
SELECT budget_type,
       AVG(ratio) AS avg_ratio
FROM per_commune
GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total d'investissement (DF011) par commune pour l'année 2023, toutes catégories budgétaires confondues ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_investment
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_investment DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la médiane du total des dépenses (D001 + D002) par commune en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH per_commune AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_expenses
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
), ordered AS (
  SELECT total_expenses,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_expenses) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
  FROM per_commune
)
SELECT AVG(total_expenses) AS median_expenses
FROM ordered
WHERE rn IN ((cnt+1)/2, (cnt+2)/2);

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur investissement (DF011) augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS invest
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT y2024.city_name,
       (y2024.invest - y2023.invest) / NULLIF(y2023.invest,0) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM yearly y2023
JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2023.city_name = y2024.city_name
WHERE y2023.document_year = '2023' AND y2024.document_year = '2024'
  AND (y2024.invest - y2023.invest) / NULLIF(y2023.invest,0) * 100.0 > 20.0;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune en 2024 (budget annexes – BA), quelle part représente chaque famille de dépenses D001 et D002 dans le total des dépenses ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
       NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS d001_share,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
       NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS d002_share
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs SAFIR distincts extraits par document en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(field_count) AS avg_distinct_fields
FROM (
  SELECT er.document_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS field_count
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY er.document_id
);

question_fr: Quel sont les 10 communes avec le ratio d'investissement (DF011 / total dépenses) pondéré par le montant des dépenses sur 2023‑2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH per_year AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_exp
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id IN ('DF011','D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
), ratio AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         SUM(invest) AS sum_invest,
         SUM(total_exp) AS sum_total
  FROM per_year
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       (sum_invest / NULLIF(sum_total,0)) AS weighted_invest_ratio
FROM ratio
ORDER BY weighted_invest_ratio DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le montant moyen des dépenses par page pour chaque commune en 2024 (budget principal – BP) ? Classez les 5 meilleures communes.
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
       NULLIF(SUM(d.nb_pages),0) AS expense_per_page
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY expense_per_page DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents présente une discordance entre le champ extrait « Année » et l'année du document, par type de budget ? (Seuil > 5 %)
sql:
WITH doc_flag AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.budget_type,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Année' AND er.value != d.document_year THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_mismatch
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.safir_field_id = 'Année'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.budget_type
)
SELECT budget_type,
       SUM(is_mismatch) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS mismatch_percent
FROM doc_flag
GROUP BY budget_type
HAVING mismatch_percent > 5.0;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un investissement (DF011) supérieur à 40 % du total des dépenses (D001 + D002) à la fois en 2023 et en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_exp
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    AND er.safir_field_id IN ('DF011','D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
), qualified AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN invest > 0.4 * total_exp THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS years_meeting
  FROM yearly
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name
FROM qualified
WHERE years_meeting = 2;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents par année et type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT document_year AS annee,
       budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_documents
FROM documents
GROUP BY document_year, budget_type
ORDER BY document_year DESC, nb_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents comporte un avertissement (warning_message) non vide chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year AS annee,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_warning
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year DESC;

question_fr: Combien de documents sont présents par format (pdf ou scan) chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT document_year AS annee,
       format,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_documents
FROM documents
GROUP BY document_year, format
ORDER BY document_year DESC, nb_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages par document pour chaque masque ?
sql:
SELECT mask,
       AVG(nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY avg_pages DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de champs SAFIR distincts extraits par document chaque année ?
sql:
WITH field_counts AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_fields
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year AS annee,
       AVG(nb_fields) AS avg_distinct_fields
FROM field_counts
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents en état SUCCESS par rapport au total chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year AS annee,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_success
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON s.state_id = d.state_id
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont le plus grand nombre de champs SAFIR distincts extraits pour le budget principal en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_distinct_fields
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY nb_distinct_fields DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent plus de 5 % de résultats d'extraction avec un message d'erreur en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         COUNT(*) AS total_res,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS err_res
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       err_res,
       total_res,
       100.0 * err_res / total_res AS pct_error
FROM totals
WHERE 100.0 * err_res / total_res > 5
ORDER BY pct_error DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune et chaque année, combien d'extractions ont été réalisées et quelle est la durée moyenne entre le démarrage de l'extraction et le premier résultat ?
sql:
WITH run_durations AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         er.run_id,
         MIN(er.created_at) AS first_result_time,
         r.start_time
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN extraction_runs r ON r.run_id = er.run_id
  GROUP BY er.run_id
)
SELECT city_name,
       document_year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT run_id) AS nb_runs,
       AVG(strftime('%s', first_result_time) - strftime('%s', start_time)) / 60.0 AS avg_duration_min
FROM run_durations
GROUP BY city_name, document_year
ORDER BY nb_runs DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs SAFIR distincts par document selon le type de budget pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
WITH doc_fields AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.budget_type,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_fields
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.budget_type
)
SELECT budget_type,
       AVG(nb_fields) AS avg_distinct_fields_per_doc
FROM doc_fields
GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quel est le taux de documents en état SUCCESS et quelles communes sont en dessous de 70 % ?
sql:
WITH doc_counts AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
         SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_docs
  FROM documents d
  JOIN states s ON s.state_id = d.state_id
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       success_docs,
       total_docs,
       100.0 * success_docs / total_docs AS pct_success,
       CASE WHEN 100.0 * success_docs / total_docs < 70 THEN 'Below threshold' ELSE 'OK' END AS status
FROM doc_counts
ORDER BY pct_success ASC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Dans chaque commune et chaque année, quel est le pourcentage de résultats d'extraction avec un message d'erreur et un feedback technique associé supérieur à 10 % ?
sql:
WITH error_feedback AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         er.result_id,
         CASE WHEN er.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_error,
         CASE WHEN rf.is_technical_error = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS tech_error
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  LEFT JOIN resultfeedbacks rf ON rf.result_id = er.result_id
)
SELECT city_name,
       document_year AS annee,
       SUM(CASE WHEN has_error = 1 AND tech_error = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_error_tech,
       COUNT(*) AS total_results,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN has_error = 1 AND tech_error = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_error_tech
FROM error_feedback
GROUP BY city_name, document_year
HAVING pct_error_tech > 10
ORDER BY pct_error_tech DESC;

question_fr: Quels masques et types de budget voient leur nombre de documents chuter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly_counts AS (
  SELECT mask,
         budget_type,
         document_year,
         COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM documents
  WHERE document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY mask, budget_type, document_year
)
SELECT yc2024.mask,
       yc2024.budget_type,
       yc2024.cnt AS cnt_2024,
       yc2023.cnt AS cnt_2023,
       100.0 * (yc2024.cnt - yc2023.cnt) / yc2023.cnt AS pct_change
FROM yearly_counts yc2024
JOIN yearly_counts yc2023
  ON yc2024.mask = yc2023.mask
 AND yc2024.budget_type = yc2023.budget_type
 AND yc2024.document_year = '2024'
 AND yc2023.document_year = '2023'
WHERE pct_change < -20
ORDER BY pct_change ASC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages pondéré par le nombre de résultats d'extraction, comparé entre BP et BA chaque année ?
sql:
WITH doc_weights AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         d.budget_type,
         d.nb_pages,
         COUNT(er.result_id) AS nb_results
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year, d.budget_type, d.nb_pages
),
weighted AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         budget_type,
         SUM(nb_pages * nb_results) AS weighted_pages_sum,
         SUM(nb_results) AS total_weights
  FROM doc_weights
  GROUP BY document_year, budget_type
)
SELECT document_year AS annee,
       budget_type,
       weighted_pages_sum / total_weights AS weighted_avg_pages
FROM weighted
ORDER BY document_year, weighted_avg_pages DESC;

question_fr: Combien de documents par année contiennent au moins un champ extrait ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS docs_with_results FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents, par type de budget, comporte le champ d'investissement DF011 ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, 100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN d.document_id END) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS pct_docs_with_DF011 FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Dans quels documents le champ extrait « Année » ne correspond pas à l'année du document ?
sql: SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.document_year, er.value AS extracted_year FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Année' AND er.value <> d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs extraits par document pour chaque type de budget ?
sql: SELECT budget_type, AVG(result_count) AS avg_results_per_doc FROM ( SELECT d.document_id, d.budget_type, COUNT(*) AS result_count FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.document_id, d.budget_type ) t GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de couverture des champs SAFIR par ville, exprimé en pourcentage du nombre total de champs définis pour le masque du document ?
sql: WITH city_extracted AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.mask, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS extracted_fields FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.city_name, d.mask ), mask_total AS ( SELECT mask, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS total_fields FROM field_rules GROUP BY mask ) SELECT c.city_name, c.mask, 100.0 * c.extracted_fields / m.total_fields AS coverage_percent FROM city_extracted c JOIN mask_total m ON m.mask = c.mask ORDER BY coverage_percent DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quels champs SAFIR sont absents dans plus de 30 % des documents de l'année 2024 ?
sql: WITH total_docs AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS cnt FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' ), field_presence AS ( SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_field FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id ) SELECT fp.safir_field_id, 100.0 * (t.cnt - fp.docs_with_field) / t.cnt AS missing_percent FROM field_presence fp, total_docs t WHERE (t.cnt - fp.docs_with_field) * 1.0 / t.cnt > 0.30 ORDER BY missing_percent DESC;

question_fr: Combien de documents, par année, n'ont aucun résultat avec une valeur renseignée ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(*) AS docs_without_values FROM documents d WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.value) <> '' ) GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un investissement (DF011) supérieur à 25 % du total des dépenses (D001 + D002) pour le budget principal en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_investment, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_expenses, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END),0) AS investment_pct FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING investment_pct > 25.0 ORDER BY investment_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de résultats d'extraction comporte une erreur, par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS error_percent FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR sont extraits à la fois dans les budgets principal et annexes pour chaque commune ?
sql: WITH field_presence AS ( SELECT d.city_name, er.safir_field_id, d.budget_type FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.city_name, er.safir_field_id, d.budget_type ), field_both AS ( SELECT fp.city_name, fp.safir_field_id FROM field_presence fp WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM field_presence fp2 WHERE fp2.city_name = fp.city_name AND fp2.safir_field_id = fp.safir_field_id AND fp2.budget_type = 'BP' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM field_presence fp3 WHERE fp3.city_name = fp.city_name AND fp3.safir_field_id = fp.safir_field_id AND fp3.budget_type = 'BA' ) GROUP BY fp.city_name, fp.safir_field_id ) SELECT city_name, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS intersect_field_count FROM field_both GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY intersect_field_count DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de Gini du montant d'investissement DF011 par commune pour 2024, séparément pour le budget principal et annexes ?
sql: WITH df AS ( SELECT d.budget_type, d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS investment FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' GROUP BY d.budget_type, d.city_name ), ordered AS ( SELECT budget_type, investment, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY budget_type ORDER BY investment) AS rank, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY budget_type) AS n, SUM(investment) OVER (PARTITION BY budget_type) AS total_investment FROM df ) SELECT budget_type, 1.0 - (2.0 * SUM(rank * investment) / (n * total_investment)) + (1.0 / n) AS gini_coefficient FROM ordered GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de variation du nombre de champs SAFIR distincts par commune entre 2023 et 2024, et quelles communes connaissent une hausse ou une baisse supérieure à 20 % ?
sql: WITH field_counts AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS distinct_fields FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ), pivot AS ( SELECT city_name, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN distinct_fields END) AS cnt_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN distinct_fields END) AS cnt_2024 FROM field_counts GROUP BY city_name ) SELECT city_name, cnt_2023, cnt_2024, CASE WHEN cnt_2023 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100.0 * (cnt_2024 - cnt_2023) / cnt_2023 END AS pct_change, CASE WHEN cnt_2023 = 0 THEN 'N/A' WHEN (cnt_2024 - cnt_2023) * 1.0 / cnt_2023 > 0.20 THEN 'Increase >20%' WHEN (cnt_2023 - cnt_2024) * 1.0 / cnt_2023 > 0.20 THEN 'Decrease >20%' ELSE 'Stable' END AS growth_category FROM pivot WHERE cnt_2023 IS NOT NULL AND cnt_2024 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY pct_change DESC LIMIT 20;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents qui ont un message d'avertissement non vide pour chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS warning_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code IN ('SUCCESS','PARTIAL','ERROR','REJECTED')
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents en état d'erreur pour chaque type de budget (BP, BA) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS error_docs
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'ERROR' AND d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents ont un message d'erreur non vide parmi ceux qui sont en état PARTIAL pour chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quels sont les trois états les plus fréquents parmi les documents qui ont généré au moins une erreur d'extraction en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT s.code,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_error
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE er.message_error <> '' AND d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY s.code
ORDER BY docs_with_error DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents en état PARTIAL qui ont également un avertissement, par type de budget, pour l'année 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS partial_warn_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL' AND d.document_year = '2023'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Parmi les documents en état ERROR, quel est le nombre moyen de messages d'avertissement par document pour chaque année ?
sql:
WITH err_docs AS (
    SELECT d.document_id,
           d.document_year,
           CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS warn_flag
    FROM documents d
    JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
    WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
)
SELECT document_year,
       ROUND(AVG(warn_flag), 2) AS avg_warnings_per_error_doc
FROM err_docs
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Pour chaque combinaison de type de budget et de code d'état, calculez le nombre de documents et le pourcentage que cela représente du total des documents de 2024.
sql:
WITH total AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS tot
    FROM documents
    WHERE document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT d.budget_type,
       s.code AS state_code,
       COUNT(*) AS docs,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT tot FROM total), 2) AS pct_of_total
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type, s.code
ORDER BY docs DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents qui ont à la fois un message d'erreur et un message d'avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS docs_both
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.error_message <> '' AND d.warning_message <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Parmi les documents au format scan, quel est le taux d'erreur (message_error non vide) par état pour l'année 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT s.code AS state_code,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.message_error <> '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.format = 'scan' AND d.document_year = '2023'
GROUP BY s.code;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages pour les documents en état PARTIAL qui ont au moins un avertissement, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(AVG(d.nb_pages), 2) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL' AND d.warning_message <> ''
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Déterminez le pourcentage de documents dont le processus d’extraction a échoué (état ERROR) mais qui contiennent au moins un champ extrait avec un message d’avertissement (message_warning non vide) dans extraction_results, par année.
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.message_warning <> '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_with_warning_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Calculez le taux moyen de documents en état SUCCESS qui ont généré au moins un avertissement parmi ceux qui ont plus de 500 pages, par année, et indiquez les années où ce taux dépasse 15 %.
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS success_warn_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.nb_pages > 500
GROUP BY d.document_year
HAVING (100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) > 15.0;

question_fr: Quel est le total des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) par année pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été traités chaque année, ventilés par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       d.budget_type,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS nb_documents
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.document_year, d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le montant moyen des investissements (DF011) par document en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_invest_2024
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011';

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents présentant un message d’avertissement non vide chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS warning_rate_pct
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts sont extraits par document en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS distinct_fields
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
GROUP BY d.document_id
ORDER BY distinct_fields DESC;

question_fr: Quelle évolution en pourcentage du total des dépenses (D001 + D002) entre 2023 et 2024 pour chaque type de budget ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         d.budget_type,
         SUM(COALESCE(CAST(d1.value AS REAL),0) + COALESCE(CAST(d2.value AS REAL),0)) AS total_expenses
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
)
SELECT t2024.budget_type,
       ((t2024.total_expenses - t2023.total_expenses) / t2023.total_expenses) * 100.0 AS growth_pct
FROM totals t2024
JOIN totals t2023 ON t2023.budget_type = t2024.budget_type
WHERE t2024.document_year = '2024' AND t2023.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen d’investissement (DF011 / (D001 + D002)) par commune en 2024 pour le budget principal ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       AVG(CAST(er_invest.value AS REAL) / NULLIF(CAST(er_d001.value AS REAL) + CAST(er_d002.value AS REAL),0)) AS avg_invest_ratio
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er_invest ON er_invest.document_id = d.document_id AND er_invest.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
JOIN extraction_results er_d001 ON er_d001.document_id = d.document_id AND er_d001.safir_field_id = 'D001'
JOIN extraction_results er_d002 ON er_d002.document_id = d.document_id AND er_d002.safir_field_id = 'D002'
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY avg_invest_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une part supérieure à 25 % d’investissement (DF011) dans le total des dépenses en 2024 pour le budget principal ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(er_invest.value AS REAL)) / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(er_d001.value AS REAL) + CAST(er_d002.value AS REAL)),0) AS invest_share
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er_invest ON er_invest.document_id = d.document_id AND er_invest.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
JOIN extraction_results er_d001 ON er_d001.document_id = d.document_id AND er_d001.safir_field_id = 'D001'
JOIN extraction_results er_d002 ON er_d002.document_id = d.document_id AND er_d002.safir_field_id = 'D002'
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING invest_share > 0.25
ORDER BY invest_share DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le ratio d’investissement (DF011 / total dépenses) a le plus augmenté entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er_invest.value AS REAL)) / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(er_d001.value AS REAL) + CAST(er_d002.value AS REAL)),0) AS ratio
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er_invest ON er_invest.document_id = d.document_id AND er_invest.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  JOIN extraction_results er_d001 ON er_d001.document_id = d.document_id AND er_d001.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  JOIN extraction_results er_d002 ON er_d002.document_id = d.document_id AND er_d002.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT r2024.city_name,
       (r2024.ratio - r2023.ratio) AS ratio_increase
FROM ratios r2024
JOIN ratios r2023 ON r2023.city_name = r2024.city_name
WHERE r2024.document_year = '2024' AND r2023.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY ratio_increase DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le montant moyen des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) par page du document en 2024, classé par les 5 meilleures communes ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) / NULLIF(SUM(d.nb_pages),0) AS expense_per_page
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY expense_per_page DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents où le champ « Année » extrait diffère de l’année du document, par type de budget, en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH mismatches AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.budget_type,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Année' THEN er.value END) AS extracted_year
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.budget_type
)
SELECT budget_type,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN extracted_year <> '2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS mismatch_pct
FROM mismatches
GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents contenant au moins une erreur (message_error non vide) parmi ceux en état PARTIAL, par année ?
sql:
WITH doc_errors AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_error
  FROM documents d
  JOIN states s ON s.state_id = d.state_id
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year,
       100.0 * SUM(has_error) / COUNT(*) AS error_rate_pct
FROM doc_errors
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le total des dépenses pondéré par le nombre de pages, par année et type de budget ?
sql:
WITH expenses AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         d.budget_type,
         d.nb_pages,
         COALESCE(CAST(d1.value AS REAL),0) + COALESCE(CAST(d2.value AS REAL),0) AS total_expense
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
)
SELECT document_year,
       budget_type,
       SUM(total_expense * nb_pages) / NULLIF(SUM(nb_pages),0) AS weighted_expense_per_page
FROM expenses
GROUP BY document_year, budget_type
ORDER BY document_year, budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de Gini du montant d’investissement (DF011) parmi les communes en 2024, séparé pour le budget principal et annexes ?
sql:
WITH df AS (
  SELECT d.budget_type,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS invest,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.budget_type ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.budget_type) AS cnt,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) OVER (PARTITION BY d.budget_type) AS total_invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT budget_type,
       1 - (2.0 * SUM((cnt - rn + 0.5) * invest) / (cnt * total_invest)) AS gini_coefficient
FROM df
GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle est la variation du nombre moyen de champs SAFIR distincts par commune entre 2023 et 2024, et quelles communes affichent une variation supérieure à 20 % ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS distinct_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT y2023.city_name,
         y2023.distinct_cnt AS cnt_2023,
         y2024.distinct_cnt AS cnt_2024,
         (y2024.distinct_cnt - y2023.distinct_cnt) * 1.0 / NULLIF(y2023.distinct_cnt,0) AS variation
  FROM yearly y2023
  JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2024.city_name = y2023.city_name
  WHERE y2023.document_year = '2023' AND y2024.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT city_name,
       cnt_2023,
       cnt_2024,
       variation * 100.0 AS variation_pct
FROM pivot
WHERE ABS(variation) > 0.20
ORDER BY variation_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents en état ERROR mais contenant au moins un champ extrait avec un message d’avertissement non vide, par année ?
sql:
WITH error_docs AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.document_year
  FROM documents d
  JOIN states s ON s.state_id = d.state_id
  WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
),
doc_warn AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT er.document_id
  FROM extraction_results er
  WHERE er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> ''
)
SELECT ed.document_year,
       100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT ed.document_id) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM error_docs WHERE document_year = ed.document_year) AS pct_error_with_warning
FROM error_docs ed
JOIN doc_warn dw ON dw.document_id = ed.document_id
GROUP BY ed.document_year
ORDER BY ed.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le meilleur ratio cumulé d’investissement (DF011) sur 2023‑2024, pondéré par le total des dépenses ?
sql:
WITH agg AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(invest.value AS REAL)) AS sum_invest,
         SUM(CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL)) AS sum_expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results invest ON invest.document_id = d.document_id AND invest.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       sum_invest / NULLIF(sum_expenses,0) AS cumulative_invest_ratio
FROM agg
ORDER BY cumulative_invest_ratio DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents où le champ « Année » extrait correspond à l’année du document, mais où le champ « D001 » est absent ou vide, par type de budget en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH docs AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.budget_type,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Année' THEN er.value END) AS extracted_year,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN er.value END) AS d001_value
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.budget_type
)
SELECT budget_type,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN extracted_year = '2024' AND (d001_value IS NULL OR d001_value = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_missing_D001
FROM docs
GROUP BY budget_type
ORDER BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes qui ont le plus grand montant total d'investissement (champ DF011) pour l'année 2024 dans le budget principal ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_investment
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_investment DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent le plus bas total des dépenses de fonctionnement (champ D001) pour 2023 dans le budget principal ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_expenses
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_expenses ASC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un ratio d'investissement DF011 sur le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) supérieur à 30 % en 2024 pour le budget principal ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0)) AS investment_ratio
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND r.safir_field_id IN ('DF011','D001','D002')
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING investment_ratio > 0.30
ORDER BY investment_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents qui ont généré au moins une erreur d'extraction (message_error non vide) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results r
              WHERE r.document_id = d.document_id
                AND r.message_error IS NOT NULL
                AND TRIM(r.message_error) <> '');

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents du budget principal en 2024 contient au moins un champ DF011 ?
sql:
SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN has_df011 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_docs_with_df011
FROM (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_df011
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
