question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes dont le total des dépenses a augmenté le plus entre 2023 et 2024 dans le budget principal ?
sql:
WITH expenses AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_exp
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT e2024.city_name,
       (e2024.total_exp - e2023.total_exp) AS increase
FROM expenses e2024
JOIN expenses e2023 ON e2024.city_name = e2023.city_name
WHERE e2024.document_year = '2024'
  AND e2023.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY increase DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont le plus grand nombre de documents avec au moins une erreur d'extraction en 2024, classées par nombre de documents erronés ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS err_doc_count
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND r.message_error IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(r.message_error) <> ''
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY err_doc_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel sont les 3 champs SAFIR les plus souvent absents (valeur vide ou nulle) dans les documents du budget principal en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH total_docs AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS doc_cnt
  FROM documents
  WHERE document_year = '2024' AND budget_type = 'BP'
)
SELECT r.safir_field_id,
       COUNT(*) AS missing_count
FROM extraction_results r
JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND (r.value IS NULL OR TRIM(r.value) = '')
GROUP BY r.safir_field_id
ORDER BY missing_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le ratio du nombre de pages par document est le plus élevé parmi les documents du budget principal en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY avg_pages DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents du budget principal en 2024 qui contiennent à la fois un message d'erreur et un message d'avertissement non vide ?
sql:
SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN has_error = 1 AND has_warning = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_both
FROM (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(r.message_error) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_error,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(r.message_warning) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_warning
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
);

question_fr: Quelles communes ont le plus grand nombre de documents avec le champ « Année » dont la valeur ne correspond pas à l'année du document en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS mismatch_docs
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND r.safir_field_id = 'Année'
  AND r.value <> d.document_year
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY mismatch_docs DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage du total d'investissement DF011 en 2024 est concentré dans les 10 % des communes les plus investisseuses (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH commune_invest AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         total_invest,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_invest DESC) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
  FROM commune_invest
),
top10 AS (
  SELECT SUM(total_invest) AS top_invest
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn <= (cnt * 0.10)
)
SELECT 100.0 * (SELECT top_invest FROM top10) / (SELECT SUM(total_invest) FROM commune_invest) AS pct_top10_invest;

question_fr: Identifiez les communes dont le ratio d'investissement DF011 sur le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) dépasse de deux écarts‑types la moyenne nationale en 2024 (budget principal).
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
          NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0)) AS ratio
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id IN ('DF011','D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(ratio) AS avg_ratio,
         SQRT(AVG(ratio * ratio) - AVG(ratio) * AVG(ratio)) AS stddev
  FROM ratios
)
SELECT city_name, ratio
FROM ratios, stats
WHERE ratio > avg_ratio + 2 * stddev
ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque année (2023, 2024), quels sont les documents dont le nombre de champs SAFIR distincts représente plus de 150 % de la moyenne, indiquant une possible sur‑extraction ?
sql:
WITH doc_counts AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(DISTINCT r.safir_field_id) AS field_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
),
avg_counts AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         AVG(field_cnt) AS avg_cnt
  FROM doc_counts
  GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT dc.document_id,
       dc.document_year,
       dc.field_cnt
FROM doc_counts dc
JOIN avg_counts ac ON dc.document_year = ac.document_year
WHERE dc.field_cnt > ac.avg_cnt * 1.5
ORDER BY dc.document_year, dc.field_cnt DESC
LIMIT 6;

question_fr: Quel est le Gini coefficient du montant total d'investissement DF011 parmi les communes en 2024 (budget principal), et quelles sont les 5 communes les plus contributives selon ce critère ?
sql:
WITH invest AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS invest_total
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         invest_total,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY invest_total ASC) AS rn_asc,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY invest_total DESC) AS rn_desc,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS n
  FROM invest
),
 gini_val AS (
  SELECT 1 - 2.0 * SUM( (n - rn_asc + 0.5) * invest_total ) / (n * SUM(invest_total) ) AS gini
  FROM ordered
)
SELECT g.gini,
       o.city_name,
       o.invest_total
FROM ordered o
CROSS JOIN gini_val g
WHERE o.rn_desc <= 5
ORDER BY o.invest_total DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux d’erreur moyen par document (nombre de champs avec message_error non vide) pour les documents du budget principal en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 communes où ce taux dépasse 20 % ?
sql:
WITH doc_stats AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(r.message_error) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS err_cnt,
         COUNT(*) AS total_cnt,
         CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(r.message_error) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS err_rate
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name
),
city_avg AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         AVG(err_rate) AS avg_err_rate
  FROM doc_stats
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       avg_err_rate
FROM city_avg
WHERE avg_err_rate > 0.20
ORDER BY avg_err_rate DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Identifiez les communes où le nombre de documents avec un champ DF011 supérieur à 1 000 000 € représente plus de 30 % du total de leurs documents en 2024, suggérant une concentration d’investissements importants.
sql:
WITH docs_with_big_invest AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_id
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
    AND CAST(r.value AS REAL) > 1000000
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_id
),
doc_counts AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS total_docs
  FROM documents d
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
big_counts AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS big_docs
  FROM docs_with_big_invest
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT dc.city_name,
       (bc.big_docs * 100.0) / dc.total_docs AS pct_big_invest_docs
FROM doc_counts dc
JOIN big_counts bc ON dc.city_name = bc.city_name
WHERE (bc.big_docs * 100.0) / dc.total_docs > 30
ORDER BY pct_big_invest_docs DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de réussite des extractions pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.code='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.0/COUNT(*) AS success_rate
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été traités en 2023, ventilés par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents a connu une extraction en échec en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN s.code='ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*100.0/COUNT(*) AS pct_error
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de documents ont une extraction partielle en 2024, par format de fichier ?
sql:
SELECT d.format, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS nb_documents
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.format;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de documents sans extraction complète par masque pour 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.code <> 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.0/COUNT(*) AS incomplete_ratio
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Comment le taux de réussite des extractions a-t-il évolué de 2023 à 2024 selon le type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.code='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.0/COUNT(*) AS success_rate,
       d.document_year
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
GROUP BY d.budget_type, d.document_year
ORDER BY d.budget_type, d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents contenant au moins une erreur parmi les extractions réussies, par année ?
sql:
WITH success_runs AS (
  SELECT er.run_id, d.document_year
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
),
runs_with_error AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT sr.run_id, sr.document_year
  FROM success_runs sr
  JOIN extraction_results res ON res.run_id = sr.run_id
  WHERE res.message_error IS NOT NULL AND res.message_error <> ''
)
SELECT document_year,
       COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM success_runs WHERE document_year = sr.document_year) AS error_rate_pct
FROM runs_with_error sr
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen (en minutes) entre le dépôt du document et le lancement de l’extraction en 2024, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       AVG((julianday(er.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at))*24*60) AS avg_delay_minutes
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle proportion de documents de plus de 500 pages a une extraction partielle, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.code='PARTIAL' AND d.nb_pages >= 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.0/COUNT(*) AS proportion
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Comment se compare le taux de réussite des extractions entre le budget principal et le budget annexes en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.code='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)*1.0/COUNT(*) AS success_rate
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux d’extractions partielles selon le nombre de pages du document en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH runs AS (
  SELECT d.nb_pages,
         s.code AS state_code
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
),
 buckets AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN nb_pages < 200 THEN '<200'
           WHEN nb_pages BETWEEN 200 AND 400 THEN '200-400'
           ELSE '>400'
         END AS page_bucket,
         COUNT(*) AS total,
         SUM(CASE WHEN state_code='PARTIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partial_cnt
  FROM runs
  GROUP BY page_bucket
)
SELECT page_bucket,
       partial_cnt * 100.0 / total AS partial_rate_pct
FROM buckets;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre mensuel d’extractions réussies en 2024 avec la moyenne mobile sur 3 mois, par type de budget ?
sql:
WITH monthly AS (
  SELECT d.budget_type,
         strftime('%Y-%m', er.start_time) AS month,
         COUNT(*) AS success_cnt
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.code='SUCCESS'
  GROUP BY d.budget_type, month
),
 ordered AS (
  SELECT budget_type,
         month,
         success_cnt,
         AVG(success_cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY budget_type ORDER BY month ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS ma_3mois
  FROM monthly
)
SELECT budget_type, month, success_cnt, ma_3mois
FROM ordered
ORDER BY budget_type, month;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage d’évolution du total des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT y.year,
       y.total_d001,
       COALESCE(p.total_d001, 0) AS prev_total,
       CASE WHEN p.total_d001 = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE (y.total_d001 - p.total_d001) * 100.0 / p.total_d001 END AS pct_change
FROM yearly y
LEFT JOIN yearly p ON p.year = CAST(y.year AS INTEGER) - 1
ORDER BY y.year;

question_fr: Comment le nombre moyen de champs SAFIR distincts extraits par document a‑t‑il évolué entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH per_doc AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_fields
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
),
yearly AS (
  SELECT document_year AS year,
         AVG(nb_fields) AS avg_fields
  FROM per_doc
  GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT y.year, y.avg_fields
FROM yearly y
ORDER BY y.year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents présente une différence entre l’année extraite (champ « Année ») et l’année du document, par année ?
sql:
WITH doc_year AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Année' AND er.value <> '' THEN er.value END) AS extracted_year
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year AS year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_documents,
       SUM(CASE WHEN extracted_year IS NOT NULL AND extracted_year <> document_year THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mismatched,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN extracted_year IS NOT NULL AND extracted_year <> document_year THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pct_mismatch
FROM doc_year
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la variation en pourcentage du total des investissements (DF011) entre 2023 et 2024, ventilée par type de budget ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.budget_type,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_df011
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
)
SELECT y.year,
       y.budget_type,
       y.total_df011,
       p.total_df011 AS prev_total,
       CASE WHEN p.total_df011 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (y.total_df011 - p.total_df011) * 100.0 / p.total_df011 END AS pct_change
FROM yearly y
LEFT JOIN yearly p ON p.year = CAST(y.year AS INTEGER) - 1 AND p.budget_type = y.budget_type
ORDER BY y.year, y.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le montant moyen des dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) par page du document, par année ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001,
         SUM(d.nb_pages) AS total_pages
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT year,
       total_d001,
       total_pages,
       CASE WHEN total_pages = 0 THEN NULL ELSE total_d001 / total_pages END AS avg_d001_per_page
FROM totals
ORDER BY year;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une hausse supérieure à 20 % du ratio investissement (DF011) / dépenses totales (D001 + D002) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_df011,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_d_total
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
ratios AS (
  SELECT year,
         city_name,
         CASE WHEN sum_d_total = 0 THEN NULL ELSE sum_df011 / sum_d_total END AS ratio
  FROM yearly
)
SELECT cur.city_name,
       cur.ratio AS ratio_2024,
       prev.ratio AS ratio_2023,
       (cur.ratio - prev.ratio) * 100.0 / prev.ratio AS pct_change
FROM ratios cur
LEFT JOIN ratios prev ON prev.city_name = cur.city_name AND prev.year = '2023'
WHERE cur.year = '2024' AND prev.ratio IS NOT NULL AND (cur.ratio - prev.ratio) * 100.0 / prev.ratio > 20
ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents contenant au moins un avertissement (message_warning) par année et par type de budget ?
sql:
WITH warned AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         d.budget_type,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_warning
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year, d.budget_type
)
SELECT document_year AS year,
       budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(has_warning) AS docs_with_warning,
       (SUM(has_warning) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pct_warning
FROM warned
GROUP BY document_year, budget_type
ORDER BY document_year, budget_type;

question_fr: Comment le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) a‑t‑il évolué d’une année à l’autre, par type de budget, en pourcentage ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.budget_type,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
)
SELECT y.year,
       y.budget_type,
       y.total_expenses,
       p.total_expenses AS prev_total,
       CASE WHEN p.total_expenses = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (y.total_expenses - p.total_expenses) * 100.0 / p.total_expenses END AS pct_change
FROM yearly y
LEFT JOIN yearly p ON p.year = CAST(y.year AS INTEGER) - 1 AND p.budget_type = y.budget_type
ORDER BY y.year, y.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen D001 / (D001 + D002) par document, et comment a‑t‑il changé entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH doc_ratios AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS d001,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS d002
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
),
yearly AS (
  SELECT document_year AS year,
         AVG(CASE WHEN d001 + d002 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE d001 * 1.0 / (d001 + d002) END) AS avg_ratio
  FROM doc_ratios
  GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT y.year,
       y.avg_ratio,
       p.avg_ratio AS prev_avg,
       CASE WHEN p.avg_ratio IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE (y.avg_ratio - p.avg_ratio) * 100.0 / p.avg_ratio END AS pct_change
FROM yearly y
LEFT JOIN yearly p ON p.year = CAST(y.year AS INTEGER) - 1
ORDER BY y.year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le ratio DF011 / dépenses totales (D001 + D002) a le plus augmenté entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_df011,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
ratios AS (
  SELECT year,
         city_name,
         CASE WHEN sum_expenses = 0 THEN NULL ELSE sum_df011 / sum_expenses END AS ratio
  FROM yearly
)
SELECT cur.city_name,
       cur.ratio AS ratio_2024,
       prev.ratio AS ratio_2023,
       (cur.ratio - prev.ratio) * 100.0 / prev.ratio AS pct_change
FROM ratios cur
JOIN ratios prev ON prev.city_name = cur.city_name AND prev.year = '2023'
WHERE cur.year = '2024' AND prev.ratio IS NOT NULL AND cur.ratio IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_change DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Comment le nombre moyen de pages par document a‑t‑il évolué entre 2023 et 2024, selon le type de budget ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.budget_type,
         AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
  FROM documents d
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
)
SELECT y.year,
       y.budget_type,
       y.avg_pages,
       p.avg_pages AS prev_avg,
       CASE WHEN p.avg_pages IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE (y.avg_pages - p.avg_pages) * 100.0 / p.avg_pages END AS pct_change
FROM yearly y
LEFT JOIN yearly p ON p.year = CAST(y.year AS INTEGER) - 1 AND p.budget_type = y.budget_type
ORDER BY y.year, y.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents du budget principal comporte le champ d’investissement DF011, par année ?
sql:
WITH doc_has AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         d.budget_type,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_df011
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year, d.budget_type
)
SELECT document_year AS year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(has_df011) AS docs_with_df011,
       (SUM(has_df011) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS pct_with_df011
FROM doc_has
WHERE budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le total des dépenses (D001 + D002) pondéré par le nombre de pages, par année ?
sql:
WITH doc_exp AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         d.nb_pages,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year, d.nb_pages
)
SELECT document_year AS year,
       SUM(expenses * nb_pages) AS weighted_expenses
FROM doc_exp
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses de fonctionnement (D001) augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_d001
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT y2024.city_name,
         y2024.total_d001 AS d2024,
         y2023.total_d001 AS d2023
  FROM yearly y2024
  LEFT JOIN yearly y2023 ON y2023.city_name = y2024.city_name AND y2023.year = '2023'
  WHERE y2024.year = '2024' AND y2023.total_d001 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT city_name,
       d2023,
       d2024,
       (d2024 - d2023) * 100.0 / d2023 AS pct_change
FROM pivot
WHERE (d2024 - d2023) * 100.0 / d2023 > 20
ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent une hausse de plus de 30 % du ratio DF011 / (D001 + D002) entre 2023 et 2024 tout en dépassant la dépense moyenne nationale en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_df011,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
ratios AS (
  SELECT year,
         city_name,
         CASE WHEN sum_expenses = 0 THEN NULL ELSE sum_df011 / sum_expenses END AS ratio,
         sum_expenses
  FROM yearly
),
avg_exp_2024 AS (
  SELECT AVG(sum_expenses) AS avg_exp
  FROM ratios
  WHERE year = '2024'
)
SELECT cur.city_name,
       cur.ratio AS ratio_2024,
       prev.ratio AS ratio_2023,
       (cur.ratio - prev.ratio) * 100.0 / prev.ratio AS pct_change,
       cur.sum_expenses
FROM ratios cur
JOIN ratios prev ON prev.city_name = cur.city_name AND prev.year = '2023'
CROSS JOIN avg_exp_2024 a
WHERE cur.year = '2024'
  AND prev.ratio IS NOT NULL
  AND cur.ratio IS NOT NULL
  AND (cur.ratio - prev.ratio) * 100.0 / prev.ratio > 30
  AND cur.sum_expenses > a.avg_exp
ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

question_fr: Comment le coefficient de Gini du montant d’investissement DF011 a‑t‑il évolué entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS df011
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT year,
         df011,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY year ORDER BY df011) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY year) AS cnt,
         SUM(df011) OVER (PARTITION BY year) AS total
  FROM yearly
)
SELECT year,
       (1 - (2.0 / (cnt - 1)) * (cnt - (SUM(rn * df011) / total))) AS gini
FROM ranked
GROUP BY year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses totales (D001 + D002) chuter de plus de 25 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_exp
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
joined AS (
  SELECT cur.city_name,
         cur.total_exp AS exp_2024,
         prev.total_exp AS exp_2023,
         (cur.total_exp - prev.total_exp) * 100.0 / prev.total_exp AS pct_change
  FROM yearly cur
  JOIN yearly prev ON prev.city_name = cur.city_name AND prev.year = '2023'
  WHERE cur.year = '2024' AND prev.total_exp > 0
)
SELECT city_name,
       exp_2023,
       exp_2024,
       pct_change
FROM joined
WHERE pct_change < -25
ORDER BY pct_change ASC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux moyen d’erreurs (message_error) par document et comment a‑t‑il évolué entre 2023 et 2024 ? (Indiquer les années où il dépasse 15 %)
sql:
WITH doc_errors AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '' THEN 1 END) AS err_count,
         COUNT(*) AS total_fields
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
),
yearly AS (
  SELECT document_year AS year,
         AVG(CASE WHEN total_fields = 0 THEN 0 ELSE err_count * 1.0 / total_fields END) AS avg_error_rate
  FROM doc_errors
  GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT year,
       avg_error_rate,
       CASE WHEN avg_error_rate > 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS exceeds_15pct
FROM yearly
ORDER BY year;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen DF011 / (D001 + D002) par commune et quelles communes ont vu ce ratio plus que doubler entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_df011,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND er.value <> '' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
ratios AS (
  SELECT year,
         city_name,
         CASE WHEN sum_expenses = 0 THEN NULL ELSE sum_df011 / sum_expenses END AS ratio
  FROM yearly
)
SELECT cur.city_name,
       prev.ratio AS ratio_2023,
       cur.ratio AS ratio_2024,
       (cur.ratio / prev.ratio) AS multiple
FROM ratios cur
JOIN ratios prev ON prev.city_name = cur.city_name AND prev.year = '2023'
WHERE cur.year = '2024' AND prev.ratio IS NOT NULL AND cur.ratio IS NOT NULL AND (cur.ratio / prev.ratio) > 2
ORDER BY multiple DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents dont l'extraction a échoué en 2024 ?

SELECT AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.code = 'ERROR';

question_fr: Comment les états d'extraction (SUCCESS, PARTIAL, ERROR) se répartissent‑ils pour le masque M57_CA en 2024 ?

FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.mask = 'M57_CA'

question_fr: Combien de champs sont extraits en moyenne par document pour le masque M57_CFU en 2024 ?

FROM (
    SELECT d.document_id, COUNT(er.result_id) AS cnt
    FROM documents d
    LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.mask = 'M57_CFU'

question_fr: Quelle proportion de documents de plus de 500 pages sont en extraction partielle, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'PARTIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS pct_partial
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.nb_pages > 500
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen (en minutes) entre le dépôt du document et le lancement de l'extraction pour le budget principal en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT AVG((julianday(r.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)) * 24 * 60) AS avg_delay_minutes
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP';

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition en pourcentage des états d'extraction (SUCCESS, PARTIAL, ERROR) pour l'année 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT s.code,
       (COUNT(*) * 100.0) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents d2 WHERE d2.document_year = '2023') AS pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
GROUP BY s.code;

question_fr: Comment le nombre moyen de pages par document a‑t‑il évolué entre 2023 et 2024, par type de budget, en pourcentage ?
sql:
SELECT a.budget_type,
       ((b.avg_pages - a.avg_pages) / a.avg_pages) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM (
    SELECT budget_type, AVG(nb_pages) AS avg_pages
    FROM documents
    WHERE document_year = '2023'
    GROUP BY budget_type
) a
JOIN (
    SELECT budget_type, AVG(nb_pages) AS avg_pages
    FROM documents
    WHERE document_year = '2024'
    GROUP BY budget_type
) b ON a.budget_type = b.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents en extraction partielle sans aucun avertissement, par masque, en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'PARTIAL' AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
            WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id
              AND er.message_warning IS NOT NULL
              AND er.message_warning <> ''
        ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS pct_partial_no_warning
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un taux d'extraction partielle supérieur à la moyenne nationale de deux écarts‑types en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH city_stats AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'PARTIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS partial_rate
    FROM documents d
    JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
), agg AS (
    SELECT AVG(partial_rate) AS mean_rate,
           (AVG(partial_rate * partial_rate) - AVG(partial_rate) * AVG(partial_rate)) AS var_rate
    FROM city_stats
), thresholds AS (
    SELECT mean_rate,
           sqrt(var_rate) * 2 AS sd2
    FROM agg
)
SELECT c.city_name, c.partial_rate
FROM city_stats c, thresholds t
WHERE c.partial_rate > t.mean_rate + t.sd2
ORDER BY c.partial_rate DESC;

question_fr: Quelle année a le taux d'erreur moyen par champ le plus élevé ?
sql:
WITH field_counts AS (
    SELECT d.document_year,
           er.safir_field_id,
           COUNT(*) AS total_extractions
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.document_year, er.safir_field_id
), error_counts AS (
    SELECT d.document_year,
           er.safir_field_id,
           COUNT(*) AS error_extractions
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> ''
    GROUP BY d.document_year, er.safir_field_id
)
SELECT fc.document_year,
       SUM(COALESCE(ec.error_extractions, 0)) * 1.0 / SUM(fc.total_extractions) AS error_rate
FROM field_counts fc
LEFT JOIN error_counts ec ON fc.document_year = ec.document_year AND fc.safir_field_id = ec.safir_field_id
GROUP BY fc.document_year
ORDER BY error_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio du délai moyen d'extraction en échec sur le délai moyen de succès, par masque, pour 2024 ?
sql:
WITH delays AS (
    SELECT d.mask,
           s_run.code AS run_state,
           AVG((julianday(r.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)) * 24 * 60) AS avg_delay
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_runs r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
    JOIN states s_run ON r.state_id = s_run.state_id
    GROUP BY d.mask, s_run.code
)
SELECT e.mask,
       (e.avg_delay / s.avg_delay) AS failure_to_success_ratio
FROM delays e
JOIN delays s ON e.mask = s.mask
WHERE e.run_state = 'ERROR' AND s.run_state = 'SUCCESS';

question_fr: Quelle année présente le pourcentage le plus élevé de documents avec au moins un avertissement mais aucun message d'erreur ?
sql:
WITH doc_flags AS (
    SELECT d.document_id,
           d.document_year,
           MAX(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_warning,
           MAX(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_error
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN has_warning = 1 AND has_error = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS pct_warning_no_error
FROM doc_flags
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY pct_warning_no_error DESC
LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Combien d'extractions ont abouti à un état SUCCESS par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_success_runs
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages par format de document ?
sql:
SELECT format,
       ROUND(AVG(nb_pages), 2) AS avg_pages
FROM documents
GROUP BY format;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR différents ont été extraits chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_fields
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio total des investissements DF011 sur les dépenses totales (D001 + D002) par commune en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND(
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END), 0),
         4) AS investment_ratio
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY investment_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes qui ont totalisé le plus d'investissements DF011 en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND(SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)), 2) AS total_df011
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_df011 DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage d’évolution du total des dépenses de fonctionnement D001 d’une année à l’autre, ventilé par type de budget ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         d.budget_type,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
)
SELECT y1.budget_type,
       y1.document_year AS year,
       y1.total_d001,
       ROUND((y1.total_d001 - COALESCE(y0.total_d001, 0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(y0.total_d001, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS pct_change
FROM yearly y1
LEFT JOIN yearly y0
  ON y1.budget_type = y0.budget_type
 AND y0.document_year = CAST(y1.document_year AS INTEGER) - 1
ORDER BY y1.budget_type, y1.document_year;

question_fr: Comment les états d’extraction (SUCCESS, PARTIAL, ERROR) se répartissent‑ils pour le masque M57_CA en 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       s.code AS state_code,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_documents
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
GROUP BY d.document_year, s.code
ORDER BY d.document_year, s.code;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen d’erreurs d’extraction (message_error non vide) par document selon le format du fichier ?
sql:
SELECT d.format,
       ROUND(AVG(err_cnt), 2) AS avg_errors_per_doc
FROM (
   SELECT er.document_id,
          COUNT(*) AS err_cnt
   FROM extraction_results er
   WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> ''
   GROUP BY er.document_id
) e
JOIN documents d ON e.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.format
ORDER BY d.format;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents de 2024 présente une différence entre l’année extraite (champ « Année ») et l’année du document ?
sql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.value <> d.document_year THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_mismatch
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'Année';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre médian de pages des documents dont l’extraction a réussi ?
sql:
WITH success_docs AS (
  SELECT d.nb_pages,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY d.nb_pages) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
)
SELECT AVG(nb_pages) AS median_pages
FROM success_docs
WHERE rn IN ((total_cnt + 1) / 2, (total_cnt + 2) / 2);

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un ratio investissement DF011 / dépenses totales (D001 + D002) supérieur à 20 % en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND(
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END), 0),
         4) AS investment_ratio
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END), 0)) > 0.2
ORDER BY investment_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs investissements DF011 augmenter de plus de 30 % entre 2023 et 2024, tout en enregistrant une hausse des dépenses totales supérieure à 10 % ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS df011,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS expenses
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT s2023.city_name,
         s2023.df011 AS df011_2023,
         s2023.expenses AS exp_2023,
         s2024.df011 AS df011_2024,
         s2024.expenses AS exp_2024
  FROM sums s2023
  JOIN sums s2024 ON s2023.city_name = s2024.city_name
  WHERE s2023.document_year = '2023' AND s2024.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT city_name,
       ROUND((df011_2024 - df011_2023) / NULLIF(df011_2023, 0) * 100, 2) AS pct_df011_growth,
       ROUND((exp_2024 - exp_2023) / NULLIF(exp_2023, 0) * 100, 2) AS pct_exp_growth
FROM pivot
WHERE df011_2023 > 0
  AND ((df011_2024 - df011_2023) / df011_2023) * 100 > 30
  AND ((exp_2024 - exp_2023) / exp_2023) * 100 > 10
ORDER BY pct_df011_growth DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de Gini des investissements DF011 parmi les communes en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH df AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df011
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT df011,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY df011) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS n,
         SUM(df011) OVER () AS total
  FROM df
)
SELECT ROUND(1 - 2 * SUM((n - rn + 0.5) * df011) / (n * total), 4) AS gini_df011
FROM ordered;

question_fr: Quelle part du total national des investissements DF011 chaque commune représente‑t‑elle en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 premières ?
sql:
WITH total AS (
  SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS national_total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
),
municipal AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS muni_total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT m.city_name,
       ROUND(m.muni_total / t.national_total * 100, 2) AS pct_of_national_df011
FROM municipal m, total t
ORDER BY pct_of_national_df011 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen, en minutes, entre la création du document et le lancement de l’extraction réussie, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(AVG((julianday(er.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)) * 24 * 60), 2) AS avg_delay_minutes
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Combien de règles d'extraction sont définies par masque ?
sql:
SELECT fr.mask,
       COUNT(*) AS extraction_rule_count
FROM field_rules AS fr
GROUP BY fr.mask
ORDER BY extraction_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de règles de validation associées à chaque masque ?
sql:
SELECT vr.mask,
       COUNT(*) AS validation_rule_count
FROM validation_rules AS vr
GROUP BY vr.mask
ORDER BY validation_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des masques possède au moins une règle d'extraction ?
Combien de règles d'extraction sont rattachées à chaque ruleset ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       COUNT(*) AS extraction_rule_count
FROM field_rules fr
JOIN rulesets r ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
ORDER BY extraction_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Combien de règles de validation sont associées à chaque ruleset ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       COUNT(*) AS validation_rule_count
FROM validation_rules vr
JOIN rulesets r ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
ORDER BY validation_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de règles d'extraction par masque pour chaque ruleset ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       AVG(mask_rule_cnt) AS avg_extraction_rules_per_mask
FROM (
    SELECT fr.ruleset_id,
           fr.mask,
           COUNT(*) AS mask_rule_cnt
    FROM field_rules fr
    GROUP BY fr.ruleset_id, fr.mask
) sub
JOIN rulesets r ON sub.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
ORDER BY avg_extraction_rules_per_mask DESC;

question_fr: Quels rulesets comportent plus de 20 règles d'extraction ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       COUNT(*) AS extraction_rule_count
FROM field_rules fr
JOIN rulesets r ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
HAVING COUNT(*) > 20
ORDER BY extraction_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Combien de rulesets différents définissent des règles d'extraction pour chaque masque ?
sql:
SELECT fr.mask,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fr.ruleset_id) AS distinct_rulesets
FROM field_rules fr
GROUP BY fr.mask
ORDER BY distinct_rulesets DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le niveau de contrôle (densité) pour chaque ruleset, calculé comme le nombre total de règles (extraction + validation) divisé par le nombre de masques couverts ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       (COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) + COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id)) * 1.0 /
       NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(fr.mask, vr.mask)),0) AS control_density
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
ORDER BY control_density DESC;

question_fr: Quels masques présentent moins de cinq règles d'extraction, indiquant un risque de couverture insuffisante ?
sql:
SELECT mask,
       COUNT(*) AS extraction_rule_count
FROM field_rules
GROUP BY mask
HAVING COUNT(*) < 5
ORDER BY extraction_rule_count ASC;

question_fr: Pour chaque ruleset, combien de règles de validation sont de type « ALERTE » ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       COUNT(*) AS alerte_validation_count
FROM validation_rules vr
JOIN rulesets r ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE vr.level_of_problem = 'ALERTE'
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
ORDER BY alerte_validation_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de couverture d'extraction par masque, calculé comme le nombre de règles d'extraction divisé par le nombre de champs SAFIR réellement extraits ?
sql:
WITH mask_extraction AS (
    SELECT d.mask,
           COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS distinct_fields_extracted
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.mask
),
mask_rules AS (
    SELECT mask,
           COUNT(*) AS extraction_rule_count
    FROM field_rules
    GROUP BY mask
)
SELECT mr.mask,
       (mr.extraction_rule_count * 1.0) / NULLIF(me.distinct_fields_extracted,0) AS coverage_ratio
FROM mask_rules mr
LEFT JOIN mask_extraction me ON mr.mask = me.mask
ORDER BY coverage_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quels rulesets ont un nombre de règles de validation supérieur de plus de 50 % au nombre de leurs règles d'extraction ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS validation_count,
       COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS extraction_count,
       (COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) * 1.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id),0) AS validation_over_extraction_ratio
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
HAVING (COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) * 1.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id),0) > 1.5
ORDER BY validation_over_extraction_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quelle est la moyenne de règles de validation par ruleset, et quels masques dépassent une moyenne de 2 ?
sql:
SELECT vr.mask,
       AVG(vr_cnt) AS avg_validation_per_ruleset
FROM (
    SELECT mask, ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS vr_cnt
    FROM validation_rules
    GROUP BY mask, ruleset_id
) vr
GROUP BY vr.mask
HAVING AVG(vr_cnt) > 2
ORDER BY avg_validation_per_ruleset DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de règles de validation qui ciblent plusieurs champs SAFIR (liste contenant une virgule) pour chaque ruleset ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       COUNT(*) AS total_validation_rules,
       SUM(CASE WHEN vr.safir_field_id_list LIKE '%,%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS multi_field_rules,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN vr.safir_field_id_list LIKE '%,%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0) / COUNT(*) AS multi_field_ratio
FROM validation_rules vr
JOIN rulesets r ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
ORDER BY multi_field_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 rulesets contenant le plus grand nombre total de règles (extraction + validation) ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       r.description,
       (COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) + COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id)) AS total_rules
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, r.description
ORDER BY total_rules DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le taux d’erreurs (état ERROR) des documents par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_docs,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents présente à la fois un message d’erreur et un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' AND d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_both
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents distincts possèdent au moins un résultat d’extraction avec un message d’erreur non vide ?
Quel est le nombre moyen de champs extraits par document pour le masque M57_CA en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(cnt) AS avg_fields_per_doc
FROM (
    SELECT d.document_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA' AND d.document_year = '2023'
    GROUP BY d.document_id
);

question_fr: Comment évolue le taux d’erreurs selon le masque et l’année ? (2023 vs 2024)
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de champs SAFIR montre au moins un avertissement, parmi les documents de budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT er.safir_field_id,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS warning_pct
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY er.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents dont l’extraction a abouti à un état PARTIAL et qui contiennent un avertissement ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL' AND d.warning_message <> '';

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents rejetés (REJECTED) par masque pour l’année 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS rejected_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne d’avertissements (présence d’un message) par document selon l’état, pour les documents de plus de 300 pages ?
sql:
SELECT s.code,
       AVG(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_warning_flag
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.nb_pages > 300
GROUP BY s.code;

question_fr: Quelles sont les trois combinaisons masque/année où le ratio d’avertissements sur le total des résultats d’extraction est le plus élevé ?
sql:
WITH warnings AS (
    SELECT d.mask,
           d.document_year,
           COUNT(*) AS total,
           SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning_cnt
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year
)
SELECT mask,
       document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * warning_cnt / total, 2) AS warning_ratio_pct
FROM warnings
ORDER BY warning_ratio_pct DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de budget, quel est l’écart moyen entre le nombre de champs avec message d’erreur et le nombre de champs sans erreur ? (Quel budget montre la plus grande différence ?)
sql:
WITH doc_counts AS (
    SELECT d.document_id,
           d.budget_type,
           SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS err_cnt,
           COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.document_id, d.budget_type
), agg AS (
    SELECT budget_type,
           AVG(err_cnt) AS avg_err_per_doc,
           AVG(CASE WHEN err_cnt = 0 THEN total_cnt ELSE 0 END) AS avg_noerr_per_doc
    FROM doc_counts
    GROUP BY budget_type
)
SELECT budget_type,
       (avg_err_per_doc - avg_noerr_per_doc) AS diff
FROM agg
ORDER BY diff DESC
LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent plus de 50 % d’avertissements parmi leurs résultats d’extraction et dont le document n’est pas en état SUCCESS ? (Indiquer le pourcentage d’avertissements.)
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS warning_pct
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code <> 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING (SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) > 0.5;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen (en jours) entre la création du document et le lancement de l’extraction pour les extractions PARTIAL contenant un avertissement, par masque ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       ROUND(AVG(julianday(er.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)), 2) AS avg_days_delay
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL' AND d.warning_message <> ''
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs SAFIR extraits par document en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(field_count) AS avg_fields_per_doc
FROM (
    SELECT d.document_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS field_count
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    GROUP BY d.document_id
);

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents de type budget BP ont au moins une valeur extraite pour le champ « D001 » en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS pct_docs_with_D001
FROM documents d
LEFT JOIN extraction_results er
    ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP';

question_fr: Combien de documents de 2024 ne contiennent aucun résultat d'extraction ?
Quel est le nombre moyen de champs SAFIR extraits par document pour chaque masque ?
sql:
SELECT mask, AVG(field_count) AS avg_fields_per_doc
FROM (
    SELECT d.document_id, d.mask, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS field_count
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.document_id
) t
GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents où le champ « Année » est vide ou manquant, par année budgétaire ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.value IS NULL OR er.value = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS pct_missing_annee
FROM documents d
LEFT JOIN extraction_results er
    ON er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.safir_field_id = 'Année'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de couverture des champs SAFIR (nombre de champs extraits / nombre de champs définis) par année et par masque ?
sql:
WITH defined AS (
    SELECT mask, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS total_defined
    FROM field_rules
    GROUP BY mask
),
extracted AS (
    SELECT d.mask, d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS total_extracted
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year
)
SELECT e.document_year, e.mask,
       100.0 * e.total_extracted / d.total_defined AS coverage_percent
FROM extracted e
JOIN defined d ON e.mask = d.mask
ORDER BY e.document_year, e.mask;

question_fr: Quels champs SAFIR n’ont jamais été extraits dans aucun document ?
sql:
SELECT fr.safir_field_id
FROM field_rules fr
LEFT JOIN extraction_results er
    ON fr.safir_field_id = er.safir_field_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id IS NULL
GROUP BY fr.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quelle est la moyenne et l’écart‑type du nombre de résultats d’extraction par document ?
sql:
WITH doc_counts AS (
    SELECT d.document_id, d.mask, COUNT(*) AS result_cnt
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.document_id
)
SELECT mask,
       AVG(result_cnt) AS avg_results_per_doc,
       sqrt(AVG(result_cnt * result_cnt) - AVG(result_cnt) * AVG(result_cnt)) AS stddev_results_per_doc
FROM doc_counts
GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Pour chaque année, combien de champs SAFIR différents ont au moins une erreur d’extraction (message_error non vide) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS fields_with_error
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Pour chaque ville et chaque année, calculer un indice de couverture = (nombre de champs SAFIR avec valeur non vide) / (nombre total de champs définis pour le masque de la ville). Identifier les villes dont l’indice est inférieur à 0,5 pour au moins une année.
sql:
WITH defined AS (
    SELECT mask, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS total_defined
    FROM field_rules
    GROUP BY mask
),
city_year AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           d.document_year,
           d.mask,
           COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS covered_fields
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er
        ON er.document_id = d.document_id
        AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> ''
    GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year, d.mask
)
SELECT cy.city_name,
       cy.document_year,
       1.0 * cy.covered_fields / d.total_defined AS coverage_index
FROM city_year cy
JOIN defined d ON cy.mask = d.mask
WHERE 1.0 * cy.covered_fields / d.total_defined < 0.5
ORDER BY cy.city_name, cy.document_year;

question_fr: Identifier les champs SAFIR dont la couverture (pourcentage de documents avec valeur non vide) a chuté de plus de 20 % d’une année à l’autre entre 2023 et 2024.
sql:
WITH docs_per_year AS (
    SELECT document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS total_docs
    FROM documents
    WHERE document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY document_year
),
field_coverage AS (
    SELECT er.safir_field_id,
           d.document_year,
           COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_value
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
      AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> ''
    GROUP BY er.safir_field_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT f2024.safir_field_id,
       100.0 * f2024.docs_with_value / d2024.total_docs AS pct_2024,
       100.0 * f2023.docs_with_value / d2023.total_docs AS pct_2023,
       (100.0 * f2024.docs_with_value / d2024.total_docs) -
       (100.0 * f2023.docs_with_value / d2023.total_docs) AS drop_pct
FROM field_coverage f2024
JOIN field_coverage f2023
    ON f2024.safir_field_id = f2023.safir_field_id
    AND f2024.document_year = '2024' AND f2023.document_year = '2023'
JOIN docs_per_year d2024 ON d2024.document_year = '2024'
JOIN docs_per_year d2023 ON d2023.document_year = '2023'
WHERE (100.0 * f2023.docs_with_value / d2023.total_docs) -
      (100.0 * f2024.docs_with_value / d2024.total_docs) > 20
ORDER BY drop_pct DESC;

question_fr: Calculer un score de complétude pondéré par document : chaque champ défini pour le masque du document vaut 1/N, où N est le nombre total de champs définis pour ce masque. Le score d’un document est la somme des poids des champs réellement extraits avec valeur non vide. Donner la moyenne de ce score par type de budget et par année.
sql:
WITH defined_counts AS (
    SELECT mask, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS total_defined
    FROM field_rules
    GROUP BY mask
),
doc_scores AS (
    SELECT d.document_id,
           d.budget_type,
           d.document_year,
           dc.total_defined,
           SUM(1.0 / dc.total_defined) AS completeness_score
    FROM documents d
    JOIN defined_counts dc ON d.mask = dc.mask
    JOIN extraction_results er
        ON er.document_id = d.document_id
        AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> ''
    GROUP BY d.document_id
)
SELECT document_year,
       budget_type,
       AVG(completeness_score) AS avg_completeness_score
FROM doc_scores
GROUP BY document_year, budget_type
ORDER BY document_year, budget_type;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 communes qui ont le montant total d'investissement (champ DF011) le plus élevé en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,

question_fr: Quelle est la part de l'investissement DF011 par rapport aux dépenses totales (D001 + D002) pour chaque commune en 2024 sous le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
SELECT city_name,
       investment_share
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END),0) AS investment_share
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
) 
WHERE investment_share IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY investment_share DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le montant moyen des dépenses totales (D001 + D002) parmi toutes les communes en 2023 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(total_expenses) AS avg_total_expenses
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS total_expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
);

question_fr: Combien de communes affichent un investissement DF011 supérieur à 15 % des dépenses totales en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_municipalities
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
  HAVING expenses > 0 AND invest / expenses > 0.15
);

question_fr: Quelles communes voient leur investissement DF011 augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024, tout en voyant leurs dépenses totales croître de plus de 10 % (budget principal) ?
sql:
SELECT city_name
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest_2023,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest_2024,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS exp_2023,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS exp_2024
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
) 
WHERE exp_2023 > 0 AND exp_2024 > 0
  AND (invest_2024 - invest_2023) / invest_2023 > 0.20
  AND (exp_2024 - exp_2023) / exp_2023 > 0.10;

question_fr: Quelles communes représentent plus de 25 % de l'investissement DF011 national en 2024 sous le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT city_name,
       invest / national_total AS share
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS invest,
         (SELECT SUM(CAST(r2.value AS REAL))
          FROM documents d2
          JOIN extraction_results r2 ON d2.document_id = r2.document_id
          WHERE d2.document_year = '2024' AND d2.budget_type = 'BP' AND r2.safir_field_id = 'DF011') AS national_total
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
) 
WHERE share > 0.25
ORDER BY share DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de communes a un investissement DF011 inférieur à 5 % des dépenses totales en 2023 sous le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN expenses > 0 AND invest / expenses < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*),2) AS percent_munis_low_invest
FROM muni;

question_fr: Quelles sont les trois communes affichant la plus forte croissance de l'investissement DF011 entre 2023 et 2024, toutes catégories de budget confondues ?
sql:
SELECT city_name,
       (invest_2024 - invest_2023) / NULLIF(invest_2023,0) * 100.0 AS growth_percent
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest_2023,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest_2024
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
) 
WHERE invest_2023 > 0
ORDER BY growth_percent DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Dans quels cas l'investissement DF011 est‑il absent alors que les dépenses totales sont présentes (2023‑2024) ? Indiquez la commune, l'année et le type de budget.
sql:
SELECT city_name, document_year, budget_type
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         d.budget_type,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND TRIM(r.value) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS df011_present,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year, d.budget_type
) 
WHERE df011_present = 0 AND expenses > 0;

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur médiane de l'investissement DF011 parmi les communes en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT invest,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY invest) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
  FROM muni
)
SELECT AVG(invest) AS median_invest
FROM ordered
WHERE rn IN ((cnt+1)/2 , (cnt+2)/2);

question_fr: Quelle est la différence moyenne entre l'investissement DF011 et les dépenses totales (D001 + D002) par commune en 2024 sous le budget annexaire (BA) ?

  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
);

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent un ratio investissement / dépenses qui s'écarte de plus de 2 écarts‑type par rapport à la moyenne nationale en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH shares AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END),0) AS share
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
  HAVING share IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(share) AS mean_share,
         SQRT(AVG(share * share) - AVG(share) * AVG(share)) AS stddev_share
  FROM shares
)
SELECT s.city_name, s.share
FROM shares s, stats st
WHERE ABS(s.share - st.mean_share) > 2 * st.stddev_share
ORDER BY s.share DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur investissement DF011 diminuer de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT city_name,
       (invest_2024 - invest_2023) / NULLIF(invest_2023,0) * 100.0 AS change_percent
FROM (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest_2023,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest_2024
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
) 
WHERE invest_2023 > 0
  AND (invest_2024 - invest_2023) / invest_2023 * 100.0 < -10
ORDER BY change_percent ASC;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de concentration (CR4) de l'investissement DF011 en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH muni AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
total AS (SELECT SUM(invest) AS total_invest FROM muni),
top4 AS (
  SELECT SUM(invest) AS top4_invest
  FROM muni
  ORDER BY invest DESC
  LIMIT 4
)
SELECT top4.top4_invest / total.total_invest AS cr4_ratio
FROM top4, total;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un ratio investissement / dépenses exceptionnellement élevé (plus de 3 écarts‑type au-dessus de la moyenne) en 2024 sous le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END),0) AS ratio
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
  HAVING ratio IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(ratio) AS mean_ratio,
         SQRT(AVG(ratio * ratio) - AVG(ratio) * AVG(ratio)) AS stddev_ratio
  FROM ratios
)
SELECT r.city_name, r.ratio
FROM ratios r, stats s
WHERE r.ratio > s.mean_ratio + 3 * s.stddev_ratio
ORDER BY r.ratio DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quelle est la moyenne pondérée de l'investissement DF011 (pondérée par les dépenses) sur 2023‑2024, et quelles communes dépassent 20 % de la moyenne nationale pondérée ?
sql:
WITH doc_stats AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    AND r.safir_field_id IN ('DF011','D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.document_id
),
muni_weighted AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         SUM(invest * expenses) / NULLIF(SUM(expenses),0) AS weighted_avg
  FROM doc_stats
  GROUP BY city_name
),
national AS (
  SELECT SUM(invest * expenses) / NULLIF(SUM(expenses),0) AS national_weighted_avg
  FROM doc_stats
)
SELECT m.city_name, m.weighted_avg, n.national_weighted_avg
FROM muni_weighted m, national n
WHERE m.weighted_avg > 0.20 * n.national_weighted_avg
ORDER BY m.weighted_avg DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus faible total de dépenses (D001 + D002) en 2023 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
