question_fr: Quelles sont les 3 communes qui ont connu la plus forte hausse de l'investissement DF011 entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH invest AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT i2024.city_name,
       i2024.invest AS invest_2024,
       i2023.invest AS invest_2023,
       (i2024.invest - i2023.invest) / NULLIF(i2023.invest,0) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM invest i2024
JOIN invest i2023 ON i2024.city_name = i2023.city_name
WHERE i2024.document_year = '2024' AND i2023.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY pct_change DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 documents où le pourcentage d'avertissements (message_warning) dépasse 30 % du nombre total de résultats d'extraction ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       d.document_id,
       COUNT(r.result_id) AS total_results,
       SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND r.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning_count,
       (SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND r.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(r.result_id) AS warning_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name
HAVING warning_pct > 30
ORDER BY warning_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent un ratio investissement / dépenses qui s'écarte de plus de 2 écarts‑type de la moyenne nationale en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH metrics AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id IN ('DF011','D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
ratios AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         CASE WHEN expenses = 0 THEN NULL ELSE invest / expenses END AS ratio
  FROM metrics
),
stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(ratio) AS avg_ratio,
         SQRT(AVG(ratio * ratio) - AVG(ratio) * AVG(ratio)) AS stddev_ratio
  FROM ratios
  WHERE ratio IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT r.city_name,
       r.ratio,
       s.avg_ratio,
       s.stddev_ratio
FROM ratios r, stats s
WHERE r.ratio IS NOT NULL
  AND (r.ratio > s.avg_ratio + 2 * s.stddev_ratio
       OR r.ratio < s.avg_ratio - 2 * s.stddev_ratio)
ORDER BY ABS(r.ratio - s.avg_ratio) DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 documents où plus de 5 % des résultats d'extraction contiennent un message d'erreur en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH doc_counts AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_id,
         COUNT(r.result_id) AS total_results,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_count
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       document_id,
       total_results,
       error_count,
       (error_count * 100.0) / total_results AS error_pct
FROM doc_counts
WHERE (error_count * 100.0) / total_results > 5
ORDER BY error_pct DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs extraits par document pour chaque commune en 2023 ?
sql:
WITH doc_field_counts AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT r.safir_field_id) AS field_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       AVG(field_cnt) AS avg_fields_per_doc
FROM doc_field_counts
GROUP BY city_name
ORDER BY avg_fields_per_doc ASC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents possède au moins une erreur d'extraction (message_error) pour chaque commune en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH doc_error AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_error
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       SUM(has_error) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS error_doc_pct
FROM doc_error
GROUP BY city_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY error_doc_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents dont l'extraction a été partiellement réussie (état PARTIAL) ?

FROM documents d

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où l'investissement DF011 par page est le plus élevé en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:

       SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) / NULLIF(AVG(d.nb_pages),0) AS invest_per_page

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses totales (D001 + D002) augmenter de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024, alors que leur investissement DF011 n'a augmenté que de moins de 5 % (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH expenses AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS exp
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
invest AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS inv
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
combined AS (
  SELECT e.city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN e.document_year = '2023' THEN e.exp END) AS exp_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN e.document_year = '2024' THEN e.exp END) AS exp_2024,
         MAX(CASE WHEN i.document_year = '2023' THEN i.inv END) AS inv_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN i.document_year = '2024' THEN i.inv END) AS inv_2024
  FROM expenses e
  JOIN invest i ON e.city_name = i.city_name
  GROUP BY e.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       exp_2023,
       exp_2024,
       (exp_2024 - exp_2023) / NULLIF(exp_2023,0) * 100.0 AS exp_pct_change,
       inv_2023,
       inv_2024,
       (inv_2024 - inv_2023) / NULLIF(inv_2023,0) * 100.0 AS inv_pct_change
FROM combined
WHERE exp_2023 > 0 AND inv_2023 > 0
  AND (exp_2024 - exp_2023) / NULLIF(exp_2023,0) * 100.0 > 10
  AND (inv_2024 - inv_2023) / NULLIF(inv_2023,0) * 100.0 < 5
ORDER BY exp_pct_change DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Combien de communes différentes sont présentes dans le jeu de données pour l'année 2024 ?
Quel pourcentage de communes a au moins un avertissement (message_warning) dans les résultats d'extraction en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH city_warnings AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND r.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_warning
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT (SUM(has_warning) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS pct_cities_with_warning
FROM city_warnings;

question_fr: Quel est le classement des communes selon le pourcentage d'avertissements parmi leurs résultats d'extraction en 2023 ?
sql:
WITH city_stats AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         COUNT(r.result_id) AS total_results,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND r.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       warning_cnt * 100.0 / total_results AS warning_pct
FROM city_stats
ORDER BY warning_pct DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Combien de valeurs distinctes ont été extraites pour le champ Année ?
Quel est le montant total de l’investissement DF011 par année pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_investment
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne des dépenses totales (D001 + D002) par année pour le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       AVG(CAST(r1.value AS REAL) + CAST(r2.value AS REAL)) AS avg_total_expense
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r1 ON r1.document_id = d.document_id AND r1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
JOIN extraction_results r2 ON r2.document_id = d.document_id AND r2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été traités avec succès chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS successful_documents
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage d’évolution de l’investissement total DF011 entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_investment
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT (y2024.total_investment - y2023.total_investment) * 100.0 / y2023.total_investment AS pct_change
FROM yearly y2023
JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2024.document_year = '2024'
WHERE y2023.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Combien de communes affichent une hausse de l’investissement DF011 supérieure à 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH invest AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS df011_total
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS communes_with_growth
FROM (
  SELECT i2023.city_name,
         i2023.df011_total AS val2023,
         i2024.df011_total AS val2024,
         (i2024.df011_total - i2023.df011_total) * 100.0 / i2023.df011_total AS pct_change
  FROM invest i2023
  JOIN invest i2024 ON i2024.city_name = i2023.city_name
  WHERE i2023.document_year = '2023' AND i2024.document_year = '2024'
) sub
WHERE pct_change > 10;

question_fr: Quelles sont les cinq communes où le ratio DF011 / (D001 + D002) est le plus élevé en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(df.value AS REAL)) / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL)), 0) AS ratio
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results df ON df.document_id = d.document_id AND df.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Comment évolue la dépense moyenne (D001 + D002) par commune entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         AVG(CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL)) AS avg_expense
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT y2024.city_name,
       y2024.avg_expense AS avg_2024,
       y2023.avg_expense AS avg_2023,
       (y2024.avg_expense - y2023.avg_expense) * 100.0 / y2023.avg_expense AS pct_change
FROM yearly y2023
JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2024.city_name = y2023.city_name
WHERE y2023.document_year = '2023' AND y2024.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur investissement DF011 diminuer alors que leurs dépenses totales (D001 + D002) ont augmenté entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH invest AS (
  SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(df.value AS REAL)) AS invest_total,
         SUM(CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL)) AS expense_total
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results df ON df.document_id = d.document_id AND df.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT i2023.city_name
FROM invest i2023
JOIN invest i2024 ON i2024.city_name = i2023.city_name
WHERE i2023.document_year = '2023' AND i2024.document_year = '2024'
  AND i2024.invest_total < i2023.invest_total
  AND i2024.expense_total > i2023.expense_total;

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur médiane de l’investissement DF011 par année pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS df011_val,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.document_year ORDER BY CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.document_year) AS cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
)
SELECT document_year,
       AVG(df011_val) AS median_df011
FROM ordered
WHERE rn IN ( (cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2 )
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le total d’investissement DF011 en 2024, ventilé par type de masque (M57_CA vs M57_CFU) pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_df011
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  AND d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND d.mask IN ('M57_CA','M57_CFU')
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quelles années ont vu une augmentation de plus de 15 % de l’investissement moyen DF011 par commune par rapport à l’année précédente (BP) ?
sql:
WITH yearly_avg AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         AVG(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS avg_df011
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT y_curr.document_year,
       y_curr.avg_df011,
       y_prev.avg_df011 AS prev_avg,
       (y_curr.avg_df011 - y_prev.avg_df011) * 100.0 / y_prev.avg_df011 AS pct_change
FROM yearly_avg y_curr
JOIN yearly_avg y_prev ON y_prev.document_year = CAST(y_curr.document_year AS INTEGER) - 1
WHERE pct_change > 15;

question_fr: Quelles sont les cinq communes qui ont connu la plus forte hausse des dépenses totales (D001 + D002) entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
WITH expenses AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL)) AS total_expense
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT e2024.city_name,
       e2024.total_expense AS expense_2024,
       e2023.total_expense AS expense_2023,
       (e2024.total_expense - e2023.total_expense) * 100.0 / e2023.total_expense AS pct_change
FROM expenses e2023
JOIN expenses e2024 ON e2024.city_name = e2023.city_name
WHERE e2023.document_year = '2023' AND e2024.document_year = '2024'
ORDER BY pct_change DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le score composite (0,6 × DF011 + 0,4 × (D001 + D002)) par commune, et quelles communes ont vu ce score augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 (tous budgets) ?
sql:
WITH scores AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         0.6 * SUM(CAST(df.value AS REAL)) + 0.4 * SUM(CAST(d1.value AS REAL) + CAST(d2.value AS REAL)) AS composite_score
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results df ON df.document_id = d.document_id AND df.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  JOIN extraction_results d1 ON d1.document_id = d.document_id AND d1.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  JOIN extraction_results d2 ON d2.document_id = d.document_id AND d2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT s2024.city_name,
       s2024.composite_score AS score_2024,
       s2023.composite_score AS score_2023,
       (s2024.composite_score - s2023.composite_score) * 100.0 / s2023.composite_score AS pct_change
FROM scores s2023
JOIN scores s2024 ON s2024.city_name = s2023.city_name
WHERE s2023.document_year = '2023' AND s2024.document_year = '2024'
  AND pct_change > 20;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de Gini de la répartition de l’investissement DF011 parmi les communes en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS df011_val,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS n
  FROM extraction_results r
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
)
SELECT (2.0 * SUM(rn * df011_val) / (n * SUM(df011_val)) - (n + 1.0) / n) AS gini_coefficient
FROM ordered;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents au format PDF pour chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT document_year, AVG(nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents
WHERE format = 'pdf'
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents contiennent au moins un message d’erreur d’extraction chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS docs_with_error
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de champs extraits (résultats) chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_fields
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent les 5 plus gros montants d’investissement DF011 en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df011
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
ORDER BY df011 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour quelles communes le ratio DF011 / (D001 + D002) dépasse 10 % en 2023 sous le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
       NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS ratio
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING ratio > 0.10
ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur investissement DF011 augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 alors que leurs dépenses totales (D001 + D002) ont baissé d’au moins 5 % sur le même horizon, pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS invest,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS expenses
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
), piv AS (
  SELECT y1.city_name,
         y1.invest AS invest_2023,
         y2.invest AS invest_2024,
         y1.expenses AS exp_2023,
         y2.expenses AS exp_2024
  FROM yearly y1
  JOIN yearly y2 ON y1.city_name = y2.city_name
                AND y1.document_year = '2023'
                AND y2.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT city_name
FROM piv
WHERE invest_2024 > invest_2023 * 1.20
  AND exp_2024 < exp_2023 * 0.95
ORDER BY city_name;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont plus de 30 % de leurs résultats d’extraction contenant un avertissement en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_warning
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING pct_warning > 30
ORDER BY pct_warning DESC;

question_fr: Comment évoluent les montants totaux de DF011 d’une année à l’autre pour chaque type de budget, et quelles sont les plus fortes variations ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.budget_type,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_df011
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.budget_type, d.document_year
), changes AS (
  SELECT t1.budget_type,
         t1.document_year AS year_current,
         t2.document_year AS year_prev,
         t1.total_df011 - t2.total_df011 AS delta
  FROM totals t1
  JOIN totals t2 ON t1.budget_type = t2.budget_type
                AND CAST(t1.document_year AS INTEGER) = CAST(t2.document_year AS INTEGER) + 1
)
SELECT budget_type,
       year_current,
       delta
FROM changes
ORDER BY ABS(delta) DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de concentration (CR4) de l’investissement DF011 en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP), c’est‑à‑dire la part du total détenue par les 4 plus grosses communes ?
sql:
WITH df AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
), total AS (
  SELECT SUM(invest) AS total_invest FROM df
), top4 AS (
  SELECT invest FROM df ORDER BY invest DESC LIMIT 4
)
SELECT (SELECT SUM(invest) FROM top4) * 1.0 / (SELECT total_invest FROM total) AS cr4_ratio;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quelle est la moyenne pondérée de l’investissement DF011 (pondération = nombre de pages) sur 2023‑2024, et quelles communes s’écartent de plus de 15 % de la moyenne nationale pondérée ?
sql:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.nb_pages,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS df011
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011'
    AND d.nb_pages > 0
), comm AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         SUM(df011 * nb_pages) / SUM(nb_pages) AS weighted_avg
  FROM data
  GROUP BY city_name
), overall AS (
  SELECT SUM(df011 * nb_pages) / SUM(nb_pages) AS overall_weighted
  FROM data
)
SELECT c.city_name,
       c.weighted_avg,
       o.overall_weighted
FROM comm c
CROSS JOIN overall o
WHERE ABS(c.weighted_avg - o.overall_weighted) > 0.15 * o.overall_weighted
ORDER BY c.city_name;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent un ratio DF011 / (D001 + D002) qui dépasse la moyenne nationale plus trois écarts‑type en 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END),0) AS ratio
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
), stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(ratio) AS avg_ratio,
         (AVG(ratio * ratio) - AVG(ratio) * AVG(ratio)) AS variance
  FROM ratios
), thresh AS (
  SELECT avg_ratio,
         sqrt(variance) AS stddev
  FROM stats
)
SELECT r.city_name,
       r.ratio
FROM ratios r, thresh t
WHERE r.ratio > t.avg_ratio + 3 * t.stddev
ORDER BY r.ratio DESC;

question_fr: Combien de documents sont traités chaque année et combien d’entre eux ont abouti à une extraction réussie ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(*) AS total_docs, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_success FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages pour les documents dont l’extraction a réussi ?
sql: SELECT AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages_success FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS';

question_fr: Combien de documents affichent au moins un avertissement, ventilés par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(*) AS docs_with_warning FROM documents d WHERE TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de runs d’extraction sont exécutés chaque année ?
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', er.start_time) AS year, COUNT(*) AS runs FROM extraction_runs er GROUP BY year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de réussite des runs d’extraction par année ?
sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', er.start_time) AS year, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_success FROM extraction_runs er JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY year;

question_fr: Combien de documents présentent au moins une erreur d’extraction, par type de masque ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS docs_with_error FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> '' GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs extraits par run réussi, ventilé par type de budget ?
sql: WITH successful_runs AS ( SELECT er.run_id, d.budget_type FROM extraction_runs er JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' ), result_counts AS ( SELECT er.run_id, COUNT(*) AS nb_results FROM extraction_results er GROUP BY er.run_id ) SELECT sr.budget_type, ROUND(AVG(rc.nb_results), 2) AS avg_results_per_successful_run FROM successful_runs sr JOIN result_counts rc ON sr.run_id = rc.run_id GROUP BY sr.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents incomplets (extraction non réussie) comporte un avertissement, par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code <> 'SUCCESS' AND TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_incomplete_with_warning FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de réussite des extractions PDF par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_success_pdf FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.format = 'pdf' GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages pour les documents dont le run d’extraction est partiel, par masque ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages_partial FROM documents d JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL' GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de l’ensemble des documents comporte au moins une erreur d’extraction ?
sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents), 2) AS pct_documents_with_error FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> '';

question_fr: Comment évolue le taux mensuel de succès des runs d’extraction sur les 12 derniers mois, et quels mois sont les plus performants ?
sql: WITH monthly AS ( SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', er.start_time) AS month, COUNT(*) AS total_runs, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_runs FROM extraction_runs er JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY month ), rates AS ( SELECT month, ROUND(100.0 * success_runs / total_runs, 2) AS success_rate FROM monthly ) SELECT month, success_rate, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY success_rate DESC) AS rank_success FROM rates ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12;

question_fr: Quel est le 90ᵉ percentile du nombre de champs extraits par document réussi, selon le type de budget ?
sql: WITH doc_counts AS ( SELECT d.document_id, d.budget_type, COUNT(er.result_id) AS nb_results FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY d.document_id ), ranked AS ( SELECT budget_type, nb_results, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY budget_type ORDER BY nb_results) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY budget_type) AS cnt FROM doc_counts ) SELECT budget_type, nb_results AS perc90_results FROM ranked WHERE rn = CAST(0.9 * cnt AS INTEGER) + 1;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen, en heures, entre la création du document et le démarrage du run d’extraction réussie, par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, ROUND(AVG((julianday(er.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)) * 24), 2) AS avg_delay_hours FROM documents d JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de règles d'extraction sont associées à chaque jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS field_rule_count FROM rulesets r LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id ORDER BY field_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de règles de validation disponible pour chaque jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS validation_rule_count FROM rulesets r LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id ORDER BY validation_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Combien de masques différents sont couverts par chaque jeu de règles (extraction + validation) ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(DISTINCT mask) AS distinct_mask_count FROM (SELECT ruleset_id, mask FROM field_rules UNION SELECT ruleset_id, mask FROM validation_rules) rm JOIN rulesets r ON r.ruleset_id = rm.ruleset_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id ORDER BY distinct_mask_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de règles (extraction et validation) appliquées à chaque type de masque ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS total_rules FROM (SELECT mask FROM field_rules UNION ALL SELECT mask FROM validation_rules) all_rules GROUP BY mask ORDER BY total_rules DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les cinq jeux de règles contenant le plus grand nombre de règles d'extraction ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS field_rule_count FROM rulesets r JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id ORDER BY field_rule_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de jeux de règles comporte au moins une règle de validation de type « ALERTE » ?
sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN has_alerte = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_rulesets_with_alerte FROM (SELECT r.ruleset_id, MAX(CASE WHEN vr.level_of_problem = 'ALERTE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_alerte FROM rulesets r LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id) sub;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quelle est la moyenne de règles d'extraction par jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT mask, ROUND(AVG(field_rule_count), 2) AS avg_field_rules_per_ruleset FROM (SELECT fr.mask, fr.ruleset_id, COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS field_rule_count FROM field_rules fr GROUP BY fr.ruleset_id, fr.mask) sub GROUP BY mask ORDER BY avg_field_rules_per_ruleset DESC;

question_fr: Quels masques présentent un ratio > 0,5 entre les règles de validation et les règles d'extraction ?
sql: SELECT mask, validation_cnt, field_cnt, ROUND(1.0 * validation_cnt / field_cnt, 2) AS ratio FROM (SELECT mask, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'validation' THEN cnt END) AS validation_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'field' THEN cnt END) AS field_cnt FROM (SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt, 'field' AS source FROM field_rules GROUP BY mask UNION ALL SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt, 'validation' AS source FROM validation_rules GROUP BY mask) GROUP BY mask) sub WHERE field_cnt > 0 AND (1.0 * validation_cnt / field_cnt) > 0.5 ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le niveau de densité de contrôle (validation / extraction) pour chaque jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, field_cnt, validation_cnt, ROUND(1.0 * validation_cnt / NULLIF(field_cnt,0), 2) AS control_density FROM (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS field_cnt FROM field_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) fr JOIN (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS validation_cnt FROM validation_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) vr ON vr.ruleset_id = fr.ruleset_id JOIN rulesets r ON r.ruleset_id = fr.ruleset_id ORDER BY control_density DESC;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts sont ciblés par chaque jeu de règles, en combinant les règles d'extraction et les listes de champs des règles de validation ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(DISTINCT fr.safir_field_id) AS distinct_field_ids, COUNT(DISTINCT vr.safir_field_id_list) AS distinct_validation_lists, (COUNT(DISTINCT fr.safir_field_id) + COUNT(DISTINCT vr.safir_field_id_list)) AS total_distinct_targets FROM rulesets r LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id ORDER BY total_distinct_targets DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de masque, combien de règles d'extraction sont disponibles et quelle est la moyenne de résultats extraits par document correspondant ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, COUNT(DISTINCT fr.extraction_rule_id) AS field_rule_count, ROUND(AVG(res_per_doc.result_count), 2) AS avg_results_per_doc FROM documents d LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.mask = d.mask LEFT JOIN (SELECT er.document_id, COUNT(*) AS result_count FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents doc ON doc.document_id = er.document_id JOIN field_rules fr2 ON fr2.safir_field_id = er.safir_field_id AND fr2.mask = doc.mask GROUP BY er.document_id) res_per_doc ON res_per_doc.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.mask ORDER BY field_rule_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de résultats extraits par règle d'extraction, agrégé par jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, ROUND(AVG(fr_res.result_count), 2) AS avg_results_per_field_rule FROM rulesets r JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT fr2.extraction_rule_id, COUNT(er.result_id) AS result_count FROM field_rules fr2 JOIN extraction_results er ON er.safir_field_id = fr2.safir_field_id JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id AND d.mask = fr2.mask GROUP BY fr2.extraction_rule_id) fr_res ON fr_res.extraction_rule_id = fr.extraction_rule_id GROUP BY r.ruleset_id ORDER BY avg_results_per_field_rule DESC;

question_fr: Quels jeux de règles contiennent au moins une règle de validation dont la liste de champs SAFIR comporte plus de trois éléments ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT vr.ruleset_id FROM validation_rules vr WHERE vr.safir_field_id_list LIKE '%,%,%';

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel est le nombre de règles d'extraction, le nombre de règles de validation et le ratio validation / extraction ?
sql: SELECT mask, field_cnt, validation_cnt, ROUND(1.0 * validation_cnt / NULLIF(field_cnt,0), 2) AS validation_to_field_ratio FROM (SELECT mask, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'field' THEN cnt END) AS field_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'validation' THEN cnt END) AS validation_cnt FROM (SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt, 'field' AS source FROM field_rules GROUP BY mask UNION ALL SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt, 'validation' AS source FROM validation_rules GROUP BY mask) GROUP BY mask) ORDER BY validation_to_field_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de règles de validation d'un jeu de règles est de type « ECHEC » ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, total_vr, echec_cnt, ROUND(100.0 * echec_cnt / NULLIF(total_vr,0), 2) AS pct_echec FROM (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS total_vr, SUM(CASE WHEN level_of_problem = 'ECHEC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS echec_cnt FROM validation_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) sub JOIN rulesets r ON r.ruleset_id = sub.ruleset_id ORDER BY pct_echec DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de couverture des champs SAFIR par les règles d'extraction, exprimé en pourcentage du nombre total de champs présents dans les résultats d'extraction pour les masques correspondants ?
sql: WITH rule_masks AS (SELECT ruleset_id, mask FROM field_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id, mask), field_coverage AS (SELECT fr.ruleset_id, COUNT(DISTINCT fr.safir_field_id) AS covered_fields FROM field_rules fr GROUP BY fr.ruleset_id), total_fields AS (SELECT rm.ruleset_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS total_fields FROM rule_masks rm JOIN documents d ON d.mask = rm.mask JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY rm.ruleset_id) SELECT r.ruleset_id, covered_fields, total_fields, ROUND(100.0 * covered_fields / NULLIF(total_fields,0), 2) AS coverage_percentage FROM field_coverage fc JOIN total_fields tf ON tf.ruleset_id = fc.ruleset_id JOIN rulesets r ON r.ruleset_id = fc.ruleset_id ORDER BY coverage_percentage DESC;

question_fr: Quels jeux de règles ont une moyenne de résultats extraits par règle d'extraction inférieure à 80 % de la moyenne globale ?
sql: WITH per_rule AS (SELECT fr.extraction_rule_id, COUNT(er.result_id) AS result_cnt FROM field_rules fr LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.safir_field_id = fr.safir_field_id LEFT JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id AND d.mask = fr.mask GROUP BY fr.extraction_rule_id), overall_avg AS (SELECT AVG(result_cnt * 1.0) AS overall_avg_cnt FROM per_rule), ruleset_avg AS (SELECT fr.ruleset_id, AVG(pr.result_cnt * 1.0) AS avg_cnt FROM field_rules fr JOIN per_rule pr ON pr.extraction_rule_id = fr.extraction_rule_id GROUP BY fr.ruleset_id) SELECT ra.ruleset_id, ra.avg_cnt, oa.overall_avg_cnt, ROUND(100.0 * ra.avg_cnt / NULLIF(oa.overall_avg_cnt,0), 2) AS pct_of_overall FROM ruleset_avg ra, overall_avg oa WHERE ra.avg_cnt < 0.8 * oa.overall_avg_cnt ORDER BY pct_of_overall ASC;

question_fr: Quels sont les cinq jeux de règles où la proportion de règles de validation avec une liste de champs non vide est la plus élevée ?
sql: SELECT vr.ruleset_id, total_vr, non_empty_cnt, ROUND(100.0 * non_empty_cnt / NULLIF(total_vr,0), 2) AS pct_non_empty FROM (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS total_vr, SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id_list IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(safir_field_id_list) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_empty_cnt FROM validation_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) vr ORDER BY pct_non_empty DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de doublons de champs SAFIR au sein d'un même jeu de règles (règles d'extraction répétées) ?
sql: SELECT fr.ruleset_id, SUM(dup_cnt) AS duplicate_field_rules FROM (SELECT ruleset_id, safir_field_id, COUNT(*) - 1 AS dup_cnt FROM field_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id, safir_field_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) fr GROUP BY fr.ruleset_id ORDER BY duplicate_field_rules DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de champs SAFIR distincts extraits par année et par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       d.budget_type,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_champs_distinct
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.document_year, d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents possède au moins un champ SAFIR extrait chaque année ?
sql:
WITH docs_per_year AS (
  SELECT document_year, COUNT(*) AS total_docs
  FROM documents
  GROUP BY document_year
),
docs_with_result AS (
  SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS docs_with_result
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT p.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * dwr.docs_with_result / p.total_docs, 2) AS pct_docs_with_extraction
FROM docs_per_year p
JOIN docs_with_result dwr ON dwr.document_year = p.document_year
ORDER BY p.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts sont présents dans les résultats d'extraction pour le budget principal (BP) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_champs_distinct
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP';

question_fr: Combien de documents ont affiché au moins un message d'erreur d'extraction en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS nb_docs_avec_erreur
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> '';

question_fr: Comment se répartit le nombre de champs SAFIR extraits par document pour le budget annexaire (BA) en 2024 ? (tranches 0‑10, 11‑20, 21‑30, 31‑40, 41+)
sql:
SELECT CASE
         WHEN cnt <= 10 THEN '0-10'
         WHEN cnt <= 20 THEN '11-20'
         WHEN cnt <= 30 THEN '21-30'
         WHEN cnt <= 40 THEN '31-40'
         ELSE '41+'
       END AS bucket,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_documents
FROM (
  SELECT d.document_id, COUNT(er.safir_field_id) AS cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
) sub
GROUP BY bucket
ORDER BY bucket;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents contenant au moins un avertissement, ventilé par type de budget et par année ?
sql:
WITH docs AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.document_year, d.budget_type
  FROM documents d
),
docs_with_warn AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id, d.document_year, d.budget_type
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.message_warning IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> ''
)
SELECT d.document_year,
       d.budget_type,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT dw.document_id) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id), 2) AS pct_docs_with_warning
FROM docs d
LEFT JOIN docs_with_warn dw ON dw.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.document_year, d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.document_year, d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quels champs SAFIR ont une couverture inférieure à 20 % des documents pour le budget principal (BP) en 2023 ?
sql:
WITH total_docs AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS total_cnt
  FROM documents
  WHERE document_year = '2023' AND budget_type = 'BP'
),
field_doc_counts AS (
  SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS doc_cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY er.safir_field_id
)
SELECT safir_field_id,
       ROUND(100.0 * doc_cnt / (SELECT total_cnt FROM total_docs), 2) AS coverage_pct
FROM field_doc_counts
WHERE doc_cnt < 0.2 * (SELECT total_cnt FROM total_docs)
ORDER BY coverage_pct ASC;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents qui comportent au moins un champ SAFIR sans valeur, par année ?
sql:
WITH docs_with_empty AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id, d.document_year, d.nb_pages
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.value IS NULL OR TRIM(er.value) = ''
)
SELECT document_year,
       ROUND(AVG(nb_pages),2) AS avg_pages
FROM docs_with_empty
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts ont été extraits sans aucun message d’erreur ni d’avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_champs_sans_probleme
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE (er.message_error IS NULL OR TRIM(er.message_error) = '')
  AND (er.message_warning IS NULL OR TRIM(er.message_warning) = '')
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de couverture des champs SAFIR par document (valeurs non vides / champs définis pour le masque), et quels sont les dix documents les moins couverts en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH defined_per_mask AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS total_defined
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY mask
),
doc_counts AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.city_name,
         d.mask,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS total_extracted,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.value IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.value) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_empty
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name, d.mask
)
SELECT dc.city_name,
       dc.document_id,
       ROUND(1.0 * dc.non_empty / dp.total_defined, 4) AS couverture_coeff
FROM doc_counts dc
JOIN defined_per_mask dp ON dp.mask = dc.mask
ORDER BY couverture_coeff ASC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quels champs SAFIR présentent une forte variance des valeurs numériques (écart‑type > 10) pour le budget principal (BP) en 2023 ?
sql:
WITH numeric_vals AS (
  SELECT er.safir_field_id,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.value IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(er.value) <> ''
    AND er.value NOT LIKE '%[^0-9.]%'
)
SELECT safir_field_id,
       ROUND(SQRT(AVG(val*val) - AVG(val)*AVG(val)), 2) AS ecart_type
FROM numeric_vals
GROUP BY safir_field_id
HAVING ecart_type > 10
ORDER BY ecart_type DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de complétude des champs SAFIR par commune pour 2024, et quelles sont les cinq communes les moins complètes ?
sql:
WITH defined_per_mask AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS total_defined
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY mask
),
city_counts AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.mask,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS total_extracted,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.value IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.value) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_empty
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.mask
)
SELECT cc.city_name,
       ROUND(1.0 * cc.non_empty / dp.total_defined, 4) AS completude_rate
FROM city_counts cc
JOIN defined_per_mask dp ON dp.mask = cc.mask
ORDER BY completude_rate ASC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs SAFIR extraits par run, par type de budget, en excluant les runs en état d’erreur ?
sql:
WITH run_counts AS (
  SELECT er.run_id,
         d.budget_type,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_champs
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_runs r ON r.run_id = er.run_id
  JOIN states s ON s.state_id = r.state_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE s.code <> 'ERROR'
  GROUP BY er.run_id, d.budget_type
)
SELECT budget_type,
       ROUND(AVG(nb_champs),2) AS avg_champs_par_run
FROM run_counts
GROUP BY budget_type
ORDER BY avg_champs_par_run DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quel est, pour chaque année, le ratio entre le nombre de champs SAFIR distincts présentant au moins une valeur manquante et le nombre total de champs SAFIR distincts extraits ?
sql:
WITH total_fields_year AS (
  SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS total_cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_year
),
fields_with_missing AS (
  SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS missing_cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.value IS NULL OR TRIM(er.value) = ''
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT t.document_year,
       ROUND(1.0 * f.missing_cnt / t.total_cnt, 4) AS ratio_missing_fields
FROM total_fields_year t
JOIN fields_with_missing f ON f.document_year = t.document_year
ORDER BY ratio_missing_fields DESC;

question_fr: Combien de documents ont affiché au moins un avertissement en 2023, ventilés par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.warning_message <> ''
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de réussite des runs d'extraction par année ?
sql:
SELECT strftime('%Y', er.start_time) AS annee,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_reussite
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY annee;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents dont l'extraction a réussi ?
sql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(d.nb_pages), 2) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS';

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de documents avec au moins un avertissement parmi ceux dont l’état est PARTIAL, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year AS annee,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_avertissement
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de runs d’extraction sont en état ERROR et combien d’entre eux concernent des documents de type BA ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_error_runs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.budget_type = 'BA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_runs_BA
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE s.code = 'ERROR';

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de runs d’extraction réussis (SUCCESS) qui ont généré au moins un message d’avertissement dans les résultats ?
sql:
WITH success_runs AS (
  SELECT er.run_id
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
),
warning_runs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT er.run_id
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  JOIN extraction_results r ON er.run_id = r.run_id
  WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND r.message_warning <> ''
)
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM warning_runs) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM success_runs), 2) AS taux_warning_runs_success;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents avec état PARTIAL qui n’ont aucun message d’avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year AS annee,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS taux_sans_avertissement
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de runs d’extraction qui ont échoué (state ERROR) mais pour lesquels au moins 80 % des champs extraits ne contiennent aucun message d’erreur ?
sql:
WITH run_stats AS (
  SELECT er.run_id,
         COUNT(r.result_id) AS total_fields,
         SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NULL OR r.message_error = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fields_without_error
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  JOIN extraction_results r ON er.run_id = r.run_id
  WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
  GROUP BY er.run_id
),
error_runs AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_error_runs
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
),
qualified_runs AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS qualified
  FROM run_stats
  WHERE fields_without_error * 1.0 / total_fields >= 0.8
)
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * qualified * 1.0 / total_error_runs, 2) AS taux_runs_qualifies
FROM qualified_runs, error_runs;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents dont le nombre de pages dépasse la moyenne des pages des documents en état SUCCESS, ventilé par type de budget ?
sql:
WITH avg_success AS (
  SELECT AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
  FROM documents d
  JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
)
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.nb_pages > (SELECT avg_pages FROM avg_success) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_above_avg_pages
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Combien de communes différentes ont au moins un document avec le masque M57_CA ?

sql:
WITH muni_docs AS (

  FROM documents d

),
muni_vals AS (

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un ratio D001/D002 supérieur à 1,5 pour l'année 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) /
             NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS ratio
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND r.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002')
  AND r.value <> ''
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) >
       1.5 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END)
ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque année, quelle commune a enregistré la plus forte hausse du champ D001 par rapport à l'année précédente ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year AS yr,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
growth AS (
  SELECT y1.city_name,
         y1.yr,
         (y1.total_d001 - COALESCE(y2.total_d001, 0)) AS growth
  FROM yearly y1
  LEFT JOIN yearly y2
    ON y1.city_name = y2.city_name
   AND CAST(y1.yr AS INTEGER) = CAST(y2.yr AS INTEGER) + 1
)
SELECT yr,
       city_name,
       growth
FROM (
  SELECT *,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY yr ORDER BY growth DESC) AS rn
  FROM growth
) sub
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY yr;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont plus de 20 % de leurs valeurs D001 associées à un message d'erreur d'extraction ?

FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND r.value <> ''
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING (SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) > 20

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quelle proportion de ses documents comporte au moins un avertissement, et quelles communes dépassent 50 % ?
sql:
WITH doc_warn AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_id,
         CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS has_warn
  FROM documents d
),
agg AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         SUM(has_warn) AS warn_cnt,
         COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
  FROM doc_warn
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ROUND(100.0 * warn_cnt / total_cnt, 2) AS warn_pct
FROM agg
WHERE (warn_cnt * 100.0) / total_cnt > 50
ORDER BY warn_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent, sur trois années consécutives, une décroissance du total D001 chaque année ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         CAST(d.document_year AS INTEGER) AS yr,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name, yr
),
growth AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         yr,
         total_d001,
         total_d001 - LAG(total_d001) OVER (PARTITION BY city_name ORDER BY yr) AS delta
  FROM yearly
)
SELECT city_name,
       GROUP_CONCAT(yr) AS years,
       GROUP_CONCAT(delta) AS deltas
FROM (
  SELECT city_name, yr, delta
  FROM growth
  WHERE delta < 0
) sub
GROUP BY city_name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY city_name;

question_fr: Quelles communes dépassent 5 % d'erreurs d'extraction sur le champ D001 tout en figurant parmi les 10 % des communes avec le plus grand nombre moyen de pages par document ?
sql:
WITH err_pct AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS err_pct
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
avg_pages AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         ROUND(AVG(d.nb_pages), 2) AS avg_pages
  FROM documents d
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
combined AS (
  SELECT e.city_name,
         e.err_pct,
         a.avg_pages
  FROM err_pct e
  JOIN avg_pages a ON e.city_name = a.city_name
),
page_stats AS (
  SELECT avg_pages,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY avg_pages DESC) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_cnt
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT avg_pages FROM combined)
)
SELECT c.city_name,
       c.err_pct,
       c.avg_pages
FROM combined c
JOIN page_stats ps ON c.avg_pages = ps.avg_pages
WHERE c.err_pct > 5
  AND ps.rn <= CAST(0.1 * ps.total_cnt AS INTEGER)
ORDER BY c.err_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent une distribution très inégale du champ D001 selon le coefficient de Gini, par année ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS yr,
         d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS amount
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY yr, d.city_name
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT yr,
         city_name,
         amount,
         SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY yr ORDER BY amount) AS cum_amount,
         SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY yr) AS total_amount,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY yr ORDER BY amount) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY yr) AS n
  FROM totals
),
gini_calc AS (
  SELECT yr,
         1 - (2.0 / n) * ( (total_amount - cum_amount) / total_amount ) + (1.0 / n) AS gini
  FROM ordered
)
SELECT yr,
       ROUND(AVG(gini), 4) AS gini_coeff
FROM gini_calc
GROUP BY yr
ORDER BY yr;

distinct_vals AS (

missing AS (

  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D003'

question_fr: Quelle part du champ D001 représente-t-elle dans le budget total de chaque commune en 2024 pour le budget principal ?
sql:
WITH total_budget AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
 d001_budget AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS d001_total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'

SELECT t.city_name,

question_fr: Quelles communes ont un champ D002 qui représente plus de 30 % du budget total en 2024 pour le budget principal ?

WITH total AS (

  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'

 d002 AS (

         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS d002_total
  FROM extraction_results er

  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents contenant au moins un avertissement, ventilé par type de budget, pour l'année 2023 ?

with_warning AS (

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une hausse du champ D001 tout en enregistrant une baisse du champ D002 entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         er.safir_field_id,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_val
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year, er.safir_field_id
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT s.city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN s.document_year = '2023' AND s.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN s.total_val END) AS d001_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN s.document_year = '2024' AND s.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN s.total_val END) AS d001_2024,
         MAX(CASE WHEN s.document_year = '2023' AND s.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN s.total_val END) AS d002_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN s.document_year = '2024' AND s.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN s.total_val END) AS d002_2024
  FROM sums s
  GROUP BY s.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       d001_2023, d001_2024,
       d002_2023, d002_2024
FROM pivot
WHERE d001_2024 > d001_2023
  AND d002_2024 < d002_2023;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de variation (écart‑type divisé par la moyenne) des valeurs du champ D001 parmi les communes en 2024 pour le budget principal ?

    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'

SELECT SQRT(AVG(val*val) - AVG(val)*AVG(val)) / AVG(val) AS coeff_variation_D001
FROM vals;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un ratio D001/D002 supérieur à 2 tant en 2023 qu’en 2024 et voient ce ratio augmenter de plus de 10 % d’une année sur l’autre ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS d001_sum,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS d002_sum
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT y.city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN y.document_year = '2023' THEN y.d001_sum END) AS d001_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN y.document_year = '2023' THEN y.d002_sum END) AS d002_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN y.document_year = '2024' THEN y.d001_sum END) AS d001_2024,
         MAX(CASE WHEN y.document_year = '2024' THEN y.d002_sum END) AS d002_2024
  FROM yearly y
  GROUP BY y.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       d001_2023, d002_2023,
       d001_2024, d002_2024,
       (d001_2023 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2023,0)) AS ratio_2023,
       (d001_2024 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2024,0)) AS ratio_2024,
       ((d001_2024 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2024,0)) - (d001_2023 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2023,0))) * 100.0 / NULLIF((d001_2023 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2023,0)),0) AS ratio_change_pct
FROM pivot
WHERE (d001_2023 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2023,0)) > 2
  AND (d001_2024 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2024,0)) > 2
  AND ((d001_2024 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2024,0)) - (d001_2023 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2023,0))) * 100.0 / NULLIF((d001_2023 * 1.0 / NULLIF(d002_2023,0)),0) > 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes contribuent à 80 % du total du champ D001 en 2024 pour le budget principal (analyse de Pareto) ?
sql:
WITH d001_totals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS d001_sum
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         d001_sum,
         SUM(d001_sum) OVER (ORDER BY d001_sum DESC) AS cum_sum,
         SUM(d001_sum) OVER () AS grand_total
  FROM d001_totals
)
SELECT city_name,
       d001_sum,
       cum_sum,
       (cum_sum * 100.0) / grand_total AS cum_pct
FROM ordered
WHERE (cum_sum * 100.0) / grand_total <= 80
ORDER BY cum_pct;

question_fr: Dans le budget annexaire en 2024, quelles communes ont plus de 20 % de leurs documents où le champ D004 est absent ou vide ?
sql:
WITH docs AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name
  FROM documents d
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
),
missing AS (
  SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS missing_docs
  FROM docs d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D004'
    AND (er.value IS NULL OR TRIM(er.value) = '')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
 total AS (
  SELECT city_name, COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS total_docs
  FROM docs
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT t.city_name,
       missing.missing_docs,
       t.total_docs,
       (missing.missing_docs * 100.0) / t.total_docs AS missing_pct
FROM total t

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une moyenne D001 par document supérieure de plus de deux écarts‑type à la moyenne globale en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH city_stats AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_city,
           COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS nb_docs
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
      AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
      AND er.value <> ''
    GROUP BY d.city_name
), overall AS (
    SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS overall_avg
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
      AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
      AND er.value <> ''
), variance AS (
    SELECT AVG((CAST(er.value AS REAL) - (SELECT overall_avg FROM overall)) * (CAST(er.value AS REAL) - (SELECT overall_avg FROM overall))) AS var
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
      AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
      AND er.value <> ''
), stddev AS (
    SELECT SQRT(var) AS sd FROM variance
)
SELECT cs.city_name,
       cs.avg_city,
       (SELECT overall_avg FROM overall) AS overall_avg,
       (SELECT sd FROM stddev) AS sd
FROM city_stats cs
WHERE cs.avg_city > (SELECT overall_avg FROM overall) + 2 * (SELECT sd FROM stddev)
ORDER BY cs.avg_city DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune en 2024 (budget principal), quelle part du total D001 représente‑elle par rapport à la somme D001 + D002, et quelles sont les trois communes avec la part la plus élevée ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS sum_d001,
       (SELECT SUM(CAST(er2.value AS REAL))
        FROM extraction_results er2
        JOIN documents d2 ON er2.document_id = d2.document_id
        WHERE d2.document_year = '2024'
          AND d2.budget_type = 'BP'
          AND d2.city_name = d.city_name
          AND er2.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
          AND er2.value <> '') AS sum_d1_d2,
       (SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) /
        (SELECT SUM(CAST(er2.value AS REAL))
         FROM extraction_results er2
         JOIN documents d2 ON er2.document_id = d2.document_id
         WHERE d2.document_year = '2024'
           AND d2.budget_type = 'BP'
           AND d2.city_name = d.city_name
           AND er2.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
           AND er2.value <> '')) AS proportion_d001
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND er.value <> ''
GROUP BY d.city_name
HAVING sum_d1_d2 > 0
ORDER BY proportion_d001 DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont enregistré une hausse de plus de 20 % du champ D001 entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?

WITH sums AS (

         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id

    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND er.value <> ''
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT s2024.city_name,
       s2023.total_d001 AS total_2023,
       s2024.total_d001 AS total_2024,
       ((s2024.total_d001 - s2023.total_d001) / s2023.total_d001) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM sums s2024

  AND s2023.document_year = '2023'

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de variation (écart‑type / moyenne) du champ D001 parmi les communes pour 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS mean_val,
         AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL) * CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS mean_sq
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT AVG(stddev) AS avg_stddev,
       AVG(mean_val) AS avg_mean,
       (AVG(stddev) / AVG(mean_val)) AS coeff_variation
FROM (
  SELECT city_name,
         sqrt(mean_sq - mean_val*mean_val) AS stddev,
         mean_val
  FROM stats
) ;

question_fr: Quelles sont les communes qui contribuent à 80 % du total D001 en 2024 (budget principal) ? (analyse de Pareto)
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         total_d001,
         SUM(total_d001) OVER (ORDER BY total_d001 DESC) AS cum_sum,
         SUM(total_d001) OVER () AS grand_total
  FROM totals
)
SELECT city_name,
       total_d001,
       cum_sum / grand_total AS cumulative_share
FROM ordered
WHERE cum_sum / grand_total <= 0.80
ORDER BY cumulative_share DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total du champ D001 pour chaque masque, en distinguant les années 2023 et 2024, et quel masque montre la plus forte croissance d’une année à l’autre ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year
),
 growth AS (
  SELECT y2024.mask,
         y2023.total_d001 AS total_2023,
         y2024.total_d001 AS total_2024,
         ((y2024.total_d001 - y2023.total_d001) / y2023.total_d001) * 100.0 AS pct_growth
  FROM yearly y2024
  JOIN yearly y2023 ON y2024.mask = y2023.mask
  WHERE y2024.document_year = '2024' AND y2023.document_year = '2023'
)
SELECT mask,
       total_2023,
       total_2024,
       pct_growth
FROM growth
ORDER BY pct_growth DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH total_docs AS (

  FROM documents
  WHERE document_year = '2023'
  GROUP BY budget_type
),
docs_with_d001 AS (
  SELECT d.budget_type, COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS with_value

  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
    AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu le champ D001 du budget principal augmenter de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.value) <> ''
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN total_d001 END) AS total_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN total_d001 END) AS total_2024
  FROM sums
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       total_2023,
       total_2024,
       ((total_2024 - total_2023) / NULLIF(total_2023,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM pivot
WHERE total_2023 IS NOT NULL AND total_2024 IS NOT NULL
  AND ((total_2024 - total_2023) / NULLIF(total_2023,0)) * 100.0 > 10
ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quel est le ratio du total D001 sur le total de tous les champs numériques du budget principal en 2024, et quelles communes dépassent 0,5 ?

WITH numeric_fields AS (

         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val,
         er.safir_field_id
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
    AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.value) <> ''
),
sums AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN val ELSE 0 END) AS sum_d001,
         SUM(val) AS sum_all
  FROM numeric_fields

)
SELECT city_name,
       sum_d001,
       sum_all,
       (sum_d001 * 1.0) / NULLIF(sum_all,0) AS ratio
FROM sums
WHERE (sum_d001 * 1.0) / NULLIF(sum_all,0) > 0.5
ORDER BY ratio DESC;
