FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE julianday(er.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at) > 2
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de réussite pondéré par le nombre de champs extraits, par masque et par année ?
sql:
WITH run_counts AS (
  SELECT er.run_id,
         d.mask,
         d.document_year,
         s.code AS run_state,
         COUNT(r.result_id) AS nb_results
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results r ON er.run_id = r.run_id
  GROUP BY er.run_id, d.mask, d.document_year, s.code
)
SELECT mask,
       document_year,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN run_state='SUCCESS' THEN nb_results ELSE 0 END) / SUM(nb_results) AS taux_success_pondere
FROM run_counts
GROUP BY mask, document_year
ORDER BY mask, document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre médian de champs extraits par document, par masque et par année, et quels masques affichent une médiane inférieure à 50 ?
sql:
WITH doc_counts AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.mask, d.document_year, COUNT(r.result_id) AS cnt
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.mask, d.document_year
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT mask, document_year, cnt,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mask, document_year ORDER BY cnt) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY mask, document_year) AS total_cnt
  FROM doc_counts
)
SELECT mask, document_year,
       MAX(CASE WHEN rn = (total_cnt+1)/2 THEN cnt END) AS median_cnt,
       CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN rn = (total_cnt+1)/2 THEN cnt END) < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS median_below_50_flag
FROM ordered
GROUP BY mask, document_year
ORDER BY mask, document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents par année et par type de masque ?
sql:
SELECT document_year AS year, mask, COUNT(*) AS doc_count
FROM documents
GROUP BY document_year, mask
ORDER BY document_year, doc_count DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio entre les documents PDF et les documents scannés pour chaque type de budget en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT budget_type, format, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM documents
  WHERE document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY budget_type, format
)
SELECT c1.budget_type,
       c1.cnt * 1.0 / NULLIF(c2.cnt,0) AS pdf_to_scan_ratio
FROM counts c1
JOIN counts c2
  ON c1.budget_type = c2.budget_type
WHERE c1.format = 'pdf' AND c2.format = 'scan';

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents validés, par masque, pour l'année 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.mask
ORDER BY avg_pages DESC;

question_fr: Combien de communes différentes ont au moins un document avec un message d'erreur en 2024 ?
Pour chaque commune, quelle proportion de ses documents 2024 comporte au moins un avertissement, et quelles communes dépassent 30 % ?
sql:
WITH total AS (
  SELECT city_name, COUNT(*) AS total_docs
  FROM documents
  WHERE document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY city_name
),
with_warn AS (
  SELECT city_name, COUNT(*) AS warn_docs
  FROM documents
  WHERE document_year = '2024' AND warning_message <> ''
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT t.city_name,
       (w.warn_docs * 1.0 / t.total_docs) * 100.0 AS warning_pct
FROM total t
JOIN with_warn w ON t.city_name = w.city_name
WHERE (w.warn_docs * 1.0 / t.total_docs) > 0.30
ORDER BY warning_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio total D001 / total D002 par commune (BP) en 2023, et quelles sont les 10 premières ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         r.safir_field_id,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_val
  FROM extraction_results r
  JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
    AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name, r.safir_field_id
)
SELECT s1.city_name,
       (s1.total_val * 1.0 / NULLIF(s2.total_val,0)) AS d001_to_d002_ratio
FROM sums s1
JOIN sums s2 ON s1.city_name = s2.city_name
WHERE s1.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND s2.safir_field_id = 'D002'
ORDER BY d001_to_d002_ratio DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents avec au moins une erreur d'extraction versus ceux sans erreur, par type de budget en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       AVG(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id
                 AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL
                 AND er.message_error <> ''
             ) THEN d.nb_pages END) AS avg_pages_with_error,
       AVG(CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id
                 AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL
                 AND er.message_error <> ''
             ) THEN d.nb_pages END) AS avg_pages_without_error
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents possède à la fois un avertissement et un message d'erreur, par année ?
sql:
WITH total AS (
  SELECT document_year, COUNT(*) AS total_docs
  FROM documents
  GROUP BY document_year
),
both AS (
  SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(*) AS both_cnt
  FROM documents d
  WHERE d.warning_message <> '' AND d.error_message <> ''
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT t.document_year,
       (b.both_cnt * 1.0 / t.total_docs) * 100.0 AS pct_both
FROM total t
JOIN both b ON t.document_year = b.document_year
ORDER BY t.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un ratio D001/D002 supérieur à 2 en 2023 et 2024 (BP) et dont le ratio a augmenté de plus de 10 % d'une année sur l'autre ?
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN r.value END AS REAL)) AS sum_d001,
         SUM(CAST(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN r.value END AS REAL)) AS sum_d002
  FROM extraction_results r
  JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    AND r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
calc AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         document_year,
         (sum_d001 * 1.0 / NULLIF(sum_d002,0)) AS ratio
  FROM ratios
  WHERE sum_d002 > 0
)
SELECT r2024.city_name,
       r2023.ratio AS ratio_2023,
       r2024.ratio AS ratio_2024,
       ((r2024.ratio - r2023.ratio) * 1.0 / NULLIF(r2023.ratio,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
FROM calc r2023
JOIN calc r2024 ON r2023.city_name = r2024.city_name
WHERE r2023.document_year = '2023' AND r2024.document_year = '2024'
  AND r2023.ratio > 2 AND r2024.ratio > 2
  AND ((r2024.ratio - r2023.ratio) * 1.0 / NULLIF(r2023.ratio,0)) > 0.10
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quel est le coefficient de variation du champ D001 (BP) en 2024, et quelles communes dépassent 0,5 ?
sql:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         AVG(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS avg_val,
         AVG(CAST(r.value AS REAL) * CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS avg_sq,
         COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM extraction_results r
  JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name
  HAVING n > 1
)
SELECT city_name,
       avg_val,
       sqrt(avg_sq - avg_val * avg_val) AS stddev,
       (sqrt(avg_sq - avg_val * avg_val) / avg_val) AS cv
FROM stats
WHERE avg_val <> 0 AND (sqrt(avg_sq - avg_val * avg_val) / avg_val) > 0.5
ORDER BY cv DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de règles d’extraction (field_rules) définies pour le masque M57_CA ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_field_rules FROM field_rules WHERE mask = 'M57_CA';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de règles de validation (validation_rules) associées au masque M57 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_validation_rules FROM validation_rules WHERE mask = 'M57';

question_fr: Combien de règles d’extraction sont rattachées au même jeu de règles que la règle d’identifiant 'extraction_rule_001' ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_rules FROM field_rules WHERE ruleset_id = (SELECT ruleset_id FROM field_rules WHERE extraction_rule_id = 'extraction_rule_001');

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel est le nombre moyen de règles d’extraction par jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT mask, AVG(cnt) AS avg_field_rules_per_ruleset FROM (SELECT mask, ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM field_rules GROUP BY mask, ruleset_id) GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de règles (extraction + validation) pour chaque jeu de règles, classé du plus riche au plus pauvre ?
sql: SELECT r.ruleset_id, r.description, COALESCE(fr.cnt,0) + COALESCE(vr.cnt,0) AS total_rules FROM rulesets r LEFT JOIN (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM field_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) fr ON r.ruleset_id = fr.ruleset_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM validation_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) vr ON r.ruleset_id = vr.ruleset_id ORDER BY total_rules DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de règles de validation utilise le niveau de problème 'ALERTE' pour chaque masque ?
sql: SELECT mask, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN level_of_problem='ALERTE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS alerte_pct FROM validation_rules GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs safir (safir_field_id) couverts par les règles d’extraction d’un jeu de règles ?
sql: SELECT AVG(cnt) AS avg_safir_fields_per_ruleset FROM (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS cnt FROM field_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id);

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel est le ratio entre le nombre de règles d’extraction et le nombre de règles de validation ?
sql: SELECT fr.mask, (fr.cnt * 1.0 / vr.cnt) AS extraction_to_validation_ratio FROM (SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM field_rules GROUP BY mask) fr JOIN (SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM validation_rules GROUP BY mask) vr ON fr.mask = vr.mask;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de règles (extraction + validation) appliquées aux masques M57_CA et M57_CFU combinés ?
sql: SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM field_rules WHERE mask IN ('M57_CA','M57_CFU')) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM validation_rules WHERE mask IN ('M57_CA','M57_CFU')) ) AS total_rules_combined;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance du nombre de règles d’extraction entre le premier et le dernier jeu de règles créé ?
sql: WITH first_ruleset AS (SELECT ruleset_id FROM rulesets ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1), last_ruleset AS (SELECT ruleset_id FROM rulesets ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1), first_cnt AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM field_rules WHERE ruleset_id = (SELECT ruleset_id FROM first_ruleset)), last_cnt AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM field_rules WHERE ruleset_id = (SELECT ruleset_id FROM last_ruleset)) SELECT ( (last_cnt.cnt - first_cnt.cnt) * 100.0 / NULLIF(first_cnt.cnt,0) ) AS growth_percent FROM first_cnt, last_cnt;

question_fr: Pour chaque jeu de règles, calculez la densité de contrôle définie comme le nombre total de règles (extraction + validation) divisé par le nombre de masques distincts couverts, et indiquez les trois jeux avec la densité la plus élevée.
sql: WITH masks AS (SELECT ruleset_id, mask FROM field_rules UNION SELECT ruleset_id, mask FROM validation_rules), mask_counts AS (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(DISTINCT mask) AS distinct_masks FROM masks GROUP BY ruleset_id), rule_counts AS (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS total_rules FROM (SELECT ruleset_id FROM field_rules UNION ALL SELECT ruleset_id FROM validation_rules) GROUP BY ruleset_id) SELECT r.ruleset_id, rc.total_rules * 1.0 / NULLIF(mc.distinct_masks,0) AS control_density FROM rulesets r JOIN rule_counts rc ON r.ruleset_id = rc.ruleset_id JOIN mask_counts mc ON r.ruleset_id = mc.ruleset_id ORDER BY control_density DESC LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Identifiez les masques pour lesquels le nombre de règles de validation de niveau 'ECHEC' dépasse de plus de 50 % le nombre de règles d’extraction correspondantes, et indiquez le ratio exact.
sql: WITH fr AS (SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt_fr FROM field_rules GROUP BY mask), vr AS (SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt_vr FROM validation_rules WHERE level_of_problem='ECHEC' GROUP BY mask) SELECT vr.mask, vr.cnt_vr * 1.0 / NULLIF(fr.cnt_fr,0) AS failure_to_extraction_ratio FROM vr JOIN fr ON vr.mask = fr.mask WHERE vr.cnt_vr > 1.5 * fr.cnt_fr;

question_fr: Pour chaque jeu de règles, calculez le pourcentage de ses règles d’extraction qui ciblent plus de 10 champs safir différents, et listez les jeux où ce pourcentage dépasse 30 %.
sql: WITH fr AS (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS total_rules, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS distinct_safir FROM field_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) SELECT ruleset_id, (distinct_safir * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_rules,0)) AS percent_multi_safir FROM fr WHERE distinct_safir > 10 AND (distinct_safir * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_rules,0)) > 30;

question_fr: Déterminez le nombre moyen de règles de validation par masque pour les jeux de règles créés après le 1er janvier 2023, et comparez-le au nombre moyen global.
sql: WITH recent_rulesets AS (SELECT ruleset_id FROM rulesets WHERE created_at >= '2023-01-01'), overall AS (SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM validation_rules GROUP BY mask), recent AS (SELECT vr.mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM validation_rules vr JOIN recent_rulesets rr ON vr.ruleset_id = rr.ruleset_id GROUP BY vr.mask) SELECT (SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM recent) AS avg_recent_per_mask, (SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM overall) AS avg_overall_per_mask;

question_fr: Pour chaque jeu de règles, calculez le score de robustesse défini comme le nombre de règles de validation de niveau 'ALERTE' multiplié par le nombre de masques couverts, puis classez les jeux par ce score décroissant.
sql: WITH vr AS (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS alert_cnt FROM validation_rules WHERE level_of_problem='ALERTE' GROUP BY ruleset_id), masks AS (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(DISTINCT mask) AS mask_cnt FROM (SELECT ruleset_id, mask FROM field_rules UNION SELECT ruleset_id, mask FROM validation_rules) GROUP BY ruleset_id) SELECT r.ruleset_id, (COALESCE(vr.alert_cnt,0) * COALESCE(masks.mask_cnt,0)) AS robustness_score FROM rulesets r LEFT JOIN vr ON r.ruleset_id = vr.ruleset_id LEFT JOIN masks ON r.ruleset_id = masks.ruleset_id ORDER BY robustness_score DESC;

question_fr: Identifiez les jeux de règles où le nombre de règles d’extraction dépasse de plus de 20 % le nombre de règles de validation, et indiquez le ratio exact pour chaque jeu.
sql: WITH fr AS (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_fr FROM field_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id), vr AS (SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_vr FROM validation_rules GROUP BY ruleset_id) SELECT fr.ruleset_id, (fr.cnt_fr * 1.0 / NULLIF(vr.cnt_vr,0)) AS extraction_to_validation_ratio FROM fr JOIN vr ON fr.ruleset_id = vr.ruleset_id WHERE fr.cnt_fr > 1.2 * vr.cnt_vr;

question_fr: Quel est le total du champ D001 par année pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents par année pour le masque M57_CA ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage d’évolution du total du champ D002 d’une année à l’autre pour le masque M57_CFU ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS yr,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002' AND d.mask = 'M57_CFU'
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT y1.yr AS year,
       y1.total,
       ((y1.total - y0.total) / NULLIF(y0.total,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM yearly y1
LEFT JOIN yearly y0 ON y0.yr = CAST(y1.yr AS INTEGER) - 1
ORDER BY y1.yr;

question_fr: Combien de communes ont au moins un message d’erreur dans leurs documents chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d.city_name) AS communes_with_error
FROM documents d
WHERE d.error_message IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(d.error_message) <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du champ D003 par année pour le budget annexaire (BA) ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_D003
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D003' AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes qui ont vu le champ D001 croître le plus en pourcentage entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH per_commune AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001,
         d.document_year
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN total_D001 END) AS val_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN total_D001 END) AS val_2024
  FROM per_commune
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ((val_2024 - val_2023) / NULLIF(val_2023,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_growth
FROM pivot
WHERE val_2023 IS NOT NULL AND val_2024 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_growth DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents comporte un avertissement chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_warning
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Comment évolue la moyenne du champ D001 par document d’une année à l’autre, ventilée par masque ?
sql:
WITH avg_per AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         d.document_year,
         AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year
)
SELECT a.mask,
       a.document_year,
       a.avg_D001,
       ((a.avg_D001 - b.avg_D001) / NULLIF(b.avg_D001,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM avg_per a
LEFT JOIN avg_per b ON a.mask = b.mask AND b.document_year = CAST(a.document_year AS INTEGER) - 1
ORDER BY a.mask, a.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu le champ D001 diminuer de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH per_commune AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001,
         d.document_year
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN total_D001 END) AS val_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN total_D001 END) AS val_2024
  FROM per_commune
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ((val_2024 - val_2023) / NULLIF(val_2023,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM pivot
WHERE val_2023 IS NOT NULL AND val_2024 IS NOT NULL
  AND ((val_2024 - val_2023) / NULLIF(val_2023,0)) * 100.0 < -10.0;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs extraits par document chaque année ?
sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(er.result_id) AS result_cnt
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year,
       AVG(result_cnt) AS avg_results_per_doc
FROM counts
GROUP BY document_year
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne glissante sur 2 ans du champ D002 pour chaque commune, affichée pour 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT city_name,
       document_year,
       SUM(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS total_D002,
       AVG(SUM(CAST(value AS REAL))) OVER (PARTITION BY city_name ORDER BY document_year ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_2yr_avg
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002'
GROUP BY city_name, document_year
HAVING document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Pour chaque année, quel masque (M57_CA ou M57_CFU) génère le plus grand total du champ D001 ?
sql:
SELECT t.document_year,
       t.mask,
       t.total_D001
FROM (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         d.mask,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.document_year ORDER BY SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) DESC) AS rn
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.mask IN ('M57_CA','M57_CFU')
  GROUP BY d.document_year, d.mask
) t
WHERE t.rn = 1
ORDER BY t.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 3 principales catégories budgétaires (BP/BA) par total du champ D003 chaque année ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.budget_type,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D003
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D003'
  GROUP BY d.budget_type, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year,
       budget_type,
       total_D003
FROM (
  SELECT document_year,
         budget_type,
         total_D003,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY document_year ORDER BY total_D003 DESC) AS rn
  FROM totals
) sub
WHERE rn <= 3
ORDER BY document_year, rn;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage d’évolution du nombre total d’extractions (extraction_results) d’une année à l’autre, ventilé par masque ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(er.result_id) AS cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year
)
SELECT y1.mask,
       y1.document_year,
       y1.cnt,
       ((y1.cnt - y0.cnt) / NULLIF(y0.cnt,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM yearly y1
LEFT JOIN yearly y0 ON y1.mask = y0.mask AND y0.document_year = CAST(y1.document_year AS INTEGER) - 1
ORDER BY y1.mask, y1.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un taux de croissance annuel composé (CAGR) du champ D001 supérieur à 15 % entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN total_D001 END) AS val_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN total_D001 END) AS val_2024
  FROM yearly
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ((val_2024 / NULLIF(val_2023,0)) - 1) * 100.0 AS cagr_percent
FROM pivot
WHERE val_2023 IS NOT NULL AND val_2024 IS NOT NULL
  AND ((val_2024 / NULLIF(val_2023,0)) - 1) * 100.0 > 15.0
ORDER BY cagr_percent DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes voient le ratio D001/D002 augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN er.value END AS REAL)) /
         NULLIF(SUM(CAST(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN er.value END AS REAL)),0) AS ratio
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT r2024.city_name,
       r2023.ratio AS ratio_2023,
       r2024.ratio AS ratio_2024,
       ((r2024.ratio - r2023.ratio) / NULLIF(r2023.ratio,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
FROM ratios r2024
JOIN ratios r2023 ON r2024.city_name = r2023.city_name
WHERE r2024.document_year = '2024' AND r2023.document_year = '2023'
  AND ((r2024.ratio - r2023.ratio) / NULLIF(r2023.ratio,0)) * 100.0 > 20.0
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC;

question_fr: Quel est la moyenne pondérée du champ D001 par nombre de pages, par année, et son évolution en pourcentage ?
sql:
WITH weighted AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL) * d.nb_pages) AS weighted_sum,
         SUM(d.nb_pages) AS total_pages
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.document_year
),
avg AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         weighted_sum / NULLIF(total_pages,0) AS weighted_avg
  FROM weighted
)
SELECT a.document_year,
       a.weighted_avg,
       ((a.weighted_avg - b.weighted_avg) / NULLIF(b.weighted_avg,0)) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM avg a
LEFT JOIN avg b ON a.document_year = CAST(b.document_year AS INTEGER) + 1
ORDER BY a.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle part du total du champ D001 est générée par les 10 % des communes les plus fortes chaque année ?
sql:
WITH per_commune AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         city_name,
         total_D001,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY document_year ORDER BY total_D001 DESC) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY document_year) AS cnt,
         SUM(total_D001) OVER (PARTITION BY document_year) AS year_total
  FROM per_commune
),
top10 AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         SUM(total_D001) AS top10_total,
         year_total
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn <= (cnt * 0.10)
  GROUP BY document_year, year_total
)
SELECT document_year,
       100.0 * top10_total / year_total AS pct_top10_contribution
FROM top10
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents contenant au moins une erreur, ventilé par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_percent
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents sont actuellement en état « ERROR », par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS docs_in_error
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents d’extraction qui génèrent un avertissement, par masque ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS warning_rate_percent
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN extraction_runs r ON er.run_id = r.run_id
JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Combien de documents comportent à la fois un message d’erreur et un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS docs_error_and_warning
FROM documents d
WHERE d.error_message <> '' AND d.warning_message <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents en état « PARTIAL », par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(AVG(d.nb_pages), 2) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Combien de communes différentes ont au moins un document rejeté ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT d.city_name) AS municipalities_rejected
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'REJECTED';

question_fr: Quel est le taux moyen d’avertissements par document pour chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 3) AS avg_warning_per_doc
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages des documents qui ont au moins un avertissement mais aucune erreur, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(AVG(d.nb_pages), 2) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
WHERE d.warning_message <> '' AND d.error_message = ''
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage d’exécutions réussies (SUCCESS) comporte au moins un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               WHERE er.run_id = r.run_id AND er.message_warning <> ''
           ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS success_with_warning_percent
FROM extraction_runs r
JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON r.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux d’erreur pondéré par le nombre de pages, par commune ? (les 5 communes les plus exposées)
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN d.nb_pages ELSE 0 END) /
             SUM(d.nb_pages), 2) AS weighted_error_rate_percent
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY weighted_error_rate_percent DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de budget, quel est le ratio total d’avertissements sur le total d’erreurs ? (le type avec le ratio le plus élevé)
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_warnings,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_errors,
       CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND(1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /
                       SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) END AS warning_to_error_ratio
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.budget_type
ORDER BY warning_to_error_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le total du champ D001 pour l'année 2024 sur l'ensemble des communes (budget principal) ?

question_fr: Quel est le total du champ D003 (investissements) pour le budget annexaire (BA) par année ?

question_fr: Combien de communes différentes affichent au moins un avertissement dans leurs documents pour l'année 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle part du total D001 en 2024 (budget principal) est générée par les 10 % des communes les plus fortes ?
sql:
WITH commune_totals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_commune
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         total_commune,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_commune DESC) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER () AS cnt
  FROM commune_totals
),
top AS (
  SELECT SUM(total_commune) AS top_total
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn <= CAST(cnt * 0.10 AS INTEGER)
),
overall AS (
  SELECT SUM(total_commune) AS overall_total FROM commune_totals
)
SELECT 100.0 * top.top_total / overall.overall_total AS pct_top_10_percent
FROM top, overall;

question_fr: Quel est l'écart moyen du champ D001 par commune entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH avg_per_year AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT
  (SELECT avg_D001 FROM avg_per_year WHERE year = '2023') AS avg_2023,
  (SELECT avg_D001 FROM avg_per_year WHERE year = '2024') AS avg_2024,
  100.0 * ((SELECT avg_D001 FROM avg_per_year WHERE year = '2024') -
           (SELECT avg_D001 FROM avg_per_year WHERE year = '2023')) /
           (SELECT avg_D001 FROM avg_per_year WHERE year = '2023') AS growth_pct;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 communes où le ratio D001/D002 est le plus élevé en 2023 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_D001,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_D002
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2023'
    AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       sum_D001,
       sum_D002,
       CASE WHEN sum_D002 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE sum_D001 / sum_D002 END AS ratio_D001_D002
FROM sums
ORDER BY ratio_D001_D002 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel masque (M57_CA ou M57_CFU) génère le plus grand total D001 en 2024 (budget principal) ?

  AND d.document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du champ D003 par document pour le budget annexaire, ventilée par masque en 2023 ?

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents comporte à la fois un message d'erreur et un avertissement en 2024, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.error_message) <> '' AND TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_both
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un taux de croissance annuel composé du champ D001 supérieur à 15 % entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT y2023.city_name,
         y2023.total_D001 AS total_2023,
         y2024.total_D001 AS total_2024
  FROM yearly y2023
  JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2023.city_name = y2024.city_name
  WHERE y2023.document_year = '2023' AND y2024.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT city_name,
       total_2023,
       total_2024,
       100.0 * (total_2024 / total_2023 - 1) AS cagr_pct
FROM pivot
WHERE total_2023 > 0
  AND (total_2024 / total_2023 - 1) > 0.15
ORDER BY cagr_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le surplus net (D001 – D002) par commune pour le budget principal en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 communes les plus fortes ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_D001,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_D002
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
    AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       sum_D001,
       sum_D002,
       (sum_D001 - sum_D002) AS net_surplus
FROM sums
ORDER BY net_surplus DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle part du total D001 provient des documents en état SUCCESS versus les autres en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS overall_total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
),
success_total AS (
  SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS success_total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
    AND s.code = 'SUCCESS'
)
SELECT 100.0 * success_total / overall_total AS pct_success
FROM success_total, totals;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent une variance du champ D001 (budget principal) supérieure à 0,5 × (moyenne)² entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
stats AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         AVG(total_D001) AS mean_val,
         AVG(total_D001 * total_D001) - AVG(total_D001) * AVG(total_D001) AS variance_val
  FROM yearly
  GROUP BY city_name
  HAVING COUNT(*) = 2
)
SELECT city_name,
       mean_val,
       variance_val
FROM stats
WHERE variance_val > 0.5 * (mean_val * mean_val)
ORDER BY variance_val DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont une part du D001 provenant du budget annexaire (BA) supérieure à 30 % du total (BP + BA) en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH totals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.budget_type,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.budget_type IN ('BP','BA')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.budget_type
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT t.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN t.budget_type = 'BP' THEN t.total_D001 ELSE 0 END) AS total_BP,
         SUM(CASE WHEN t.budget_type = 'BA' THEN t.total_D001 ELSE 0 END) AS total_BA
  FROM totals t
  GROUP BY t.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       total_BP,
       total_BA,
       100.0 * total_BA / (total_BP + total_BA) AS pct_BA_of_total
FROM pivot
WHERE total_BP + total_BA > 0
  AND (total_BA / (total_BP + total_BA)) > 0.30
ORDER BY pct_BA_of_total DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la corrélation entre le nombre de pages et le total D001 par document (budget principal) en 2024, par masque ?
sql:
WITH doc_vals AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.mask,
         d.nb_pages,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.mask, d.nb_pages
),
stats AS (
  SELECT mask,
         COUNT(*) AS n,
         SUM(nb_pages) AS sum_x,
         SUM(total_D001) AS sum_y,
         SUM(nb_pages * nb_pages) AS sum_x2,
         SUM(total_D001 * total_D001) AS sum_y2,
         SUM(nb_pages * total_D001) AS sum_xy
  FROM doc_vals
  GROUP BY mask
  HAVING n > 1
)
SELECT mask,
       (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / (sqrt(n * sum_x2 - sum_x * sum_x) * sqrt(n * sum_y2 - sum_y * sum_y)) AS correlation
FROM stats;

question_fr: Quel est le poids moyen du champ D001 par commune, pondéré par le nombre de pages du document (budget principal) en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 communes les plus élevées ?
sql:
WITH doc_vals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.nb_pages,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
),
agg AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         SUM(val * nb_pages) AS weighted_sum,
         SUM(nb_pages) AS total_pages
  FROM doc_vals
  GROUP BY city_name
  HAVING total_pages > 0
)
SELECT city_name,
       weighted_sum / total_pages AS weighted_avg_D001,
       total_pages
FROM agg
ORDER BY weighted_avg_D001 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de règles de validation par jeu de règles ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation_rules
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY nb_validation_rules DESC;

question_fr: Combien de masques différents sont couverts par chaque jeu de règles d'extraction ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT fr.mask) AS nb_masks_covered
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY nb_masks_covered DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des règles de validation d'un jeu de règles est de niveau « ALERTE » ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN vr.level_of_problem = 'ALERTE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS pct_alerte
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE vr.validation_rule_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
HAVING COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) > 0
ORDER BY pct_alerte DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de règles d'extraction par jeu de règles ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(cnt) AS avg_extraction_rules_per_ruleset
FROM (
    SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS cnt
    FROM rulesets r
    LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
) sub;

question_fr: Combien de jeux de règles comportent au moins une règle de validation de niveau « ECHEC » ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.ruleset_id) AS nb_rulesets_with_echec
FROM rulesets r
JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE vr.level_of_problem = 'ECHEC';

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel est le nombre total de règles d'extraction et de validation, et quel est le ratio extraction / validation ?
sql:
WITH ex AS (
    SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_extraction_rules
    FROM field_rules
    GROUP BY mask
),
val AS (
    SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_validation_rules
    FROM validation_rules
    GROUP BY mask
)
SELECT ex.mask,
       ex.nb_extraction_rules,
       COALESCE(val.nb_validation_rules,0) AS nb_validation_rules,
       CASE WHEN COALESCE(val.nb_validation_rules,0)=0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND(1.0 * ex.nb_extraction_rules / val.nb_validation_rules,2)
       END AS extraction_to_validation_ratio
FROM ex
LEFT JOIN val ON val.mask = ex.mask
ORDER BY ex.mask;

question_fr: Identifiez les jeux de règles où le nombre de règles d'extraction dépasse de plus de 30 % le nombre de règles de validation, et indiquez le pourcentage d'excédent.
sql:
WITH counts AS (
    SELECT r.ruleset_id,
           COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction,
           COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation
    FROM rulesets r
    LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
)
SELECT ruleset_id,
       nb_extraction,
       nb_validation,
       ROUND(100.0 * (nb_extraction - nb_validation) / nb_validation, 2) AS pct_excess
FROM counts
WHERE nb_validation > 0 AND nb_extraction > 1.3 * nb_validation
ORDER BY pct_excess DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de règles de validation par masque, pondéré par le nombre de jeux de règles qui couvrent ce masque ?
sql:
WITH val_counts AS (
    SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_validation
    FROM validation_rules
    GROUP BY mask
),
ruleset_mask AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ruleset_id, mask
    FROM field_rules
)
SELECT v.mask,
       v.nb_validation * 1.0 / COUNT(rm.ruleset_id) AS weighted_avg_validation_per_ruleset
FROM val_counts v
JOIN ruleset_mask rm ON rm.mask = v.mask
GROUP BY v.mask, v.nb_validation
ORDER BY weighted_avg_validation_per_ruleset DESC;

question_fr: Classez les jeux de règles par densité de contrôle, définie comme le nombre total de règles (extraction + validation) divisé par le nombre de masques couverts.
sql:
WITH counts AS (
    SELECT r.ruleset_id,
           COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction,
           COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation,
           COUNT(DISTINCT fr.mask) AS nb_masks
    FROM rulesets r
    LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
)
SELECT ruleset_id,
       (nb_extraction + nb_validation) * 1.0 / NULLIF(nb_masks,0) AS control_density
FROM counts
ORDER BY control_density DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque niveau de problème (« ALERTE » ou « ECHEC »), quel est le nombre total de règles de validation et leur répartition par masque ?
sql:
SELECT vr.level_of_problem,
       vr.mask,
       COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS nb_rules
FROM validation_rules vr
GROUP BY vr.level_of_problem, vr.mask
ORDER BY vr.level_of_problem, vr.mask;

question_fr: Combien de règles d'extraction ciblent les indicateurs dont l'identifiant commence par « D00 » pour chaque jeu de règles ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_D00_rules
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE fr.safir_field_id LIKE 'D00%'
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY nb_D00_rules DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des règles d'extraction d'un jeu de règles cible des champs dont l'identifiant commence par « DF » ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN fr.safir_field_id LIKE 'DF%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id), 2) AS pct_df_rules
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE fr.extraction_rule_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY pct_df_rules DESC;

question_fr: Calculez un indice de robustesse pour chaque jeu de règles, défini comme (nombre de règles de validation de niveau « ALERTE » × nombre de masques couverts) ÷ nombre de règles d'extraction, et classez les jeux du plus élevé au plus bas.
sql:
WITH metrics AS (
    SELECT r.ruleset_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT fr.mask) AS nb_masks,
           COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction,
           SUM(CASE WHEN vr.level_of_problem = 'ALERTE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_alerte_validation
    FROM rulesets r
    LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
)
SELECT ruleset_id,
       nb_masks,
       nb_extraction,
       nb_alerte_validation,
       ROUND( (nb_alerte_validation * nb_masks) * 1.0 / NULLIF(nb_extraction,0), 4) AS robustness_index
FROM metrics
ORDER BY robustness_index DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des règles d'extraction d'un jeu de règles n'est pas couvert par une règle de validation du même masque dans le même jeu ?
sql:
WITH validation_per_ruleset_mask AS (
    SELECT ruleset_id, mask, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM validation_rules
    GROUP BY ruleset_id, mask
)
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS total_extraction,
       SUM(CASE WHEN v.cnt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS uncovered_extraction,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN v.cnt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id), 2) AS pct_uncovered
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN validation_per_ruleset_mask v ON v.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id AND v.mask = fr.mask
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
HAVING total_extraction > 0
ORDER BY pct_uncovered DESC;

question_fr: Calculez un score de couverture complet pour chaque jeu de règles, en pondérant chaque masque (M57_CA = 1, M57_CFU = 2, M4_CA = 1.5, M4_CFU = 1.5, M57 = 1, M4 = 1) puis en le divisant par le nombre total de règles d'extraction du jeu.
sql:
WITH mask_weights AS (
    SELECT 'M57_CA' AS mask, 1.0 AS weight UNION ALL
    SELECT 'M57_CFU', 2.0 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'M4_CA', 1.5 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'M4_CFU', 1.5 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'M57', 1.0 UNION ALL
    SELECT 'M4', 1.0
),
rule_counts AS (
    SELECT r.ruleset_id,
           fr.mask,
           COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_rules
    FROM rulesets r
    LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, fr.mask
)
SELECT rc.ruleset_id,
       SUM(rc.nb_rules * mw.weight) * 1.0 / NULLIF(total.nb_total_rules,0) AS coverage_score
FROM rule_counts rc
JOIN mask_weights mw ON mw.mask = rc.mask
JOIN (
    SELECT ruleset_id, SUM(nb_rules) AS nb_total_rules
    FROM rule_counts
    GROUP BY ruleset_id
) total ON total.ruleset_id = rc.ruleset_id
GROUP BY rc.ruleset_id
ORDER BY coverage_score DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque jeu de règles, calculez le coefficient de variation du nombre de règles de validation par masque et indiquez les jeux où ce coefficient dépasse 0,5.
sql:
WITH val_per_mask AS (
    SELECT r.ruleset_id,
           vr.mask,
           COUNT(vr.validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation
    FROM rulesets r
    LEFT JOIN validation_rules vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
    GROUP BY r.ruleset_id, vr.mask
),
stats AS (
    SELECT ruleset_id,
           AVG(nb_validation) AS avg_cnt,
           SQRT(AVG(nb_validation * nb_validation) - AVG(nb_validation) * AVG(nb_validation)) AS stddev_cnt
    FROM val_per_mask
    GROUP BY ruleset_id
)
SELECT ruleset_id,
       avg_cnt,
       stddev_cnt,
       ROUND(stddev_cnt / NULLIF(avg_cnt,0), 3) AS coeff_variation
FROM stats
WHERE avg_cnt > 0 AND stddev_cnt / NULLIF(avg_cnt,0) > 0.5
ORDER BY coeff_variation DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents contenant un message d'erreur, ventilé par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_error,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents sont en état PARTIAL, ventilés par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS partial_docs
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre d'extractions réussies (SUCCESS) par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS successful_runs
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages pour les documents qui ont au moins un avertissement mais aucun message d'erreur, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
WHERE d.warning_message <> ''
  AND (d.error_message = '' OR d.error_message IS NULL)
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents comporte à la fois un message d'erreur et un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' AND d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS both_docs,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' AND d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS both_rate_pct
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quels états affichent la plus forte moyenne d'avertissements par document, parmi les états avec au moins 10 documents ?
sql:
SELECT s.code AS state_code,
       COUNT(*) AS doc_count,
       AVG(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_warning_per_doc
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY s.code
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_warning_per_doc DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de résultats d'extraction par exécution, selon l'état de l'exécution ?
sql:
SELECT s.code AS run_state,
       AVG(res_per_run) AS avg_results_per_run
FROM (
        SELECT er.run_id,
               COUNT(*) AS res_per_run
        FROM extraction_results er
        JOIN extraction_runs erun ON er.run_id = erun.run_id
        GROUP BY er.run_id
     ) sub
JOIN extraction_runs erun ON sub.run_id = erun.run_id
JOIN states s ON erun.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY s.code;

question_fr: Combien de documents contiennent le mot « tableau » dans l'avertissement mais aucune erreur, ventilés par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS count_docs
FROM documents d
WHERE d.warning_message LIKE '%tableau%'
  AND (d.error_message = '' OR d.error_message IS NULL)
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents contenant un message d'erreur d'extraction, selon l'état du document ?
sql:
WITH result_errors AS (
    SELECT s.code AS state_code,
           COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS total_docs,
           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '' THEN d.document_id END) AS docs_with_error_msg
    FROM documents d
    JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
    LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY s.code
)
SELECT state_code,
       total_docs,
       docs_with_error_msg,
       ROUND(100.0 * docs_with_error_msg / total_docs, 2) AS error_msg_rate_pct
FROM result_errors
ORDER BY error_msg_rate_pct DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quelle est la différence moyenne entre le nombre d'avertissements et le nombre d'erreurs par document ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       AVG(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_warnings,
       AVG(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_errors,
       (AVG(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - AVG(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_warn_err
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage d'extractions réussies (SUCCESS) comporte au moins un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT erun.run_id) AS total_success_runs,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN erun.run_id END) AS runs_with_warning,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN erun.run_id END) / COUNT(DISTINCT erun.run_id), 2) AS warning_rate_pct
FROM extraction_runs erun
JOIN states s ON erun.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON erun.document_id = d.document_id
LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.run_id = erun.run_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel état de document présente la plus forte proportion d'erreurs dans les résultats d'extraction ?
sql:
WITH result_errors AS (
    SELECT s.code AS state_code,
           COUNT(*) AS total_results,
           SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_results
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
    GROUP BY s.code
)
SELECT state_code,
       total_results,
       error_results,
       ROUND(100.0 * error_results / total_results, 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM result_errors
ORDER BY error_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents contenant « section » dans l'avertissement et « extraction » dans l'erreur, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages,
       COUNT(*) AS doc_count
FROM documents d
WHERE d.warning_message LIKE '%section%'
  AND d.error_message LIKE '%extraction%'
GROUP BY d.budget_type
ORDER BY avg_pages DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes qui ont le plus grand total du champ D001 (budget principal) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_d001 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus faible total du champ D001 (budget principal) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND d.document_year = '2024'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_d001 ASC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le ratio D001/D002 est le plus élevé en 2023 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_d001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_d002
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       sum_d001 / NULLIF(sum_d002,0) AS ratio
FROM sums
WHERE sum_d002 > 0
ORDER BY ratio DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le total D001 a augmenté de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH y2023 AS (
 SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2023
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
),
 y2024 AS (
 SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2024
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT y2024.city_name,
       y2023.total_2023,
       y2024.total_2024,
       (y2024.total_2024 - y2023.total_2023) / NULLIF(y2023.total_2023,0) * 100.0 AS growth_percent
FROM y2023
JOIN y2024 ON y2023.city_name = y2024.city_name
WHERE y2023.total_2023 > 0
  AND (y2024.total_2024 - y2023.total_2023) / y2023.total_2023 > 0.20
ORDER BY growth_percent DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes voient le champ D001 représenter plus de 30 % du total D001 + D002 en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_d001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_d002
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       sum_d001,
       sum_d002,
       sum_d001 / NULLIF((sum_d001 + sum_d002),0) * 100.0 AS pct_d001
FROM sums
WHERE (sum_d001 + sum_d002) > 0
  AND sum_d001 / (sum_d001 + sum_d002) > 0.30
ORDER BY pct_d001 DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 documents qui ont le plus grand nombre d’erreurs d’extraction en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_id,
       d.city_name,
       COUNT(r.result_id) AS error_count
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  AND r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name
ORDER BY error_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus grand total D001 toutes catégories de budget confondues en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_d001 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le taux d’erreur (documents avec au moins un message d’erreur) par type de budget en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS error_rate
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type
ORDER BY error_rate DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le D001 par page est le plus élevé en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH city_stats AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001,
        SUM(d.nb_pages) AS total_pages
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       total_d001,
       total_pages,
       total_d001 / NULLIF(total_pages,0) AS d001_per_page
FROM city_stats
WHERE total_pages > 0
ORDER BY d001_per_page DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes dépassent le 90ᵉ centile du total D001 (budget principal) en 2024 ? (les 5 plus élevées)
sql:
WITH city_totals AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
),
threshold AS (
 SELECT total_d001 AS perc90
 FROM city_totals
 ORDER BY total_d001 DESC
 LIMIT 1 OFFSET (SELECT CAST(COUNT(*)*0.1 AS INTEGER) FROM city_totals)
)
SELECT ct.city_name,
       ct.total_d001
FROM city_totals ct, threshold th
WHERE ct.total_d001 > th.perc90
ORDER BY ct.total_d001 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une croissance du D001 supérieure à 15 % chaque année sur trois ans consécutifs (2022‑2024) ?
sql:
WITH y2022 AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2022
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2022' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
),
 y2023 AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2023
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
),
 y2024 AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2024
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
),
 growth23 AS (
 SELECT y2022.city_name,
        (y2023.total_2023 - y2022.total_2022) / NULLIF(y2022.total_2022,0) AS growth_23
 FROM y2022
 JOIN y2023 ON y2022.city_name = y2023.city_name
),
 growth34 AS (
 SELECT y2023.city_name,
        (y2024.total_2024 - y2023.total_2023) / NULLIF(y2023.total_2023,0) AS growth_34
 FROM y2023
 JOIN y2024 ON y2023.city_name = y2024.city_name
)
SELECT g23.city_name,
       g23.growth_23 * 100.0 AS growth_23_pct,
       g34.growth_34 * 100.0 AS growth_34_pct
FROM growth23 g23
JOIN growth34 g34 ON g23.city_name = g34.city_name
WHERE g23.growth_23 > 0.15 AND g34.growth_34 > 0.15
ORDER BY growth_23_pct DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent un ratio D001/D002 qui sort de la norme (plus de 2 écarts‑type) en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH city_ratios AS (
 SELECT d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_d001,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_d002
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
 GROUP BY d.city_name
 HAVING sum_d002 > 0
),
ratios AS (
 SELECT city_name,
        sum_d001 / sum_d002 AS ratio
 FROM city_ratios
),
stats AS (
 SELECT AVG(ratio) AS avg_ratio,
        SQRT(AVG(ratio * ratio) - AVG(ratio) * AVG(ratio)) AS stddev_ratio
 FROM ratios
)
SELECT r.city_name,
       r.ratio,
       s.avg_ratio,
       s.stddev_ratio
FROM ratios r, stats s
WHERE ABS(r.ratio - s.avg_ratio) > 2 * s.stddev_ratio
ORDER BY ABS(r.ratio - s.avg_ratio) DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel est le ratio de concentration du D001 : part du total D001 apportée par les 10 % des communes les plus fortes en 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH city_totals AS (
 SELECT d.mask,
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_d001
 FROM documents d
 JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
 WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
 GROUP BY d.mask, d.city_name
),
ranked AS (
 SELECT mask,
        city_name,
        total_d001,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY mask ORDER BY total_d001 DESC) AS rn,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY mask) AS cnt
 FROM city_totals
),
top_contrib AS (
 SELECT mask,
        SUM(total_d001) AS top10_total
 FROM ranked
 WHERE rn <= CAST(cnt * 0.1 AS INTEGER)
 GROUP BY mask
),
mask_totals AS (
 SELECT mask,
        SUM(total_d001) AS mask_total
 FROM city_totals
 GROUP BY mask
)
SELECT m.mask,
       top10_total / NULLIF(m.mask_total,0) AS concentration_ratio
FROM top_contrib tc
JOIN mask_totals m ON tc.mask = m.mask
ORDER BY concentration_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage d’évolution du total D001 entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT D.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND D.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND D.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
  GROUP BY D.document_year
)
SELECT ((y2024.total_D001 - y2023.total_D001) / y2023.total_D001) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM yearly y2023
JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2024.document_year = '2024' AND y2023.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le champ D001 a le plus augmenté entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT D.city_name,
         D.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND D.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND D.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
  GROUP BY D.city_name, D.document_year
)
SELECT inc.city_name,
       (inc.total_D001 - prev.total_D001) AS increase_D001
FROM sums inc
JOIN sums prev ON inc.city_name = prev.city_name
WHERE inc.document_year = '2024' AND prev.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY increase_D001 DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen D001/D002 par année pour le budget principal ?
sql:
WITH ratios AS (
  SELECT D.document_year,
         D.city_name,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ER.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(ER.value AS REAL) END) AS rev,
         SUM(CASE WHEN ER.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(ER.value AS REAL) END) AS exp
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE D.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY D.document_year, D.city_name
)
SELECT document_year,
       AVG(CASE WHEN exp != 0 THEN rev / exp END) AS avg_rev_exp_ratio
FROM ratios
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen (champ D001) pour les budgets annexes (BA) comparé au budget principal (BP) en 2024 ?

question_fr: Comment a évolué la moyenne du champ D003 (investissements) entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal ?

question_fr: Combien de communes ont vu leur champ D001 diminuer entre 2023 et 2024 (budget principal) ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT D.city_name,
         D.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND D.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND D.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
  GROUP BY D.city_name, D.document_year
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_communes_decline
FROM sums s2024
JOIN sums s2023 ON s2024.city_name = s2023.city_name
WHERE s2024.document_year = '2024'

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen (D001) par type de budget (BP vs BA) chaque année ?

question_fr: Quelles années ont vu le total du champ D001 diminuer par rapport à l’année précédente ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT D.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY D.document_year
)
SELECT y_curr.document_year,
       y_curr.total_D001,
       y_prev.total_D001
FROM yearly y_curr

question_fr: Quelle part du total D001 provient des budgets annexes (BA) versus le budget principal (BP) chaque année ? (Indiquer les années où la part BA dépasse 30 %)
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT D.document_year,
         D.budget_type,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY D.document_year, D.budget_type
)
SELECT ba.document_year,
       (ba.total_D001 * 1.0) / (ba.total_D001 + bp.total_D001) * 100.0 AS ba_share_pct
FROM sums ba
JOIN sums bp ON ba.document_year = bp.document_year
WHERE ba.budget_type = 'BA'
  AND bp.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND (ba.total_D001 + bp.total_D001) > 0
  AND ((ba.total_D001 * 1.0) / (ba.total_D001 + bp.total_D001) * 100.0) > 30.0;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance annuel composé (CAGR) du champ D001 sur la période 2022‑2024 pour chaque commune, et quelles sont les 5 meilleures ?
sql:
WITH t2022 AS (
  SELECT D.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS total_2022
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND D.document_year = '2022'
  GROUP BY D.city_name
),
 t2024 AS (
  SELECT D.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS total_2024
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND D.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY D.city_name
)
SELECT t2022.city_name,
       ((t2024.total_2024 / t2022.total_2022) - 1) * 100.0 / 2.0 AS avg_annual_growth_pct
FROM t2022
JOIN t2024 ON t2022.city_name = t2024.city_name
WHERE t2022.total_2022 > 0
ORDER BY avg_annual_growth_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, la moyenne glissante sur 2 ans du champ D001 dépasse‑elle de plus de 10 % la valeur de 2024 ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT D.city_name,
         CAST(D.document_year AS INTEGER) AS yr,
         SUM(CAST(ER.value AS REAL)) AS d001_year
  FROM extraction_results ER
  JOIN documents D ON ER.document_id = D.document_id
  WHERE ER.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY D.city_name, D.document_year
),
 rolling AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         yr,
         d001_year,
         AVG(d001_year) OVER (PARTITION BY city_name ORDER BY yr ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS avg_2yr
  FROM yearly
)
SELECT city_name,
       yr AS year_2024,
       d001_year,
       avg_2yr
FROM rolling
WHERE yr = 2024
  AND d001_year > avg_2yr * 1.10;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents affiche un avertissement sans aucune erreur, ventilé par type de budget ?

SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' AND d.error_message = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_warning_no_error
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.budget_type
ORDER BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Comment évolue le nombre de documents d'un même masque d'une année à l'autre (variation en pourcentage) ?
sql:
WITH yearly_counts AS (
    SELECT mask, document_year AS year, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM documents
    GROUP BY mask, document_year
),
ordered AS (
    SELECT mask, year, cnt,
           LAG(cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY mask ORDER BY year) AS prev_cnt
    FROM yearly_counts
)
SELECT mask, year,
       CASE WHEN prev_cnt IS NULL THEN NULL
            WHEN prev_cnt = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (cnt - prev_cnt) / prev_cnt, 2)
       END AS pct_change
FROM ordered
ORDER BY mask, year;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quelle proportion des documents sont en budget principal (BP) versus annexes (BA) ?
sql:
WITH city_counts AS (
    SELECT city_name, budget_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM documents
    GROUP BY city_name, budget_type
),
city_totals AS (
    SELECT city_name, SUM(cnt) AS total_cnt
    FROM city_counts
    GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT c.city_name,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.budget_type = 'BP' THEN c.cnt END) / ct.total_cnt, 2) AS pct_bp,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.budget_type = 'BA' THEN c.cnt END) / ct.total_cnt, 2) AS pct_ba
FROM city_counts c
JOIN city_totals ct ON c.city_name = ct.city_name
GROUP BY c.city_name
ORDER BY pct_bp DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents comporte le champ D001 parmi les extractions, ventilé par année ?
sql:
WITH docs_with_d001 AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT er.document_id, d.document_year
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
)
SELECT d.document_year AS year,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(docs_with_d001.document_id) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id), 2) AS pct_documents_with_D001
FROM documents d
LEFT JOIN docs_with_d001 ON d.document_id = docs_with_d001.document_id
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne de la valeur extraite du champ D001 pour les budgets principaux (BP) chaque année ?

FROM extraction_results er

GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le nombre moyen d'extractions par document est le plus élevé ?

    SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, COUNT(er.run_id) AS run_cnt
    FROM documents d
    LEFT JOIN extraction_runs er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.document_id
)
SELECT city_name,
       ROUND(AVG(run_cnt), 2) AS avg_runs_per_document
FROM runs_per_doc
GROUP BY city_name
ORDER BY avg_runs_per_document DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents présente à la fois un avertissement et une erreur, par année ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes dont le total cumulé du champ D001 (budget principal) dépasse un million d'euros, classées par montant décroissant ?

WITH d001_values AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id

SELECT city_name,

question_fr: Combien de documents par année contiennent au moins une valeur non vide pour le champ D001 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS docs_with_D001 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND (er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> '') GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents par type de budget n’a pas de valeur pour le champ Conso ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.value IS NULL OR er.value = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS pct_missing FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quel est le pourcentage de documents où le champ D003 est présent ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS pct_D003_present FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id AND er.safir_field_id = 'D003' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY pct_D003_present DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quels champs ont été extraits dans au moins 80 % des documents d’une année, et combien d’années remplissent ce critère ?
sql: WITH docs_per_year AS (SELECT document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS total_docs FROM documents GROUP BY document_year), field_year_counts AS (SELECT er.safir_field_id, d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_field FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> '' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id, d.document_year) SELECT fy.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS years_80pct FROM field_year_counts fy JOIN docs_per_year dp ON fy.document_year = dp.document_year WHERE 1.0 * fy.docs_with_field / dp.total_docs >= 0.8 GROUP BY fy.safir_field_id ORDER BY years_80pct DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de budget, quel champ SAFIR a la plus faible couverture globale ?
sql: WITH total_docs AS (SELECT budget_type, COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS total FROM documents GROUP BY budget_type), field_counts AS (SELECT d.budget_type, er.safir_field_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_field FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> '' GROUP BY d.budget_type, er.safir_field_id) SELECT fc.budget_type, fc.safir_field_id, 100.0 * fc.docs_with_field / td.total AS coverage_pct FROM field_counts fc JOIN total_docs td ON fc.budget_type = td.budget_type WHERE fc.docs_with_field = (SELECT MIN(docs_with_field) FROM field_counts WHERE budget_type = fc.budget_type) ORDER BY fc.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de Gini de la répartition du nombre de champs distincts extraits par document, par année ?
sql: WITH doc_fields AS (SELECT d.document_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS field_cnt FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.document_id), ordered AS (SELECT d.document_year, df.field_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.document_year ORDER BY df.field_cnt) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.document_year) AS n, SUM(df.field_cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY d.document_year) AS total FROM doc_fields df JOIN documents d ON df.document_id = d.document_id), gini_calc AS (SELECT document_year, (2.0 * SUM(rn * field_cnt) / (n * total) - (n + 1.0) / n) AS gini FROM ordered GROUP BY document_year) SELECT document_year, gini FROM gini_calc ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents n’ont aucune extraction associée ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS docs_without_extractions FROM documents d WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id);

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents contenant au moins une erreur d’extraction, ventilé par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er2 WHERE er2.document_id = d.document_id AND er2.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er2.message_error <> '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_error_docs FROM documents d GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de couverture des champs par année, exprimé en pourcentage du nombre total de champs définis ?
sql: WITH total_fields AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS total FROM field_rules), fields_per_year AS (SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS covered_fields FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value <> '' GROUP BY d.document_year) SELECT fpy.document_year, 100.0 * fpy.covered_fields / (SELECT total FROM total_fields) AS coverage_pct FROM fields_per_year fpy ORDER BY fpy.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents ont échoué lors de l'extraction en 2023, ventilés par type de budget ?

       COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS docs_error

JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND s.code = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents dont l'extraction a réussi, par masque ?

       ROUND(AVG(d.nb_pages), 2) AS avg_pages
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
