question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents en état PARTIAL pour l'année 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'PARTIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_partial
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de documents sans aucun résultat d'extraction parmi ceux dont l'état global est SUCCESS, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN cnt.result_cnt = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_no_extractions
FROM documents d
JOIN states ds ON d.state_id = ds.state_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT er.document_id, COUNT(res.result_id) AS result_cnt
    FROM extraction_runs er
    JOIN extraction_results res ON er.run_id = res.run_id
    GROUP BY er.document_id
) cnt ON d.document_id = cnt.document_id
WHERE ds.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le temps moyen d'exécution d'une extraction (en minutes) pour chaque masque en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH run_durations AS (
  SELECT er.run_id,
         d.mask,
         JULIANDAY(MAX(res.created_at)) - JULIANDAY(er.start_time) AS duration_days
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN extraction_results res ON er.run_id = res.run_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY er.run_id
)
SELECT mask,
       ROUND(AVG(duration_days) * 24 * 60, 2) AS avg_duration_minutes
FROM run_durations
GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quelle part des documents de plus de 10 pages a échoué lors de l'extraction, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_failed_over_10pages
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.nb_pages > 10
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Parmi les documents dont l'état global est SUCCESS, quelle proportion comporte au moins une valeur d'extraction avec un message d'erreur, par année ?
sql:
WITH successful_docs AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.document_year
  FROM documents d
  JOIN states ds ON d.state_id = ds.state_id
  WHERE ds.code = 'SUCCESS'
)
SELECT sd.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er_has_error.doc_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_success_with_errors
FROM successful_docs sd
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT er.document_id AS doc_id
    FROM extraction_runs er
    JOIN extraction_results res ON er.run_id = res.run_id
    WHERE res.message_error IS NOT NULL AND res.message_error <> ''
    GROUP BY er.document_id
) er_has_error ON sd.document_id = er_has_error.doc_id
GROUP BY sd.document_year;

question_fr: Comment le nombre de résultats d'extraction par document a-t-il varié entre 2023 et 2024 pour les mêmes SIRET, et quels sont les écarts les plus marqués ?
sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT d.siret,
         d.document_year,
         d.document_id,
         COUNT(res.result_id) AS res_cnt
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_runs er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results res ON er.run_id = res.run_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.siret, d.document_year, d.document_id
)
SELECT c2024.siret,
       c2024.document_id AS doc_2024,
       c2023.document_id AS doc_2023,
       c2024.res_cnt - c2023.res_cnt AS diff_cnt
FROM counts c2024
JOIN counts c2023 ON c2024.siret = c2023.siret
WHERE c2024.document_year = '2024' AND c2023.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY ABS(diff_cnt) DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, la durée moyenne d'extraction dépasse‑t‑elle 1,5 fois la moyenne globale en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH durations AS (
  SELECT er.run_id,
         d.mask,
         (JULIANDAY(MAX(res.created_at)) - JULIANDAY(er.start_time)) * 24 * 60 AS duration_minutes
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN extraction_results res ON er.run_id = res.run_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY er.run_id
),
overall_avg AS (
  SELECT AVG(duration_minutes) AS avg_all FROM durations
)
SELECT d.mask,
       ROUND(AVG(d.duration_minutes), 2) AS avg_duration_minutes,
       ROUND(o.avg_all, 2) AS overall_avg,
       CASE WHEN AVG(d.duration_minutes) > 1.5 * o.avg_all THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS exceeds_1_5x
FROM durations d, overall_avg o
GROUP BY d.mask
HAVING AVG(d.duration_minutes) > 1.5 * o.avg_all;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de runs dépasse la moyenne + 2 écarts‑type de durée d'extraction par année, et quelles années dépassent 5 % ?
sql:
WITH run_durations AS (
  SELECT d.document_year,
         (JULIANDAY(MAX(res.created_at)) - JULIANDAY(er.start_time)) * 24 * 60 AS duration_min
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN extraction_results res ON er.run_id = res.run_id
  GROUP BY er.run_id
),
stats AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         AVG(duration_min) AS mean_min,
         SQRT(AVG(duration_min * duration_min) - AVG(duration_min) * AVG(duration_min)) AS stddev_min
  FROM run_durations
  GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT s.document_year,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN rd.duration_min > s.mean_min + 2 * s.stddev_min THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pct_outlier_runs
FROM stats s
JOIN run_durations rd ON s.document_year = rd.document_year
GROUP BY s.document_year
HAVING pct_outlier_runs > 5.0;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 3 communes où le nombre moyen d’avertissements par document (extractions réussies) est le plus élevé en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH success_docs AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name
  FROM documents d
  JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT sd.city_name,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN d.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS avg_warning_per_doc
FROM success_docs sd
JOIN documents d ON sd.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY sd.city_name
ORDER BY avg_warning_per_doc DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance du nombre total de résultats d'extraction d'un masque d'une année à l'autre, et quels masques ont dépassé 30 % de croissance ?
sql:
WITH yearly_counts AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         d.document_year,
         COUNT(res.result_id) AS total_results
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  JOIN extraction_results res ON er.run_id = res.run_id
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_year
),
growth AS (
  SELECT yc1.mask,
         yc1.document_year AS year_current,
         yc2.document_year AS year_prev,
         yc1.total_results,
         yc2.total_results AS prev_total,
         (yc1.total_results * 1.0 / yc2.total_results - 1) * 100.0 AS growth_pct
  FROM yearly_counts yc1
  JOIN yearly_counts yc2 ON yc1.mask = yc2.mask
                         AND CAST(yc1.document_year AS INTEGER) = CAST(yc2.document_year AS INTEGER) + 1
)
SELECT mask,
       year_current,
       ROUND(growth_pct, 2) AS growth_percent
FROM growth
WHERE growth_pct > 30.0
ORDER BY mask, year_current;

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen (champ D001) des budgets principaux (BP) chaque année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       AVG(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS avg_revenue
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
  AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  AND r.value <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le total des dépenses (champ D002) des budgets annexes (BA) par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_expense
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA'
  AND r.safir_field_id = 'D002'
  AND r.value <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de communes ont vu leur revenu (D001) du budget principal (BP) augmenter de plus de 5 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH rev AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
), piv AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN revenue END) AS rev_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN revenue END) AS rev_2024
  FROM rev
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS communes_increase
FROM piv
WHERE rev_2023 > 0
  AND rev_2024 > rev_2023 * 1.05;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de variation du revenu total (D001) du budget principal (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT ((rev_2024 - rev_2023) / rev_2023) * 100.0 AS pct_change
FROM (
  SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS rev_2023,
         SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS rev_2024
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
);

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une hausse de plus de 10 % de leurs investissements (D003) du budget principal entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH inv AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS invest
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D003'
    AND r.value <> ''
), piv AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN invest END) AS inv_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN invest END) AS inv_2024
  FROM inv
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ((inv_2024 - inv_2023) / inv_2023) * 100.0 AS pct_growth
FROM piv
WHERE inv_2023 > 0
  AND ((inv_2024 - inv_2023) / inv_2023) * 100.0 > 10.0;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen revenu/dépense (D001/D002) du budget principal par année ?
sql:
WITH doc_vals AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS revenue,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS expense
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year,
       AVG(CASE WHEN expense <> 0 THEN revenue / expense END) AS avg_ratio
FROM doc_vals
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents de type M57_CA et budget principal (BP) sont enregistrés chaque année ?

SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS doc_count
FROM documents d
WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA'
  AND d.budget_type = 'BP'

ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance annuel composé (CAGR) du revenu (D001) sur la période 2023‑2024 pour chaque commune, et quelles sont les 5 communes avec le CAGR le plus élevé ?
sql:
WITH rev AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
), piv AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN revenue END) AS rev_start,
         MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN revenue END) AS rev_end
  FROM rev
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ((rev_end / rev_start) - 1) * 100.0 AS cagr_pct
FROM piv
WHERE rev_start > 0
ORDER BY cagr_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont présenté un déficit (dépenses supérieures aux recettes) pour le budget principal, et quel est le montant du déficit le plus important par année ?
sql:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS revenue,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS expense
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT city_name,
       document_year,
       (expense - revenue) AS deficit
FROM data
WHERE expense > revenue
ORDER BY deficit DESC;

question_fr: Quelle part du revenu total (D001) du budget principal est générée par les 10 % des communes les plus productives chaque année ?
sql:
WITH rev AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
), agg AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         SUM(revenue) AS total_rev
  FROM rev
  GROUP BY document_year
), ranked AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         city_name,
         revenue,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY document_year ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY document_year) AS cnt
  FROM rev
)
SELECT r.document_year,
       (SUM(r.revenue) * 100.0) / a.total_rev AS top10_percent_share
FROM ranked r
JOIN agg a ON r.document_year = a.document_year
WHERE r.rn <= (0.1 * r.cnt)
GROUP BY r.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents contenant au moins un avertissement mais aucune erreur, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages
FROM documents d
WHERE d.warning_message <> ''
  AND (d.error_message IS NULL OR d.error_message = '')
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents sont au format PDF chaque année ?

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen par page (champ D001) des documents du budget principal, ventilé par année ?
sql:
WITH doc_rev AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year,
         d.nb_pages,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
)
SELECT document_year,
       AVG(revenue / nb_pages) AS avg_rev_per_page
FROM doc_rev
GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la croissance moyenne du revenu (D001) du budget principal parmi toutes les communes entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH rev AS (

         d.document_year,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un ratio dépenses/recettes (D002/D001) supérieur à 1,2 pour le budget principal en 2024, et quel est ce ratio ?
sql:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS revenue,
         MAX(CASE WHEN r.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(r.value AS REAL) END) AS expense
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.value <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT city_name,
       (expense / revenue) AS ratio
FROM data
WHERE document_year = '2024'
  AND revenue > 0
  AND (expense / revenue) > 1.2
ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question_fr: Combien de résultats d'extraction sont générés chaque année pour les documents de type M57_CA ?

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents selon le type de budget (BP vs BA) chaque année ?

question_fr: Quelle part du revenu total (D001) du budget principal est détenue par les 3 communes les plus fortes chaque année ?
sql:
WITH rev AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND r.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND r.value <> ''
), total AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         SUM(revenue) AS total_rev
  FROM rev
  GROUP BY document_year
), top3 AS (
  SELECT document_year,
         SUM(revenue) AS top_rev
  FROM (
    SELECT document_year,
           city_name,
           revenue,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY document_year ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rn
    FROM rev
  )
  WHERE rn <= 3
  GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT t.document_year,
       (top3.top_rev * 100.0) / t.total_rev AS top3_pct
FROM total t
JOIN top3 ON t.document_year = top3.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des recettes (champ D001) du budget principal (BP) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_revenue FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été déposés par type de budget en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle part du total des dépenses (champ D002) du budget principal en 2024 est attribuée à chaque commune, exprimée en pourcentage du total national ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(CAST(er2.value AS REAL)) FROM extraction_results er2 JOIN documents d2 ON er2.document_id = d2.document_id WHERE er2.safir_field_id = 'D002' AND d2.budget_type = 'BP' AND d2.document_year = '2024')) AS expense_percentage FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY expense_percentage DESC;

question_fr: Combien de documents contiennent au moins une erreur d'extraction en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_error FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> '';

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen des recettes (D001) sur les dépenses (D002) pour chaque commune dans le budget principal en 2023, classé du plus élevé au plus bas ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END),0) ) AS rev_exp_ratio FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) > 0 ORDER BY rev_exp_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de variation du total des recettes (D001) du budget principal entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT ((total_2024 - total_2023) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_2023,0)) AS revenue_growth_percent FROM ( SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023' ) AS t3, ( SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024' ) AS t4;

question_fr: Quelles sont les cinq communes qui ont enregistré le plus grand total d'investissements (D003) dans le budget annexes en 2024, et quels sont les montants correspondants ?

question_fr: Quelle proportion du total des recettes (D001) du budget principal en 2024 est apportée par chaque masque, exprimée en pourcentage ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, (SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(CAST(er2.value AS REAL)) FROM extraction_results er2 JOIN documents d2 ON er2.document_id = d2.document_id WHERE er2.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d2.budget_type = 'BP' AND d2.document_year = '2024')) AS revenue_pct FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.mask ORDER BY revenue_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen par page (D001 / nombre de pages) du budget principal pour chaque commune en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) / SUM(d.nb_pages)) AS revenue_per_page FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING SUM(d.nb_pages) > 0 ORDER BY revenue_per_page DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de couverture du champ D001 parmi les documents du budget principal en 2024 (pourcentage de documents contenant une valeur non vide) ?

question_fr: Quel est le solde net (recettes D001 moins dépenses D002) du budget annexes pour chaque commune en 2024, et quelles sont les communes présentant le plus grand déficit ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END)) AS net_balance FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY net_balance ASC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de champs extraits par document pour les documents de masque M57_CA en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT AVG(field_count) FROM ( SELECT er.document_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS field_count FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY er.document_id );

question_fr: Quel est le ratio moyen recettes/dépenses (D001/D002) du budget principal pour chaque année 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d_year, AVG(CASE WHEN exp > 0 THEN rev/exp END) AS avg_rev_exp_ratio FROM ( SELECT d.document_id, d.document_year AS d_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id='D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS rev, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id='D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS exp FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.document_id ) sub GROUP BY d_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs recettes du budget principal augmenter de plus de 15 % entre 2023 et 2024, et quels sont le pourcentage et le montant d'augmentation correspondants ?
sql: WITH rev_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS rev FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id='D001' AND d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), rev_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS rev FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id='D001' AND d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT r24.city_name, r24.rev AS rev_2024, r23.rev AS rev_2023, ((r24.rev - r23.rev) * 100.0 / NULLIF(r23.rev,0)) AS growth_pct, (r24.rev - r23.rev) AS absolute_increase FROM rev_2024 r24 JOIN rev_2023 r23 ON r24.city_name = r23.city_name WHERE r23.rev > 0 AND ((r24.rev - r23.rev) * 100.0 / r23.rev) > 15 ORDER BY growth_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le coefficient de Gini de la répartition des recettes du budget principal parmi les communes en 2024 ?
sql: WITH revs AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS rev FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id='D001' AND d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' GROUP BY d.city_name), ordered AS (SELECT rev, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY rev) AS rank, COUNT(*) OVER () AS n, SUM(rev) OVER () AS total_rev FROM revs) SELECT (2.0 * SUM(rank * rev) / (n * total_rev) - (n + 1.0) / n) AS gini_coefficient FROM ordered;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel type de budget (BP ou BA) présente le revenu moyen par page le plus élevé pour le champ D001 en 2024 ?
sql: WITH metrics AS (SELECT d.mask, d.budget_type, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_rev, SUM(d.nb_pages) AS total_pages FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id='D001' AND d.document_year='2024' GROUP BY d.mask, d.budget_type), calc AS (SELECT mask, budget_type, (total_rev / NULLIF(total_pages,0)) AS rev_per_page FROM metrics) SELECT c1.mask, c1.budget_type AS budget_type_1, c1.rev_per_page AS rev_per_page_1, c2.budget_type AS budget_type_2, c2.rev_per_page AS rev_per_page_2, CASE WHEN c1.rev_per_page > c2.rev_per_page THEN c1.budget_type ELSE c2.budget_type END AS higher_budget_type FROM calc c1 JOIN calc c2 ON c1.mask = c2.mask AND c1.budget_type <> c2.budget_type WHERE c1.budget_type = 'BP' AND c2.budget_type = 'BA';

question_fr: Quelle est la corrélation de Pearson entre le nombre de pages et le total des recettes (D001) des documents du budget principal en 2023 ?
sql: WITH data AS (SELECT d.nb_pages AS pages, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS revenue FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id='D001' AND d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2023'), stats AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(pages) AS sum_x, SUM(revenue) AS sum_y, SUM(pages*pages) AS sum_x2, SUM(revenue*revenue) AS sum_y2, SUM(pages*revenue) AS sum_xy FROM data) SELECT ( (stats.sum_xy - stats.sum_x*stats.sum_y/ stats.n) / ( sqrt( (stats.sum_x2 - stats.sum_x*stats.sum_x/ stats.n) * (stats.sum_y2 - stats.sum_y*stats.sum_y/ stats.n) ) ) ) AS pearson_corr FROM stats;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents en état d'erreur par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS error_docs,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_percent
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents comporte au moins un avertissement, ventilé par type de budget, pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_warning,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS warning_rate_percent
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents contient le mot « extraction » dans le message d’erreur, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message LIKE '%extraction%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_extraction_error,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message LIKE '%extraction%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS extraction_error_rate_percent
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen d’avertissements par document, selon l’état du document, pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT s.code AS state_code,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 3) AS avg_warning_per_doc
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY s.code
ORDER BY avg_warning_per_doc DESC;

question_fr: Parmi les documents en état SUCCESS, quelle part a généré au moins un résultat d’extraction en état ERROR, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_success_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               JOIN states s_er ON er.state_id = s_er.state_id
               WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id AND s_er.code = 'ERROR'
           ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_error_result,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               JOIN states s_er ON er.state_id = s_er.state_id
               WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id AND s_er.code = 'ERROR'
           ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS percent_error_results_in_success
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de runs PARTIAL contenant au moins un avertissement dans les résultats d’extraction, par masque ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       COUNT(DISTINCT erun.run_id) AS total_partial_runs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               WHERE er.run_id = erun.run_id AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> ''
           ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS runs_with_warning,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               WHERE er.run_id = erun.run_id AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> ''
           ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT erun.run_id), 2) AS warning_rate_percent
FROM extraction_runs erun
JOIN documents d ON erun.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON erun.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.mask
ORDER BY warning_rate_percent DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents en état ERROR créés il y a plus de 30 jours, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_error_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN julianday('now') - julianday(d.created_at) > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS older_than_30d,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN julianday('now') - julianday(d.created_at) > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS older_rate_percent
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle proportion de documents en état SUCCESS comporte le mot « tableau » dans le message d’avertissement, par type de budget ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS total_success,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message LIKE '%tableau%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning_tableau,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.warning_message LIKE '%tableau%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS rate_percent
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de résultats d’extraction par document pour les documents en état SUCCESS, par ville ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND(AVG(cnt), 2) AS avg_results_per_doc
FROM (
    SELECT er.document_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM extraction_results er
    GROUP BY er.document_id
) er_counts
JOIN documents d ON er_counts.document_id = d.document_id
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY avg_results_per_doc DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents en état PARTIAL a généré au moins un résultat d’extraction en état ERROR, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_partial_docs,
       SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               JOIN states s_er ON er.state_id = s_er.state_id
               WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id AND s_er.code = 'ERROR'
           ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_error_result,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
               SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
               JOIN states s_er ON er.state_id = s_er.state_id
               WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id AND s_er.code = 'ERROR'
           ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS percent_error_in_partial
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le taux d’erreurs critiques (message contenant « interrompu ») parmi les documents rejetés, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       COUNT(*) AS total_rejected,
       SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message LIKE '%interrompu%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS critical_errors,
       ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.error_message LIKE '%interrompu%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS critical_error_rate_percent
FROM documents d
JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE s.code = 'REJECTED'
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen (en jours) entre la création du document et le lancement de l’extraction pour les documents contenant au moins un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       ROUND(AVG(julianday(erun.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)), 2) AS avg_days_to_start
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs erun ON erun.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE TRIM(d.warning_message) <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents présentant à la fois un avertissement et une erreur, parmi ceux qui ont au moins un avertissement, par année ?
sql:
WITH stats AS (
    SELECT d.document_year,
           COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
           SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_warning,
           SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(d.warning_message) <> '' AND TRIM(d.error_message) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_both
    FROM documents d
    GROUP BY d.document_year
)
SELECT document_year,
       total_docs,
       docs_with_warning,
       docs_with_both,
       ROUND(100.0 * docs_with_warning / total_docs, 2) AS warning_rate_percent,
       CASE WHEN docs_with_warning = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(100.0 * docs_with_both / docs_with_warning, 2)
       END AS both_given_warning_percent
FROM stats
ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelles villes affichent un ratio supérieur à 20 % de documents en état PARTIAL contenant au moins un résultat d’extraction avec un message d’erreur ?
sql:
WITH partial_docs AS (
    SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name
    FROM documents d
    JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
    WHERE s.code = 'PARTIAL'
),
error_counts AS (
    SELECT pd.city_name,
           SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (
                   SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
                   WHERE er.document_id = pd.document_id AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> ''
               ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS docs_with_error,
           COUNT(*) AS total_partial_docs
    FROM partial_docs pd
    GROUP BY pd.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       total_partial_docs,
       docs_with_error,
       ROUND(100.0 * docs_with_error / total_partial_docs, 2) AS error_ratio_percent
FROM error_counts
WHERE (docs_with_error * 1.0 / total_partial_docs) > 0.20
ORDER BY error_ratio_percent DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes qui affichent le revenu le plus élevé (champ D001) pour le budget principal (BP) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la dépense la plus faible (champ D002) pour le budget annexes (BA) en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS expense FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BA' AND d.document_year='2023' AND r.safir_field_id='D002' ORDER BY expense ASC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents qui contiennent au moins un avertissement mais aucune erreur, par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages FROM documents d WHERE d.warning_message <> '' AND (d.error_message = '' OR d.error_message IS NULL) GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de résultats d’extraction ont été générés en 2023 pour les documents de type M57_CA ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.mask='M57_CA' AND d.document_year='2023';

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents au format PDF chaque année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN d.format='pdf' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_pdf FROM documents d GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur revenu (champ D001) du budget principal augmenter de plus de 15 % entre 2023 et 2024, et quel est le pourcentage d’évolution ?
sql: WITH rev AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' AND r.value!='' ) SELECT rev2024.city_name, ((rev2024.revenue - rev2023.revenue) / rev2023.revenue) * 100.0 AS pct_change, (rev2024.revenue - rev2023.revenue) AS amount_change FROM rev rev2023 JOIN rev rev2024 ON rev2023.city_name = rev2024.city_name WHERE rev2023.document_year='2023' AND rev2024.document_year='2024' AND rev2023.revenue > 0 AND ((rev2024.revenue - rev2023.revenue) / rev2023.revenue) > 0.15 ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent un déficit (dépenses supérieures aux recettes) pour le budget principal en 2024, et quel est le montant du déficit ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (CAST(e.value AS REAL) - CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS deficit FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id AND r.safir_field_id='D001' JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id AND e.safir_field_id='D002' WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND CAST(e.value AS REAL) > CAST(r.value AS REAL) ORDER BY deficit DESC;

question_fr: Quelle part du revenu total du budget principal en 2024 est générée par les 5 communes les plus productives ?
sql: WITH rev AS ( SELECT d.city_name, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' ), total AS (SELECT SUM(revenue) AS total_rev FROM rev), top5 AS (SELECT SUM(revenue) AS top5_rev FROM rev ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT (top5.top5_rev / total.total_rev) * 100.0 AS pct_top5 FROM total, top5;

question_fr: Quels documents de type M57_CA en 2024 ont généré un nombre de résultats d’extraction supérieur à deux fois la moyenne des documents du même type ?
sql: WITH doc_counts AS ( SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, COUNT(er.result_id) AS cnt FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.mask='M57_CA' AND d.document_year='2024' GROUP BY d.document_id ), avg_cnt AS ( SELECT AVG(cnt) AS avg_cnt FROM doc_counts ) SELECT dc.document_id, dc.city_name, dc.cnt, avg_cnt.avg_cnt FROM doc_counts dc, avg_cnt WHERE dc.cnt > 2 * avg_cnt.avg_cnt ORDER BY dc.cnt DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen par page (champ D001 / nombre de pages) pour chaque type de masque du budget principal en 2024, et quels masques se démarquent ?
sql: WITH rev_pages AS ( SELECT d.mask, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_rev, SUM(d.nb_pages) AS total_pages FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' GROUP BY d.mask ) SELECT mask, (total_rev / total_pages) AS rev_per_page FROM rev_pages ORDER BY rev_per_page DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent un ratio dépenses/recettes (D002/D001) supérieur à 1,5 pour le budget principal en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (CAST(e.value AS REAL) / CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS expense_ratio FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id AND r.safir_field_id='D001' JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id AND e.safir_field_id='D002' WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND r.value!='' AND e.value!='' AND (CAST(e.value AS REAL) / CAST(r.value AS REAL)) > 1.5 ORDER BY expense_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance du revenu total du budget principal entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH yearly AS ( SELECT d.document_year AS yr, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_rev FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' GROUP BY d.document_year ) SELECT ((y2024.total_rev - y2023.total_rev) / y2023.total_rev) * 100.0 AS pct_growth FROM yearly y2023 JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2023.yr='2023' AND y2024.yr='2024';

question_fr: Quel pourcentage du revenu total du budget principal en 2024 est capturé par les communes appartenant au 1 % supérieur en termes de revenu ?
sql: WITH rev AS ( SELECT d.city_name, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' ), ranked AS ( SELECT city_name, revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_cnt FROM rev ), top_pct AS ( SELECT SUM(revenue) AS top_rev, (SELECT SUM(revenue) FROM rev) AS total_rev FROM ranked WHERE rn <= total_cnt * 0.01 ) SELECT (top_rev / total_rev) * 100.0 AS pct_top_1_percent FROM top_pct;

question_fr: Quel est le classement des communes selon le revenu du budget principal en 2024, et quelle est la différence de revenu entre chaque rang consécutif ? Présentez les 10 premiers rangs.
sql: WITH rev AS ( SELECT d.city_name, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS revenue FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' ), ranked AS ( SELECT city_name, revenue, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rank, LAG(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS prev_revenue FROM rev ) SELECT rank, city_name, revenue, revenue - prev_revenue AS diff_to_prev FROM ranked WHERE rank <= 10 ORDER BY rank;

question_fr: Quels documents de 2024 présentent plus de 5 résultats d’extraction par page, ce qui peut indiquer une densité anormale d’informations ?
sql: WITH doc_counts AS ( SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.nb_pages, COUNT(er.result_id) AS res_cnt FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year='2024' GROUP BY d.document_id ) SELECT document_id, city_name, nb_pages, res_cnt, (res_cnt * 1.0 / nb_pages) AS results_per_page FROM doc_counts WHERE (res_cnt * 1.0 / nb_pages) > 5 ORDER BY results_per_page DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la corrélation de Pearson entre le nombre de pages et le revenu total (champ D001) des documents du budget principal en 2024 ?
sql: WITH data AS ( SELECT d.nb_pages AS x, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS y FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.budget_type='BP' AND d.document_year='2024' AND r.safir_field_id='D001' AND r.value!='' ), stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(x) AS sum_x, SUM(y) AS sum_y, SUM(x * y) AS sum_xy, SUM(x * x) AS sum_x2, SUM(y * y) AS sum_y2 FROM data ) SELECT (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / (sqrt(n * sum_x2 - sum_x * sum_x) * sqrt(n * sum_y2 - sum_y * sum_y)) AS pearson_r FROM stats;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de champs SAFIR distincts extraits pour les documents du budget principal (BP) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS distinct_fields
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le taux de couverture (pourcentage de documents) de chaque champ SAFIR pour le budget principal (BP) en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT er.safir_field_id,
       100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id)
                                           FROM documents
                                           WHERE budget_type = 'BP' AND document_year = '2024') AS coverage_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value <> ''
GROUP BY er.safir_field_id
ORDER BY coverage_pct DESC;

question_fr: Combien de champs sont manquants (valeur vide) pour chaque document de 2023 avec le masque M57_CA ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_id,
       COUNT(*) AS missing_fields
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND d.mask = 'M57_CA'
  AND (er.value IS NULL OR er.value = '')
GROUP BY d.document_id;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de résultats d’extraction sans aucun avertissement pour le budget principal (BP) en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NULL OR er.message_warning = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_no_warning
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quels champs SAFIR ont vu leur taux de couverture diminuer de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 pour le budget principal (BP) ?
sql:
WITH cov AS (
  SELECT er.safir_field_id,
         d.document_year,
         100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) / (
           SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id)
           FROM documents
           WHERE document_year = d.document_year AND budget_type = 'BP'
         ) AS pct
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND er.value <> ''
  GROUP BY er.safir_field_id, d.document_year
)
SELECT c2024.safir_field_id,
       c2023.pct AS pct_2023,
       c2024.pct AS pct_2024,
       (c2023.pct - c2024.pct) AS drop_pct
FROM cov c2023
JOIN cov c2024 ON c2023.safir_field_id = c2024.safir_field_id
WHERE c2023.document_year = '2023'
  AND c2024.document_year = '2024'
  AND (c2023.pct - c2024.pct) > 10
ORDER BY drop_pct DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel est le nombre moyen de champs SAFIR distincts extraits par document en 2024, classés du plus élevé au plus bas ?
sql:
SELECT t.mask,
       AVG(t.field_cnt) AS avg_fields
FROM (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.mask,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS field_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
) t
GROUP BY t.mask
ORDER BY avg_fields DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les trois champs SAFIR présentant la plus grande variance de leurs valeurs numériques dans le budget annexes (BA) en 2023 ?
sql:
WITH numeric_vals AS (
  SELECT er.safir_field_id,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA'
    AND d.document_year = '2023'
    AND er.value <> ''
),
stats AS (
  SELECT safir_field_id,
         AVG(val) AS avg_val,
         AVG(val * val) AS avg_sq,
         COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM numeric_vals
  GROUP BY safir_field_id
),
var AS (
  SELECT safir_field_id,
         (avg_sq - avg_val * avg_val) AS variance
  FROM stats
)
SELECT safir_field_id,
       variance
FROM var
ORDER BY variance DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Combien de résultats d’extraction ont été générés pour les documents au masque M57_CA en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_results
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.mask = 'M57_CA' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen d’avertissements par document pour le budget principal (BP) en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT AVG(warn_cnt) AS avg_warnings_per_doc
FROM (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warn_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
) sub;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de résultats d’extraction par document selon le type de budget en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.budget_type,
       AVG(cnt) AS avg_results_per_doc
FROM (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
) sub
JOIN documents d ON sub.document_id = d.document_id
GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Combien de documents distincts contiennent le champ « Année » avec une valeur non vide en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_annee
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
  AND er.safir_field_id = 'Année'
  AND er.value <> '';

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de valeurs renseignées parmi tous les résultats d’extraction pour le masque M4_CFU en 2023 ?
sql:
SELECT 100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.value <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_filled
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE d.mask = 'M4_CFU' AND d.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quel est le taux de couverture du champ D002 pour chaque année disponible dans la base ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year,
       100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) / (
         SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id)
         FROM documents
         WHERE document_year = d.document_year
       ) AS coverage_pct
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002' AND er.value <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Pour chaque combinaison masque / type de budget, quel est le pourcentage de champs SAFIR qui ont au moins une erreur d’extraction en 2024, et quelles combinaisons dépassent 20 % ?
sql:
WITH total_fields AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         d.budget_type,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS total_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.budget_type
),
error_fields AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         d.budget_type,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS err_cnt
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL
    AND er.message_error <> ''
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.budget_type
)
SELECT t.mask,
       t.budget_type,
       100.0 * e.err_cnt / t.total_cnt AS error_ratio_pct
FROM total_fields t
JOIN error_fields e ON t.mask = e.mask AND t.budget_type = e.budget_type
WHERE 100.0 * e.err_cnt / t.total_cnt > 20
ORDER BY error_ratio_pct DESC;

question_fr: Combien de règles d'extraction sont définies pour chaque jeu de règles ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS nb_extraction_rules
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY nb_extraction_rules DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de règles de validation par masque ?
sql:
SELECT mask, COUNT(validation_rule_id) AS nb_validation_rules
FROM validation_rules
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY nb_validation_rules DESC;

question_fr: Combien de jeux de règles contiennent plus de 20 règles d'extraction ?
sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_rulesets_gt_20
FROM (
  SELECT r.ruleset_id, COUNT(fr.extraction_rule_id) AS cnt
  FROM rulesets r
  JOIN field_rules fr ON fr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
  GROUP BY r.ruleset_id
  HAVING cnt > 20
) sub;

question_fr: Combien de règles de validation de niveau ALERTE existent pour chaque masque ?
sql:
SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_alerte
FROM validation_rules
WHERE level_of_problem = 'ALERTE'
GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio de règles de validation sur les règles d'extraction par jeu de règles ?
sql:
WITH er AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_extraction
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
), vr AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_validation
  FROM validation_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
)
SELECT er.ruleset_id,
       cnt_extraction,
       cnt_validation,
       (cnt_validation * 1.0) / NULLIF(cnt_extraction,0) AS validation_to_extraction_ratio
FROM er
LEFT JOIN vr ON vr.ruleset_id = er.ruleset_id
ORDER BY validation_to_extraction_ratio DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de règles d'extraction par jeu de règles pour chaque masque ?
sql:
SELECT mask,
       AVG(cnt) AS avg_extraction_rules_per_ruleset
FROM (
  SELECT mask, ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY mask, ruleset_id
) t
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY avg_extraction_rules_per_ruleset DESC;

question_fr: Quels masques ont plus de 30 % de leurs règles de validation au niveau ECHEC ?
sql:
WITH total_per_mask AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS total_rules
  FROM validation_rules
  GROUP BY mask
), ech_per_mask AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS ech_rules
  FROM validation_rules
  WHERE level_of_problem = 'ECHEC'
  GROUP BY mask
)
SELECT t.mask,
       (ech_rules * 100.0) / total_rules AS pct_echec
FROM total_per_mask t
JOIN ech_per_mask e ON e.mask = t.mask
WHERE (ech_rules * 100.0) / total_rules > 30
ORDER BY pct_echec DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 jeux de règles avec le plus grand nombre total de règles (extraction + validation) ?
sql:
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0) AS extraction_rules,
       COALESCE(vr.cnt_validation,0) AS validation_rules,
       COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0) + COALESCE(vr.cnt_validation,0) AS total_rules
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_extraction
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
) er ON er.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_validation
  FROM validation_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
) vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY total_rules DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quels jeux de règles ont un ratio validation/extraction supérieur à 0,5 et incluent le masque M57 ?
sql:
WITH er AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_extraction
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
), vr AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_validation
  FROM validation_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
), mask_present AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ruleset_id
  FROM field_rules
  WHERE mask = 'M57'
)
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0) AS extraction_rules,
       COALESCE(vr.cnt_validation,0) AS validation_rules,
       (COALESCE(vr.cnt_validation,0) * 1.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0),0) AS validation_to_extraction_ratio
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN er ON er.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN vr ON vr.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE r.ruleset_id IN (SELECT ruleset_id FROM mask_present)
  AND (COALESCE(vr.cnt_validation,0) * 1.0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0),0) > 0.5;

question_fr: Quelle proportion des règles d'extraction ciblent les indicateurs de dépenses (safir_field_id commençant par D0) pour chaque masque ?
sql:
WITH total_per_mask AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS total_rules
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY mask
), expense_per_mask AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS expense_rules
  FROM field_rules
  WHERE safir_field_id LIKE 'D0%'
  GROUP BY mask
)
SELECT t.mask,
       (e.expense_rules * 100.0) / t.total_rules AS pct_expense_rules
FROM total_per_mask t
LEFT JOIN expense_per_mask e ON e.mask = t.mask
ORDER BY pct_expense_rules DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les 3 jeux de règles avec l’indice de densité de contrôle le plus élevé (alertes + échecs / extraction) ?
sql:
WITH er AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_extraction
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
), vr_alert AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_alert
  FROM validation_rules
  WHERE level_of_problem = 'ALERTE'
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
), vr_echec AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt_echec
  FROM validation_rules
  WHERE level_of_problem = 'ECHEC'
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
)
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0) AS extraction_rules,
       COALESCE(vr_alert.cnt_alert,0) + COALESCE(vr_echec.cnt_echec,0) AS total_alert_echec,
       (COALESCE(vr_alert.cnt_alert,0) + COALESCE(vr_echec.cnt_echec,0)) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0),0) AS control_density_index
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN er ON er.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN vr_alert ON vr_alert.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN vr_echec ON vr_echec.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
WHERE COALESCE(er.cnt_extraction,0) > 0
ORDER BY control_density_index DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Combien de champs SAFIR distincts sont définis par masque dans les règles d'extraction ?
sql:
SELECT mask,
       COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS distinct_fields
FROM field_rules
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY distinct_fields DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage des règles d'extraction d’un jeu de règles qui utilisent le masque M57_CA ?
sql:
WITH er_total AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS total_rules
  FROM field_rules
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
), er_m57ca AS (
  SELECT ruleset_id, COUNT(*) AS m57ca_rules
  FROM field_rules
  WHERE mask = 'M57_CA'
  GROUP BY ruleset_id
)
SELECT r.ruleset_id,
       COALESCE(t.total_rules,0) AS total_rules,
       COALESCE(m.m57ca_rules,0) AS m57ca_rules,
       (COALESCE(m.m57ca_rules,0) * 100.0) / NULLIF(t.total_rules,0) AS pct_m57ca
FROM rulesets r
LEFT JOIN er_total t ON t.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
LEFT JOIN er_m57ca m ON m.ruleset_id = r.ruleset_id
ORDER BY pct_m57ca DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de réussite des extractions (état SUCCESS) par année d'exécution ?
sql:
WITH runs AS (
  SELECT substr(er.start_time, 1, 4) AS year,
         COUNT(*) AS total,
         SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_cnt
  FROM extraction_runs er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  GROUP BY year
)
SELECT year,
       success_cnt * 100.0 / total AS success_rate_percent
FROM runs
ORDER BY year;

question_fr: Combien de documents, par type de masque, ont au moins un résultat d'extraction en état ERROR ?
sql:
SELECT d.mask,
       COUNT(DISTINCT er.document_id) AS docs_with_error
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY d.mask
ORDER BY docs_with_error DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen, en jours, entre la création du document et le lancement de l'extraction, par année budgétaire ?
sql:
WITH delays AS (
  SELECT d.document_year AS year,
         (julianday(er.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)) AS delay_days
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
)
SELECT year,
       AVG(delay_days) AS avg_delay_days
FROM delays
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents, par type de budget, n'ont pas toutes leurs extractions abouties (au moins un résultat en état PENDING ou PARTIAL) ?
sql:
WITH docs_total AS (
  SELECT budget_type, COUNT(*) AS total_docs
  FROM documents
  GROUP BY budget_type
),
docs_incomplete AS (
  SELECT d.budget_type, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS incomplete_docs
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE s.code IN ('PENDING', 'PARTIAL')
  GROUP BY d.budget_type
)
SELECT dt.budget_type,
       COALESCE(di.incomplete_docs, 0) * 100.0 / dt.total_docs AS incomplete_percent
FROM docs_total dt
LEFT JOIN docs_incomplete di ON dt.budget_type = di.budget_type
ORDER BY dt.budget_type;

question_fr: Combien de documents, par année, sont marqués comme SUCCESS alors que leur exécution d'extraction est en état ERROR ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_year AS year,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS anomalous_docs
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
JOIN states sd ON d.state_id = sd.state_id
JOIN states sr ON er.state_id = sr.state_id
WHERE sd.code = 'SUCCESS' AND sr.code = 'ERROR'
GROUP BY d.document_year
ORDER BY year;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents, par masque, qui ont au moins un avertissement dans le champ warning_message mais aucune erreur dans les résultats d'extraction ?
sql:
WITH docs_warn AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.mask
  FROM documents d
  WHERE d.warning_message IS NOT NULL AND trim(d.warning_message) <> ''
),
docs_error AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT er.document_id
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
  WHERE s.code = 'ERROR'
)
SELECT dw.mask,
       COUNT(DISTINCT dw.document_id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS pct_warn_no_error
FROM docs_warn dw
JOIN documents d ON dw.document_id = d.document_id
LEFT JOIN docs_error de ON dw.document_id = de.document_id
WHERE de.document_id IS NULL
GROUP BY dw.mask
ORDER BY pct_warn_no_error DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque masque, quel est le nombre moyen de résultats d'extraction par document, et quels masques se situent en dessous de 80 % de la moyenne globale ?
sql:
WITH per_doc AS (
  SELECT d.mask, d.document_id, COUNT(er.result_id) AS result_cnt
  FROM documents d
  LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  GROUP BY d.mask, d.document_id
),
mask_avg AS (
  SELECT mask, AVG(result_cnt) AS avg_per_doc
  FROM per_doc
  GROUP BY mask
),
overall AS (
  SELECT AVG(result_cnt) AS overall_avg FROM per_doc
)
SELECT ma.mask,
       ma.avg_per_doc,
       overall.overall_avg,
       (ma.avg_per_doc * 100.0 / overall.overall_avg) AS pct_of_overall
FROM mask_avg ma, overall
WHERE ma.avg_per_doc < overall.overall_avg * 0.8
ORDER BY pct_of_overall ASC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents, par année, ont un temps d'extraction (différence entre start_time et created_at) supérieur à deux écarts‑types au-dessus de la moyenne pour leur masque ?
sql:
WITH delays AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.document_year AS year,
         d.mask,
         (julianday(er.start_time) - julianday(d.created_at)) AS delay_days
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
),
stats AS (
  SELECT mask,
         AVG(delay_days) AS mean_delay,
         sqrt(AVG(delay_days * delay_days) - AVG(delay_days) * AVG(delay_days)) AS stddev_delay
  FROM delays
  GROUP BY mask
),
delayed_docs AS (
  SELECT d.year,
         COUNT(*) AS total_docs,
         SUM(CASE WHEN d.delay_days > s.mean_delay + 2 * s.stddev_delay THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_delay_docs
  FROM delays d
  JOIN stats s ON d.mask = s.mask
  GROUP BY d.year
)
SELECT year,
       high_delay_docs * 100.0 / total_docs AS high_delay_percent
FROM delayed_docs
ORDER BY year;

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été importés chaque année, ventilés par type de budget et par format ?
sql:
SELECT document_year,
       budget_type,
       format,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_documents
FROM documents
GROUP BY document_year, budget_type, format
ORDER BY document_year, budget_type, format;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents importés chaque année, par masque, contiennent au moins un avertissement mais aucune erreur ?
sql:
SELECT document_year,
       mask,
       100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN warning_message <> '' AND (error_message = '' OR error_message IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS pct_warn_without_error
FROM documents
GROUP BY document_year, mask
ORDER BY document_year, mask;
